Peter — BIG news! **Build Blue Week is less than**** _10 days_****away, and I’m so excited to share with you the amazing panelists for our panel,**[**_Lived Experience as Candidates_****on Monday, September 20 at 6pm ET!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-FtxGXwdIei-BJ4sqGcHIoyRn8FWamojV2eYGJD7Ghw) During this discussion, you’ll get to hear from St. Louis Mayor **Tishaura Jones** and Pennsylvania State Rep. **Malcolm Kenyatta**! name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Stop Biden's Vaccine Mandates, Here's How
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stop_biden_s_vaccine_mandates&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **_That's it! Joe Biden and Tim Walz have gone too far. These tyrants have messed with one of the most sacred individual freedoms we have - health freedom._** I'm sick of politicians, on both sides of the aisle, not doing anything about the massive assault on our freedoms since the beginning of COVID. We seem to have two sides. The COVID cultists on the left who believe everything their saint, Anthony Fauci, says. Including wearing multiple masks. STUPID! On the other side, we have weak-kneed Republicans who think you and I are too extreme and unreasonable. They'd prefer to keep the status quo because all they care about is their re-election. But from what I see, both sides are leading us to the destruction of America. I REFUSE to sit idly by! _Luckily, we have at least one legislator at the Capitol willing to solve this problem NOW. Rep Erik Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment would nullify Joe Biden's orders in our state._
## We need to PASS THIS IMMEDIATELY!
Governor Walz is supposed to call the legislature for a Special Session this month. They plan on a very short, one-day session to pass a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill to give bonuses to healthcare workers and others for their work in 2020. At the same time, those frontline workers are about to lose their job because they don't want to take an experimental vaccine. That's not right. **We MUST tie these two things together. I need you to DEMAND that your state representative and state senator do not agree to sign the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it includes the Rep Erik Mortensen's [Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stop_biden_s_vaccine_mandates&n=2) with it.** This is the one shot we have at NULLIFYING BIDEN'S ORDERS!!! Rep Erik Mortensen's **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** would make Biden's order unenforceable in Minnesota. We MUST get this passed! Politicians fear masses of people who demand action on a specific item. They know if they fail the masses, they won't likely get re-elected. That's why you have power. Demand that your state representative and state senator [**pledges to you**](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stop_biden_s_vaccine_mandates&n=3) that they will not vote for the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it has the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** attached to it. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stop_biden_s_vaccine_mandates&n=4 "FIND MY REP & SENATOR") [FIND MY REP & SENATOR](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stop_biden_s_vaccine_mandates&n=4)
---
**Sample Script**
Dear ______, do not agree to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill in the upcoming Special Session until you protect health care workers' jobs by adding the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment to it. Rep Erik Mortensen's Amendment would nullify Biden's unconstitutional mandates. Show you are on our side by signing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge at this link: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge.
**Alternate Script**
Dear ________, there is no issue more important that protecting our health rights and privacy. That's why I want you to pledge to us that you will not support the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** attached to it. Rep Erik Mortensen's Amendment would nullify Biden's newly announced vaccine mandates in Minnesota. We expect you to sign this or we will make sure all your voters know that you wouldn't stand up for health freedom. Here's the pledge: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge
**If you have a Republican representative or senator, they will likely tell you this isn't possible because Democrats won't vote for it. But that's B.S.! We were able to End Walz' Emergency Powers in June despite a Democrat Majority in the House and Walz in the Governor's mansion.**
Politicians MUST do what you ask of them when you stay focused on the action. There's only one way we can End Biden and Walz' vaccine mandates right now, and it's by passing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment in the Special Session.
Peter, I can't thank you enough for putting pressure on these legislators. It WILL make a difference. If you haven't signed our Stop Vaccine Mandates petition yet, please add your signature on it. And send it to friends and family.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stop_biden_s_vaccine_mandates&n=5)

clean_body: | Peter \-- That's it! Joe Biden and Tim Walz have gone too far. These tyrants have messed with one of the most sacred individual freedoms we have - health freedom. I'm sick of politicians, on both sides of the aisle, not doing anything about the massive assault on our freedoms since the beginning of COVID. We seem to have two sides. The COVID cultists on the left who believe everything their saint, Anthony Fauci, says. Including wearing multiple masks. STUPID! On the other side, we have weak-kneed Republicans who think you and I are too extreme and unreasonable. They'd prefer to keep the status quo because all they care about is their re-election. But from what I see, both sides are leading us to the destruction of America. I REFUSE to sit idly by! Luckily, we have at least one legislator at the Capitol willing to solve this problem NOW. Rep Erik Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment would nullify Joe Biden's orders in our state. We need to PASS THIS IMMEDIATELY! Governor Walz is supposed to call the legislature for a Special Session this month. They plan on a very short, one-day session to pass a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill to give bonuses to healthcare workers and others for their work in 2020. At the same time, those frontline workers are about to lose their job because they don't want to take an experimental vaccine. That's not right. We MUST tie these two things together. I need you to DEMAND that your state representative and state senator do not agree to sign the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it includes the Rep Erik Mortensen's with it. This is the one shot we have at NULLIFYING BIDEN'S ORDERS!!! Rep Erik Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment would make Biden's order unenforceable in Minnesota. We MUST get this passed! Politicians fear masses of people who demand action on a specific item. They know if they fail the masses, they won't likely get re-elected. That's why you have power. Demand that your state representative and state senator that they will not vote for the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it has the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it. | "FIND MY REP & SENATOR" Sample Script Dear ____, do not agree to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill in the upcoming Special Session until you protect health care workers' jobs by adding the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment to it. Rep Erik Mortensen's Amendment would nullify Biden's unconstitutional mandates. Show you are on our side by signing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge at this link: . Alternate Script Dear ______, there is no issue more important that protecting our health rights and privacy. That's why I want you to pledge to us that you will not support the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it. Rep Erik Mortensen's Amendment would nullify Biden's newly announced vaccine mandates in Minnesota. We expect you to sign this or we will make sure all your voters know that you wouldn't stand up for health freedom. Here's the pledge: If you have a Republican representative or senator, they will likely tell you this isn't possible because Democrats won't vote for it. But that's B.S.! We were able to End Walz' Emergency Powers in June despite a Democrat Majority in the House and Walz in the Governor's mansion. Politicians MUST do what you ask of them when you stay focused on the action. There's only one way we can End Biden and Walz' vaccine mandates right now, and it's by passing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment in the Special Session. Peter, I can't thank you enough for putting pressure on these legislators. It WILL make a difference. If you haven't signed our Stop Vaccine Mandates petition yet, please add your signature on it. And send it to friends and family. Make sure to visit every day as we keep you updated on this battle. In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

Fellow patriot

**We’re writing to today to put a few things into perspective for you as the Senate prepares to come back to D.C. next week.**

Despite having the narrowest majority in more than two decades, Senate Democrats, **led by Mr. Socialism himself, Bernie Sanders** , are attempting to push through a new round of multi-trillion-dollar spending (**$5.5 trillion is said to be the true cost**) that would ensure the federal government is present from the birth to death of every American.

If you think that the heavy-hand of government during the COVID-19 pandemic has been oppressive, just imagine a continuance of the same for the rest of your life if Bernie’s bill passes the Senate.

Democrats say that they’d fund this bill by taxing Billionaires. The only thing is that there are just 700 of them in the U.S. Eventually, there won’t be any billionaires left to tax and then who do you think is going to pick up the tab? The middle class.

Folks, this is why there is no more important task right now than taking power away from Senate Democrats. They’re going to bankrupt every one of us.

**[Today and every day through September 30th we need to raise $20k from donors such as yourself if we’re going to hit our end-of-quarter goal. Can we count on you to chip in $4 or more right now to make sure we hit our goal by midnight tonight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95aa7fb3ba6b47279cb6449d2869f310&_e=OGZXrv_kTaduBkGI8SXBj3SRZpVpU42YCC7JpSPUHdye9R4eYrpA8W8Cn9JnIUzUBhGr0E1wsSrIwB55GbeQkEpcbMMHV1nYJ-OXL_x0IoGCKX-1d2caxTwjp8mO2_rxpgnupsVxIuUlhwttUnWywP_vgSaXKRw6h9CrCyoRyVYKhohE_VzvJ-Ed9ZE7Gww6Eiironqh6NVeIhehejpQzWvkDxDkb3sn9LCcnFrWLch7aTkYn7JlfH9EMEO5NIePblICkD7S1TZF_sxT-YPU5aifY-OD2gw-eVfUgPvIw5VNKjWI1Qu0w7ghcerCBpnDB7lmnPjBSMUeUyCKi-LShIyGfqz6Lztz62JPcYljfdxWW7xTSCGTbLFxNH-d340LUC-jMBjV4vTMdxK8C0YiLx284SvL7uaTAZDqQV10XF_sk2vRiF__SR6wSM5wSqgbEe7tluf6s589trv05DZnkg%3D%3D)**

| [**STOP THE DEM BANKRUPTCY MACHINE
CHIP IN $4**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95aa7fb3ba6b47279cb6449d2869f310&_e=OGZXrv_kTaduBkGI8SXBj3SRZpVpU42YCC7JpSPUHdye9R4eYrpA8W8Cn9JnIUzUBhGr0E1wsSrIwB55GbeQkEpcbMMHV1nYJ-OXL_x0IoGCKX-1d2caxTwjp8mO2_rxpgnupsVxIuUlhwttUnWywP_vgSaXKRw6h9CrCyoRyVYKhohE_VzvJ-Ed9ZE7Gww6Eiironqh6NVeIhehejpQzWvkDxDkb3sn9LCcnFrWLch7aTkYn7JlfH9EMEO5NIePhcp75nJjnM4MmU92V6KqgSN6hPn1yVGLaybD928BBzvVBX5f-fKaBJcZUhutb7f96pWlyplmUuR404GFYY5Ebtlcv9ALX96S3CU0b2TH_4XTAH0DEdpKKOxtnXc9lazr56iU792eaCrEkF1BIoR6SkhPtGIU3ohJhljgEZjKTo1Bf5oWiu-7FgHEzPPxJ29wIzcDvLBpPTwGGn90XpfZBA%3D%3D)
---

We can't get the job done without your immediate help. They aren’t going to let go of their immense power without putting up a fight.

Democrats may not pass the bill this year or next, but make no mistake, they are playing the long game. Before Biden leaves the White House, passing legislation would turn the United States into a socialist nanny state is their only goal.

**[We need your immediate help to stop this. Please consider a contribution of $4 or more right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=95aa7fb3ba6b47279cb6449d2869f310&_e=OGZXrv_kTaduBkGI8SXBj3SRZpVpU42YCC7JpSPUHdye9R4eYrpA8W8Cn9JnIUzUBhGr0E1wsSrIwB55GbeQkEpcbMMHV1nYJ-OXL_x0IoGCKX-1d2caxTwjp8mO2_rxpgnupsVxIuUlhwttUnWywP_vgSaXKRw6h9CrCyoRyVYKhohE_VzvJ-Ed9ZE7Gww6Eiironqh6NVeIhehejpQzWvkDxDkb3sn9LCcnFrWLch7aTkYn7JlfH9EMEO5NIePgTZhX8zoUNOpCEF1LGu8Gi6uu3GFhZdNIQdM0X48YsWUcIyIoXh3pydQw9mK9IXQ3_VC6r45hAKdAfHYFZK6cDY2gZg1g1rOZrFtyZkhoiPBPR73V6-jgtZ8MIykQf0zPYpxefVBKlUVr6J40j7lTfV5bS43ZJGJUXRlvVrUkiTZbEKEb3u81L0F1CwRKoBi_KRWDjsIPGO3pv7i470bdw%3D%3D)**

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. [Congrats! You're only [1] of [10] Democrats selected from Pennsylvania to complete our EXCLUSIVE Ruth Bader Ginsburg Legacy Survey →]() | Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a fierce advocate for reproductive rights AND she devoted her career to ensure women’s equality under the law. The Supreme Court is threatening to undo all of her hard work! Just last week, the ultra-conservative Supreme Court voted to uphold one of the strictest abortion laws in the country in Texas -- threatening reproductive healthcare everywhere! | Thanks for your response, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: Not in Minnesota, Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_minnesota_joe_biden&n=1) Peter, America is becoming hard to recognize these days. From lockdowns and closure of businesses, to government mandates, we seem to have forgotten the freedoms that serve as the cornerstone of our Constitutional Republic. **But probably the most egregious thing I’ve seen since all of this began, is that the President of the United States is going to use the federal executive branch to force people to get vaccines they do not want.** Studies show that natural immunity is up to 13 times more effective than the Pfizer vaccination. Yet Biden and Walz don’t care that hard-won natural immunity is superior to vaccinated immunity. Their Health Departments continue to bizarrely encourage the recovered to receive the vaccine. mRNA vaccines are a new technology, so it’s understandable and rational for many people to be hesitant. There are no studies that show the long term safety of the vaccine. And when you consider the fact that getting the vaccine does not actually stop a person from getting COVID or spreading it, Biden and Walz’ strong-arming looks quite suspicious. We should never have gotten to this point where the federal government can infringe on the health freedom of Minnesotans. And that’s because we’ve had career politicians in charge, who care more about attending parties and their re-election, than rolling up their sleeves to protect your freedoms. That’s why I’m different from the other candidates in this race. I’ve got a great day job that doesn’t involve trading away your freedoms to the government. Instead, I have built a successful private practice, helping thousands of patients improve their lives. As much as I would love to continue building the practice and spending time with my family every evening, it’s quite clear that an outsider is needed in the Governor’s Mansion to stand up to the attacks on your freedom. **If we keep relying on career politicians to solve these issues, but expect different results, nothing will ever change! And we can’t afford that anymore. We’re losing our freedoms faster than ever.** The Minnesota legislature needs to pass a bill immediately to Stop Vaccine Mandates imposed by Joe Biden and Tim Walz. When they meet for a Special Session this month, this should be the TOP priority. As Governor, I would sign that bill in a heartbeat! Your health freedom and your health privacy will be my TOP priority as Governor. It’s too bad we can’t hold the election tomorrow. We need to FIRE WALZ ASAP. He has been a massive failure as governor and will only cause more damage to our state. In order to help fight this battle in the short term, I’m going to use this campaign to get the message of health freedom out to more Minnesotans. We’ll continue attending these huge medical freedom rallies and talking to the media so people hear from a doctor who thinks for himself, and doesn’t just regurgitate the “approved” talking points.
But we also have a long term plan that will end in removing Tim Walz once and for all. **If you want to be part of our team, we’re growing by the day and can use[more volunteers](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rHIMENRQT5AKoWG-e4wjsE6PmOi69xTq33Skw-UbFh4z&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_minnesota_joe_biden&n=2). I’m also not funded by lobbyists and special interests like the career politician candidates, so [donations of $25, $50 or $100 goes a long way to helping us build the momentum to FIRE TIM WALZ](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_minnesota_joe_biden&n=3)!** **Thank you!** **** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_minnesota_joe_biden&n=4) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_minnesota_joe_biden&n=5). -=-=-

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Carey?=
subject: Mike Carey Statement on Biden Business Vaccine Overreach
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/mikecareystatementbidenoverreach?e=f89184af42)
---
| | |
---
| | | September 9, 2021
**OH-15 Candidate Mike Carey Statement on Biden's Business Vaccine Overreach**
_Columbus_ \- Mike Carey released the following statement regarding President Biden's announcement that he will direct the Department of Labor to require employers to mandate employee vaccinations or weekly testing.

"President Biden just put his foot on the necks of small businesses that were beaten down by this pandemic and are still struggling to find employees. Forcing businesses to mandate vaccines and testing is a blatant government overreach that should be immediately struck down.

I chose to get the COVID-19 vaccine and I encourage everyone to talk to their doctor and make the best health decision for themselves and their family. However, I am against the government mandating it, just as I am against the government mandating business decisions." ### Contact
Blaine Kelly

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | September 9, 2021 OH-15 Candidate Mike Carey Statement on Biden's Business Vaccine Overreach Columbus \- Mike Carey released the following statement regarding President Biden's announcement that he will direct the Department of Labor to require employers to mandate employee vaccinations or weekly testing. "President Biden just put his foot on the necks of small businesses that were beaten down by this pandemic and are still struggling to find employees. Forcing businesses to mandate vaccines and testing is a blatant government overreach that should be immediately struck down. I chose to get the COVID-19 vaccine and I encourage everyone to talk to their doctor and make the best health decision for themselves and their family. However, I am against the government mandating it, just as I am against the government mandating business decisions." ### Contact Blaine Kelly blaine@careyforcongress.com 614-517-7440 | | | | | | | | | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? Despite having the narrowest majority in more than two decades, Senate Democrats, led by Mr. Socialism himself, Bernie Sanders , are attempting to push through a new round of multi-trillion-dollar spending ($5.5 trillion is said to be the true cost) that would ensure the federal government is present from the birth to death of every American. If you think that the heavy-hand of government during the COVID-19 pandemic has been oppressive, just imagine a continuance of the same for the rest of your life if Bernie’s bill passes the Senate. Democrats say that they’d fund this bill by taxing Billionaires. The only thing is that there are just 700 of them in the U.S. Eventually, there won’t be any billionaires left to tax and then who do you think is going to pick up the tab? The middle class. Folks, this is why there is no more important task right now than taking power away from Senate Democrats. They’re going to bankrupt every one of us. | We can't get the job done without your immediate help. They aren’t going to let go of their immense power without putting up a fight. Democrats may not pass the bill this year or next, but make no mistake, they are playing the long game. Before Biden leaves the White House, passing legislation would turn the United States into a socialist nanny state is their only goal. Harriet is a fourth-generation daughter of Wyoming, a very successful attorney, and has the support and respect of a truly great U.S. Senator, Wyoming’s own Cynthia Lummis. Harriet Hageman adores the Great State of Wyoming, is strong on Crime and Borders, powerfully supports the Second Amendment, loves our Military and our Vets, and will fight for Election Integrity and Energy Independence (which Biden has already given up). name: Culp for Congress
subject: What "We the People" can do...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGL2h3&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJyxIgR&)_
---
| | |
---
| | **People ask me, "What can I do?" I have some suggestions below.**
---
| | ** ****My first suggestion is to read the United States Constitution and the Declaration of Independence.**
How can we know our rights have been violated if we don't have a studied understanding of our laws and how our Constitutional Republic is structured?I carry a pocket constitution with me and always find it helpful to read over the words of our founders.** ** **Write and call your elected officials.**
They need to hear from you. I don't care if your elected officials are a Democrat, a RINO, or a true country**-** loving American, your voice needs to be heard. Throughout history, it has been proven that if people bond together and demand to be heard, change happens. We must bombard these leaders with our voice and remind them "we the people" are in charge.
Contact your local legislators [_here_](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKu7jp&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9Moh3o&), contact your Congressman or Congresswoman, [_here,_](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKu75W&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyLJwzG&) and contact your Senators, [_here._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKu7kA&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EySeCie&)

**Become a PCO and get involved on your local GOP.**
I've talked on this before but I feel it needs to be repeated. A PCO is a very important position in our local communities and a way to create positive change and to push the "America First" agenda and take back our country. Learn more about being a PCO [_here._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKu7u8&mc=J8&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EE7xIsz&)** **
---
|
---
**I know we are angry and frustrated and we have a right to be.**
We can and we will protect this nation from the onslaught of the radical leftist Democrat agenda and the RINO's like Dan Newhouse who help them if we work together.
**I was angry and so I did something about it.**
That's why I ran for Governor of Washington State, and that's why I'm running for Congress now. To serve our country that is the greatest nation the world has ever known. _You can do the same thing._ Run for an elected position against a RINO, or a Democrat. Use any of the steps above, and we can help America. I could not be on this journey to be a United States Congressman without your support, and I will _always_ have your back.
Honored to serve.
**_Let's take a stand._**
Loren

But Joe Biden is forcing you to pick: **GET THE JA B**... **or** **LOSE YOUR JOB,** with your **RIGHTS** nowhere to be found! name: Kevin Hern
subject: This isn’t infrastructure, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
The Democrats are lying about this bill.Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b643790923181887/6280047412fcf6a0c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, As I write this email, the Democrats’ so-called “infrastructure” bill is up for a vote in the House Ways and Means Committee. And as a member of Ways and Means, I will have no choice but to vote “NO” on this fake infrastructure plan. **Let’s get one thing straight - this bill isn't about infrastructure.****It’s a $3.5 trillion government boondoggle that throws money at countless pet projects without making a serious effort to repair our crumbling roads and bridges. ** [**Tap or click here to chip in $5 or more to help FIGHT BACK against this far-left proposal >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b643790923181887/cbb718874cb0155dc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, there’s no doubt our infrastructure has real problems – both in Oklahoma and across the country. And I would proudly support a fiscally responsible plan to fund needed repairs. But I cannot vote “YES” on this budget-busting bill that will explode our national debt and mortgage our children and grandchildren's future. And as long as I’m your Congressman, I’ll do everything in my power to stop the ultra-liberal Democrats’ Big Government policies before they destroy our country. clean_body: The Democrats are lying about this bill.Read more >> Peter, As I write this email, the Democrats’ so-called “infrastructure” bill is up for a vote in the House Ways and Means Committee. And as a member of Ways and Means, I will have no choice but to vote “NO” on this fake infrastructure plan. Let’s get one thing straight - this bill isn't about infrastructure.It’s a $3.5 trillion government boondoggle that throws money at countless pet projects without making a serious effort to repair our crumbling roads and bridges. Peter, there’s no doubt our infrastructure has real problems – both in Oklahoma and across the country. And I would proudly support a fiscally responsible plan to fund needed repairs. But I cannot vote “YES” on this budget-busting bill that will explode our national debt and mortgage our children and grandchildren's future. And as long as I’m your Congressman, I’ll do everything in my power to stop the ultra-liberal Democrats’ Big Government policies before they destroy our country. Sincerely, Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- Paid For By Hern For Congress id:2021-09-03-14:52:02:740t

| Fellow Patriot, Over my years working in the D.C. swamp, including as Acting Director of National Intelligence for the greatest President in history, Donald J. Trump, and his Ambassador to Germany, I received some important advice: **_" Judge a man by the character of his enemies."_** And when it comes to Kash Patel, he has all the right enemies. As he writes in the email below, lead deep stater Adam "Shifty" Schiff recently launched an all-out assault on his character - where I'm honored to be name-dropped alongside him. **[The timing of Schiff's smear is extremely telling, as it comes as Kash is launching a historic first-of-its kind LEGAL OFFENSIVE TRUST against the fake news media.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zorbfdn17c2q88gktrli1ve2r11pder90uvrlbgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9jm1o73c9h2bs)** **After all, it was Kash who drafted the Nunes memo exposing just how fake the Russia investigation was.** And unlike most weak-kneed "investigations" coming out of Washington, Kash didn't pull any punches, and named names going all the way to the top, including corrupt officials like Hillary Clinton and James Comey. So Schiff's hatred is based on the fact that Kash is a patriot who isn't willing to sell out his country to the deep state. **[I consider Kash a good friend, and close ally in the fight for America First- and that's why I'm hoping you will help him continue that fight by chipping in to his LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against the fake news media.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo8r4lhrqjctfsj774vql5tucdt9got8smn9neag_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9jm1o73c9h2bs)** You can read more about his fight below. But just know that Kash is the man, and a true patriot we can count on. Thank you! Richard Grenell

* * *

It comes just as I am launching my new [LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg6iu3r3kjjfqcn3dq5sbibhlev9nf2g1k4h501o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9jm1o73c9h2bs) to take on the fake news media, who anti-America losers like Adam Schiff rely on to smear people like me. With Adam Schiff being this angry with me, I know that I'm right on target, and the only thing to do now is double-down. But to do that I need the support of American patriots, thousands of which have already stepped up. **[So can I count on you to make a generous contribution to my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against he fake news media?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zic7gnlq2tm41tglq82d557nno5ut0ndqto4q708_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9jm1o73c9h2bs)** | | | | [Chip in $25](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znptskac881cuvdsij4id31srdrhokquf6hkhplg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9jm1o73c9h2bs)

name: Mark Walker
subject: President Biden: Break my rules, be prepared to pay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/f6974af6bb647666c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter,
In December of 2020, President Biden unequivocally opposed vaccine mandates. He went as far as to say _“I don’t think it should be mandatory, I wouldn’t demand it be mandatory”_. But one-party Democrat rule in our country has given him free rein to reverse major policy positions completely unchecked. Does he not remember that just 9 months ago he said he was against mandates? Yesterday, the President announced a new wave of COVID-19 mandates being dropped on the American public – a large portion of them being levied on our small businesses, further stagnating our economic recovery and trampling our Constitution for everyday Americans. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/3eeb189163a618bfc3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**HOLD PRESIDENT BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE - DONATE NOW!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/1900bfe1aefbd5d6c3d6b838967d376c/35903) This shouldn’t come as a surprise. President Biden has had a historically bad start to his presidency and needs someone to take it out on. The unfortunate truth is that he’s chosen the American people to feel the force of this frustration.
**He’s been humiliated on a global stage with the Afghanistan withdrawal and he’s upset that his socialistic policies have continued to drag down our economy. Now he’s targeting 80 million Americans with his recent vaccine mandate to instill more government control over your right to choose what's best for you and your family.** This stark reversal in policy proves that he is only in this fight for political gain. Instead of uniting Americans against COVID-19, President Biden is further dividing us to push his radical agenda.
Enough is enough, Peter. Our country needs a Conservative with a backbone who will stand for what’s RIGHT, and who will DEFEND our freedoms and liberties above all else.
Help me hold President Biden accountable by sending me to the U.S. Senate. [_**Please rush a contribution right now of $5, $10, $50, $100 or more to put us one step closer to protecting our rights as Americans**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/3b2bedfb075a0d3dc3d6b838967d376c/35903).
For America,
Mark Walker | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/1d8ba9a5a50b443bc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/b908ca91be58d80ac3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/892d122e0bf45e12c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/395833f5ab8abf1ec3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/3189b5b6175367e6/4f32735577184d07c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f50afa8177b4041aed9f9a494efb67e&_e=dJ8ck0UMPcHQUZaGI3fS-JHSlGB4OjMFG_h6-Q6rY85ewZ4RhyIiRr7Dd77kKbI_KjF_ty_ADvHX9uny1FOBQ8AI3UYX18H6qCNfxpLk0k0-9OvP_UGcO4EoGHQNFXaj8Fec3J_rSifxc5wEj_XZr6_xfgJ4apClQnEvypWmWdkePLo8Eiz3pQZbqgNexth4w3nfu7pYmFyH-fZJmPy9rsIp-xL2pRmmFFntfoLsP-PHe0GSP5Ka5_h0AsNKFfg9me6YbmLvYBbqGgrhj8wMbNnd4q2BpYbwBJISKmLlW6tWZHDh-dHPwwmWlpAhsyG4WlfoHuQFof8Iggx6VomWvAWPir82sE4hUIogOKGL2M9tsza_3jc375L3sHippj4x6W03Cv4h9HG8aNw8AfxvZQVbNIaj072tQCQ-FUC7q6P1hq--PFXQRxjolcU-JG7XOXBtU5oUXB9UGxps21zyZtDHM62COqIIT1ECFYD90vQ%3D)

Fellow Conservative- Do you want a better tomorrow?

I know this might sound like an odd question, but I’m asking because so much of our society is so preoccupied with the “here and now” that they’re forgetting about tomorrow. Future generations are relying on our actions today to decided what the land of the free will look like when they come of age.

**I’m James Tarantin, and I want a better tomorrow. I want a better tomorrow for my two sons. I want a better tomorrow for you and your family, especially one where you’re not harassed for being Republican. I want a better tomorrow for our nation, not a future polluted by job loss, crime, and woke politics telling us we’re not good people if we believe in being one nation under God.**

[**I want to heal this nation, but we can’t do that when we have extreme liberals and career politicians telling us we live in a nation that’s not worth healing.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f50afa8177b4041aed9f9a494efb67e&_e=dJ8ck0UMPcHQUZaGI3fS-JHSlGB4OjMFG_h6-Q6rY85ewZ4RhyIiRr7Dd77kKbI_KjF_ty_ADvHX9uny1FOBQ8AI3UYX18H6qCNfxpLk0k0-9OvP_UGcO4EoGHQNFXaj8Fec3J_rSifxc5wEj_XZr6_xfgJ4apClQnEvypWmWdkePLo8Eiz3pQZbqgNexth4w3nfu7pYmFyH-fZJmPy9rsIp-xL2pRmmFFntfoLsP-PHe0GSP5Ka5_h0AsNKFfg9me6YbmLvYBbqGgrhj8wMbJGyMiXlCNmMqYtAwue_paCcGWiBvUVeMYJzt3c_DHw_y79np7WIPQwEfBoxwCAnXjA-tGPZNxA9vrPhlkhx4IfQVT-YXkvxi6HaPMvZYML5Q6CjAkhQ4028mv__gl1Acz2obJ5IB6BgigZGr_OkUnejxs1U2Kyde15JjgP7lyx9-qiKxY9BiXiUqMKjH61oWoCZGJ29JDFr8_yrPSo9KJE%3D)
**Our America is not racist, our America does not hate immigrants, and our America stands up for all people regardless of income or where you’re from.** I know because I’m an immigrant who came to this nation alone, without any family, and unafraid because __this is America, the land of opportunity.__

Not a single person can tell me America isn’t the greatest nation when someone like me was able to become a citizen, a business owner, and to create my own American dream just by working hard to succeed. **If I can do it, then anyone can**.

**For too long, extreme liberals have used tactics of fear to convince people that our America isn’t the land of the free when we both know that’s a lie.** The future of America is free and full of opportunity, but we cannot get there if we continue to let career politicians and extreme liberals burn down our futures in order to benefit themselves.

[**I want to heal this nation from the inside out, but to guarantee a better tomorrow we must retire these politicians who are out of touch with the hardworking Americans that run this nation.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f50afa8177b4041aed9f9a494efb67e&_e=dJ8ck0UMPcHQUZaGI3fS-JHSlGB4OjMFG_h6-Q6rY85ewZ4RhyIiRr7Dd77kKbI_KjF_ty_ADvHX9uny1FOBQ8AI3UYX18H6qCNfxpLk0k0-9OvP_UGcO4EoGHQNFXaj8Fec3J_rSifxc5wEj_XZr6_xfgJ4apClQnEvypWmWdkePLo8Eiz3pQZbqgNexth4w3nfu7pYmFyH-fZJmPy9rsIp-xL2pRmmFFntfoLsP-PHe0GSP5Ka5_h0AsNKFfg9me6YbmLvYBbqGgrhj8wMbHJZaevlYHpiU-NthuGt25qR9XvX59CwmfwYRu4e35YYY-nejZEom624PqXRtdF8sby3WDSRaEFrQUaeoBhlYunU-QKfY6NGgYnp_8ZhXJ3DsBH7N38elALdi13awEf36w8Wli8iv-R6CiD1peSiRrqsNDftefnsUhn59m07fKxzIpO70q3_ujWJXP1QoiK2yZfnY5zr0WISr4uGc_X6uLw%3D)

I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland because the extreme liberals currently elected care more about being politicians than uplifting America. [**Will you help me unseat a 30-year career politician so we can finally get our nation back on track?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f50afa8177b4041aed9f9a494efb67e&_e=dJ8ck0UMPcHQUZaGI3fS-JHSlGB4OjMFG_h6-Q6rY85ewZ4RhyIiRr7Dd77kKbI_KjF_ty_ADvHX9uny1FOBQ8AI3UYX18H6qCNfxpLk0k0-9OvP_UGcO4EoGHQNFXaj8Fec3J_rSifxc5wEj_XZr6_xfgJ4apClQnEvypWmWdkePLo8Eiz3pQZbqgNexth4w3nfu7pYmFyH-fZJmPy9rsIp-xL2pRmmFFntfoLsP-PHe0GSP5Ka5_h0AsNKFfg9me6YbmLvYBbqGgrhj8wMbDG9Y3Xr1X2fXEmtkY465AZb-6V6OZP-s4hvUnMA1_wKscFGWE1cpJ6mv8Us4RMvubBKdJfU5hRlVNpifhuqQ-MpSSzWZulrFuJQBk6xsARsm9FKUsUwMLfO8ITJtGMvlBSD6ZDcuX3TYj3P_ltpqg3soQ9S8ojxXmHt9aDtj2tqemQE-GIyVwNCr6vN6LlWUS3lemjJZ06zPrdpA4SHwLE%3D)

We are only as strong as those we surround ourselves with and [**I need you on my team Fellow Conservative**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f50afa8177b4041aed9f9a494efb67e&_e=dJ8ck0UMPcHQUZaGI3fS-JHSlGB4OjMFG_h6-Q6rY85ewZ4RhyIiRr7Dd77kKbI_KjF_ty_ADvHX9uny1FOBQ8AI3UYX18H6qCNfxpLk0k0-9OvP_UGcO4EoGHQNFXaj8Fec3J_rSifxc5wEj_XZr6_xfgJ4apClQnEvypWmWdkePLo8Eiz3pQZbqgNexth4w3nfu7pYmFyH-fZJmPy9rsIp-xL2pRmmFFntfoLsP-PHe0GSP5Ka5_h0AsNKFfg9me6YbmLvYBbqGgrhj8wMbIGU7xx_W6qWkl2fv588YqivHWLEk7d0c1s34nOpcTRip2MqqHz4apMxFuJr39isBOhMIt3ii1bl_KudfYhI8aQSfgYT8CwAsgpx6NV5inc7FqEWQjRL66s2qK86Bj1ux24xYKVSTbwx5kgR9wEp-gPWcKboB0mBlGliwga_741iSrAoOqAiy0mNgjeKy8YSwAM10LnBPoMIG89qIn6M8jE%3D), because I need Republicans with determination and good hearts to fight for America, to heal America, and to stop extreme liberals from dismantling our future just for political gain.

**We cannot allow America to be consumed by joblessness, crime, and self-destruction at the hands of those in our nation’s capital who are ashamed of the America we know and love.** Help me fight for free speech, school choice, our houses of worship, and for a free America. I’m a Republican because I know even if I had nothing, I’d be better off in the land of the free than anywhere else in the world.

[**Join me in this fight for our nation so we can ensure a better tomorrow for the nation we love. Together we can do this.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f50afa8177b4041aed9f9a494efb67e&_e=dJ8ck0UMPcHQUZaGI3fS-JHSlGB4OjMFG_h6-Q6rY85ewZ4RhyIiRr7Dd77kKbI_KjF_ty_ADvHX9uny1FOBQ8AI3UYX18H6qCNfxpLk0k0-9OvP_UGcO4EoGHQNFXaj8Fec3J_rSifxc5wEj_XZr6_xfgJ4apClQnEvypWmWdkePLo8Eiz3pQZbqgNexth4w3nfu7pYmFyH-fZJmPy9rsIp-xL2pRmmFFntfoLsP-PHe0GSP5Ka5_h0AsNKFfg9me6YbmLvYBbqGgrhj8wMbEzNAdlIBdcHY-XWSaCuVLuiZhnkVtAjucPtPq8ttgQpHMTmiIvekZJx5CLJazt6xuMyQt_cwcLaFSYXLzwPZyObbBPGpe05GOHVooRTj5Ux9lYCRIVV96Oc0cex0hysyjgJfmBXyCalAVvcxWSn116zVCgVGj57ifoE6fVuv8CSW8nH7TCQ6AjDnRNu2Fchm-q4tzAOGplHwzkPXqQ2WTg%3D)

Together we can do this.

Friends,
On behalf of Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization (Be The Solution), we would like to thank all of our volunteers who have helped to support our senior phone banking events to ensure that our low-income seniors are not left behind. We would also like to extend our special thanks to those individuals who signed up to help rebuild 85 year-old Mr. Brown's home. We are so grateful for the outpouring of support for our seniors!
REGISTER TODAY: The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference is Back!
As promised, The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference is back! This year, we will host both a virtual and tele-townhall event on Thursday, October 14th from 10am - 1:30pm for our seniors to ensure that they are able to thrive in this season in their lives. We will host inspirational speakers and informative classes. Due to pandemic safety considerations, we will NOT host an in person event this year, but will supply the first 250 seniors to register with lunch, a t-shirt and more! To learn more about this year's event, click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CFSTycKXkiE6LAoCViwQB2olgHnJOsgxkYOEJuKt7EqV8Z3uPuGeOgJahQVfxBQzwvX0V7Cchek31-5UTaTc_lf4kGfhUGJjSNdG9N6REXqAD0JYAvbt79MEFMbLlX5LrziLzGtGqB6miYpbM_ObTGINaKhpZDma9ZSq0B4PyUE=&c=VFnDTd1TXH-HgiSEVft3G9xjW2uXjsRNqWv__C92B3xVTVf67hWhpw==&ch=yLSX3ZBG85HMipRTTG2GAfMrUunc1YBe8rQAXDIIR2BN9doLUj8PqA==). Registration is open until September 17th so please do not miss your chance to attend this one-stop-shop for seniors!
VOLUNTEERS NEEDED!
We need volunteers to assist with distributing Senior Conference goodie bags to our seniors during the week of the conference. Please sign up to volunteer, by clicking [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CFSTycKXkiE6LAoCViwQB2olgHnJOsgxkYOEJuKt7EqV8Z3uPuGeOm6wqRkB2W5t6vj1c2bpVpbbhK3YQ3oHmiL8zdewjjQo3bG0IT_2vdeawCR-Ip0uovE919QWLNdiSsyjt_qOHvzWJ-zrtLgGFEq_0Q83vB7tlw_Sxr28VcKz_-CAeVumN3Fuxlc3i39mdfncNcDNtfU=&c=VFnDTd1TXH-HgiSEVft3G9xjW2uXjsRNqWv__C92B3xVTVf67hWhpw==&ch=yLSX3ZBG85HMipRTTG2GAfMrUunc1YBe8rQAXDIIR2BN9doLUj8PqA==).

| Dear Friends,
---
| It hurts to say but the America we once knew and loved is being torn down from the inside.
What was once a bustling nation with prosperous growth, citizens who wanted to work, a leader who brought peace to the middle east and low inflation, is now becoming a distant memory.
Right now our country has problems.

* Our small businesses are struggling to find workers
* Inflation is rising at record rates
* Citizens are refusing to work due to unemployment benefits
* Our southern border is wide open

---
| Our current "leaders" can continue to try to ignore the problems they created, but we must hold Patty Murray, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris accountable.
Tiffany Smiley won't ignore the problems that D.C. politicians created, she will fight to solve them with common sense solutions. No more closed-door deals, no more super-pac influence. She wants what is best for the people of Washington.
Tiffany is the leader we need, and a leader the people of Washington DESERVE.
Join us in helping elect Tiffany Smiley to the Senate by donating TODAY!
---

name: Karen Bass
subject: about the California recall election (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
I need your help, team.

We only have four more days to stop conservatives from recalling Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom and replacing him with a far-right Republican. And right now, the national GOP is spending hand over fist to make this sham recall a reality.

**[We can't let the GOP take control of our state. Not after what we've seen in Texas. And not in the middle of a global pandemic. Will you split a donation between Governor Newsom and my campaign to support the "NO" campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/oPyfgJJEfzOvhV6ePpnx4LFgSSlcTFi4AYIqOQnuOnI=/i1lAofdgwvW7N5KdXyJ466Wee54GjcUvV8vhFsnifyE=?gpsid=39_132_20396&refcode=em21_210910_news_fnd_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210910_news_fnd_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Fringe characters and right-wingers have put themselves on the ballot to defeat Governor Newsom. If the GOP gets their way, we'll wind up with a governor who doesn't believe in science or the real impacts of the climate crisis. Californians deserve better!

I am AGAINST the recall, and I'm teaming up with Californians across the state, including my colleague Rep. Barbara Lee, to stop the Republican recall election. Recalling the governor would threaten progress in our state and set California back. I need to know you're with me in this fight.

**[Can I count on you to split a donation of $5, $10, or whatever you can afford, to help Governor Newsom fight back against this costly recall? Chip in now to support his and my Democratic campaigns»](https://act.myngp.com/el/oPyfgJJEfzOvhV6ePpnx4LFgSSlcTFi4AYIqOQnuOnI=/i1lAofdgwvW7N5KdXyJ466Wee54GjcUvV8vhFsnifyE=?gpsid=39_132_20396&refcode=em21_210910_news_fnd_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210910_news_fnd_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Governor Newsom has always boldly represented the progressive values a majority of Californians believe in. I won't stop fighting to stop the recall until polls close next Tuesday.

In solidarity,

Karen Bass

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/oPyfgJJEfzOvhV6ePpnx4LFgSSlcTFi4AYIqOQnuOnI=/i1lAofdgwvW7N5KdXyJ466Wee54GjcUvV8vhFsnifyE=?gpsid=39_132_20396&refcode=em21_210910_news_fnd_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210910_news_fnd_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Washington, DC 20003 United States

| Peter -
Joe Biden just issued a nationwide vaccine mandate, telling virtually every American business that they must force their employees to get the vaccine or face serious fines - $14,000 PER EMPLOYEE WHO IS NOT VACCINATED.

name: James Tarantin
subject: Our America stands for all people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
A better tomorrow is what we all seek, but we cannot get there if career politicians only want to pull us down. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=665e6f32ba1b4d9487ac2884b85526d0&_e=VVDB7AINTCtyief0euMTVJTL6qADqBzIAfemDFVFoHauUE85jp7mpjuXFmoETlyM97jGyVRsEeCIsVYvEfSXIxk-dIrNWsfcVpH1IJnSH5GzrAsvKrpi7xPE51dBAqKZ-3fyPKIGz4whYKdvvfrrLl3e2-sF7KHGYeBS1hitAluDBqNEv5NoRIfcF--Lo1Din1zsdJM1CVaTlzwWfddD_tR97Op2Knmx-WA2nDQQYbbDZb8uteSzdzl5TDGC89ng7eBW75fst_cajMxumlAczusTN0te0MKLTEnFGvqox-xbQUJraMidCpRoUqTVTxJbWfWepSY-04gWBvcwWUS3EDtS78S_Bf2Lc8XnCW0lS-sZ9LQ3W6oxlqlUEHQVFCJF50Y1SozmtBJp039JdohVwRO87J4LSwq6bVSeHy-0NkKkha9ei_oC126eaO3xblqTxdkSErVwuuojYhRM4cTi4OYPob2O7MdNkhzHD1aaFrQ%3D)

---
Peter- Do you want a better tomorrow?

I know this might sound like an odd question, but I’m asking because so much of our society is so preoccupied with the “here and now” that they’re forgetting about tomorrow. Future generations are relying on our actions today to decided what the land of the free will look like when they come of age.

**I’m James Tarantin, and I want a better tomorrow. I want a better tomorrow for my two sons. I want a better tomorrow for you and your family, especially one where you’re not harassed for being Republican. I want a better tomorrow for our nation, not a future polluted by job loss, crime, and woke politics telling us we’re not good people if we believe in being one nation under God.**

[**I want to heal this nation, but we can’t do that when we have extreme liberals and career politicians telling us we live in a nation that’s not worth healing.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=665e6f32ba1b4d9487ac2884b85526d0&_e=VVDB7AINTCtyief0euMTVJTL6qADqBzIAfemDFVFoHauUE85jp7mpjuXFmoETlyM97jGyVRsEeCIsVYvEfSXIxk-dIrNWsfcVpH1IJnSH5GzrAsvKrpi7xPE51dBAqKZ-3fyPKIGz4whYKdvvfrrLl3e2-sF7KHGYeBS1hitAluDBqNEv5NoRIfcF--Lo1Din1zsdJM1CVaTlzwWfddD_tR97Op2Knmx-WA2nDQQYbbDZb8uteSzdzl5TDGC89ng7eBW75fst_cajMxumlAczuDMdtOFCV6_H1OvXYW5Wtmkmveoj_IIKapzu8a7-CAhc_GwIyKRPh_GFwVvuTIiwyM9uMORcwsdJqm-Zt5plfc42Wxu0E9FVvvF-1l9Goi98bZB2Q4U6sRIoKanQIbq4bprpjOJnyHuSvDoSJKAKgLoaHpCCNgo5L9Zh5ZeBLIGSayqrMwEbbplEyeCk0xsWpzOKJYaY8FcFMb8vx3AvwU%3D)
**Our America is not racist, our America does not hate immigrants, and our America stands up for all people regardless of income or where you’re from.** I know because I’m an immigrant who came to this nation alone, without any family, and unafraid because __this is America, the land of opportunity.__

Not a single person can tell me America isn’t the greatest nation when someone like me was able to become a citizen, a business owner, and to create my own American dream just by working hard to succeed. **If I can do it, then anyone can**.

**For too long, extreme liberals have used tactics of fear to convince people that our America isn’t the land of the free when we both know that’s a lie.** The future of America is free and full of opportunity, but we cannot get there if we continue to let career politicians and extreme liberals burn down our futures in order to benefit themselves.

[**I want to heal this nation from the inside out, but to guarantee a better tomorrow we must retire these politicians who are out of touch with the hardworking Americans that run this nation.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=665e6f32ba1b4d9487ac2884b85526d0&_e=VVDB7AINTCtyief0euMTVJTL6qADqBzIAfemDFVFoHauUE85jp7mpjuXFmoETlyM97jGyVRsEeCIsVYvEfSXIxk-dIrNWsfcVpH1IJnSH5GzrAsvKrpi7xPE51dBAqKZ-3fyPKIGz4whYKdvvfrrLl3e2-sF7KHGYeBS1hitAluDBqNEv5NoRIfcF--Lo1Din1zsdJM1CVaTlzwWfddD_tR97Op2Knmx-WA2nDQQYbbDZb8uteSzdzl5TDGC89ng7eBW75fst_cajMxumlAczseiy8xZS6YL_t_TA7GETmzDq5nx7QBH239W461hyhU-zKT34YPfLcsZOffaP8y5rmG5nBK5EBhzOahzQIoBGXIA4RZp7vqHjTd5cJqw3qUgvFY4wE4YRHibFAw7FZizO0kj6z8OqhT7WEAEmyLuTAEJSgUoiBxoWGkqYzKcjDwkEMBRTeyz4fF3TAd4LTOU-tc85sG_6rDFSYlIY-VF3u0%3D)
[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=665e6f32ba1b4d9487ac2884b85526d0&_e=VVDB7AINTCtyief0euMTVJTL6qADqBzIAfemDFVFoHauUE85jp7mpjuXFmoETlyM97jGyVRsEeCIsVYvEfSXIxk-dIrNWsfcVpH1IJnSH5GzrAsvKrpi7xPE51dBAqKZ-3fyPKIGz4whYKdvvfrrLl3e2-sF7KHGYeBS1hitAluDBqNEv5NoRIfcF--Lo1Din1zsdJM1CVaTlzwWfddD_tR97Op2Knmx-WA2nDQQYbbDZb8uteSzdzl5TDGC89ng7eBW75fst_cajMxumlAczlQbbYoVXi93cxjVBqGxKa_SeZg40vPGuPw_zUitndwHgLZvqcY3b5uvm6DwbLyVvd1We2krcSk_OY2KxtqiptunRduJgTTgLNmVtpcZyUwQsWApJG8zDAyA_DTJUa_l1QTso1uewsq5gD-3xjzHT5OtdXq3IcrrwnktTgqlMi00GfaDNBKUSKKR3tQHdalWb41TC_ngYYFjFlREmhacpNk%3D) [** HELP GET AMERICA BACK ON TRACK **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=665e6f32ba1b4d9487ac2884b85526d0&_e=VVDB7AINTCtyief0euMTVJTL6qADqBzIAfemDFVFoHauUE85jp7mpjuXFmoETlyM97jGyVRsEeCIsVYvEfSXIxk-dIrNWsfcVpH1IJnSH5GzrAsvKrpi7xPE51dBAqKZ-3fyPKIGz4whYKdvvfrrLl3e2-sF7KHGYeBS1hitAluDBqNEv5NoRIfcF--Lo1Din1zsdJM1CVaTlzwWfddD_tR97Op2Knmx-WA2nDQQYbbDZb8uteSzdzl5TDGC89ng7eBW75fst_cajMxumlAczqf3KnCX9GcAIcjOMv5xg6Xty34Ea9srYBpOO1YgxT4wqqA0aipr3T8qIH8ep0TLRMdxLtd7nONIfSwmQfTJ4N8x-cBDsmyChmKyR7AF5CKI6ka4fhHPJynVAbWllxX5a0YO7YcwM4sqXRfVgYOho2_QzT3CjB-9gIlnacSc6nmtuQLEFZsfZxP_vo77O24HP9-vlcbvMCyWHc_RMYTkUx8%3D)
I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland because the extreme liberals currently elected care more about being politicians than uplifting America. clean_body: A better tomorrow is what we all seek, but we cannot get there if career politicians only want to pull us down. | Peter- Do you want a better tomorrow? I know this might sound like an odd question, but I’m asking because so much of our society is so preoccupied with the “here and now” that they’re forgetting about tomorrow. Future generations are relying on our actions today to decided what the land of the free will look like when they come of age. I’m James Tarantin, and I want a better tomorrow. I want a better tomorrow for my two sons. I want a better tomorrow for you and your family, especially one where you’re not harassed for being Republican. I want a better tomorrow for our nation, not a future polluted by job loss, crime, and woke politics telling us we’re not good people if we believe in being one nation under God. Our America is not racist, our America does not hate immigrants, and our America stands up for all people regardless of income or where you’re from. I know because I’m an immigrant who came to this nation alone, without any family, and unafraid because this is America, the land of opportunity. Not a single person can tell me America isn’t the greatest nation when someone like me was able to become a citizen, a business owner, and to create my own American dream just by working hard to succeed. If I can do it, then anyone can. For too long, extreme liberals have used tactics of fear to convince people that our America isn’t the land of the free when we both know that’s a lie. The future of America is free and full of opportunity, but we cannot get there if we continue to let career politicians and extreme liberals burn down our futures in order to benefit themselves. I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland because the extreme liberals currently elected care more about being politicians than uplifting America. We are only as strong as those we surround ourselves with and , because I need Republicans with determination and good hearts to fight for America, to heal America, and to stop extreme liberals from dismantling our future just for political gain. We cannot allow America to be consumed by joblessness, crime, and self-destruction at the hands of those in our nation’s capital who are ashamed of the America we know and love. Help me fight for free speech, school choice, our houses of worship, and for a free America. I’m a Republican because I know even if I had nothing, I’d be better off in the land of the free than anywhere else in the world. Together we can do this. | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Hi there, I’m Sydney, Charlie’s deputy campaign manager!

I couldn’t be more excited to be working on this campaign to elect a governor who will fight for **_all_ Floridians.** And part of the reason I love my job is that it allows me to have a hand in every area of the campaign, from communications to organizing to grassroots fundraising.

As you may have guessed, right now I’m emailing you about the grassroots fundraising part. I work closely with Evan, our Finance Director, and get regular updates from him on the progress we’re making toward our goals. **And so far in September, we aren't where we need to be.**

**[What we need from you today, friend, is a donation of just a few bucks (or more, if you’re able!) to help us get back where we need to be.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35535475/305374621/-1248256573?refcode=20210909_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTc0Y2IyNy01MDEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k4FN5qesSxO8haQFkdOSCgqybvtfA1LBiyZ2EEDgV4=)**

Operating a campaign comes with a lot of expenses, so if we’re going to beat Gov. DeSantis, **we need to keep up a steady flow of grassroots donations** in order to cover our costs. Here are just a few of the things your donations help us pay for:
* Contacting, registering, and mobilizing voters all over the state
* Keeping our ads on the air and on the internet to get Charlie’s message out
* Helping pay for office supplies and even buying pizza for volunteers
* ... and more!

Every single one of those bullet points is a critical part of a winning campaign. But every single one takes significant resources to do right -- and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us raise the money it’s going to take to get the job done.

**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to pitch in, friend, now is the time we need you. If you’re able, please make a donation of any amount you can right now to help us get back on track to reach our goal and defeat Gov. DeSantis:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35535582/305374904/624230061?refcode=RedistrictingPC.FR.09.09.21.&RedistrictingPC.FR.09.09.21.=RedistrictingPC.FR.09.09.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk4MzM1YS01MDEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Tpds_DY-6bNgPtU3OoWGZtbzZ4hhl0wdOqA7tzy8ho=) **Gerrymandering is a manipulative tool Indiana Republicans use to pick their voters. We joined forces with Hoosier voters in support of their goal to create an independent and nonpartisan redistricting process.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35535583/305374912/624230061?refcode=RedistrictingPC.FR.09.09.21.&RedistrictingPC.FR.09.09.21.=RedistrictingPC.FR.09.09.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk4MzM1YS01MDEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Tpds_DY-6bNgPtU3OoWGZtbzZ4hhl0wdOqA7tzy8ho=) _Created by thirdway.org_ **Since the beginning of the summer, Indiana Democrats have crisscrossed the state to share how the Party is delivering for Hoosier families. My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

clean_body: Will you join me? | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to beat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. Greene is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need $34 today. Let me tell you why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Peter,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301983:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301983:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301984:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, **[but I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301983:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)** The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. **[So, if you can, please consider a gift of $34 if you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301983:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)**

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301984:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)
The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.

I hope to hear from you soon.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58301983:6l1HsA2NS:m:1:3253819041:141007CFBC2668905F68C7171A2E076C:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. | Peter, Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart. I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys. For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend. In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. My opponent has amassed a war chest of over TEN MILLION DOLLARS. If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field. I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career. We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and actually build a better America for hard-working families. My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years. And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand. I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. I hope to hear from you soon. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. As important as the money is, I also want to know you're with me. | | It’s crunch time, Derek.

Early voting begins just **ONE WEEK** from today and, according to a poll released last week, the Virginia governor’s race is truly a coin flip.

We urgently need your help to win. Here’s why:

Glenn Youngkin has vowed to spend $75 million of his own money to win. If he makes good on that promise and we don’t match him, he’ll have infinite resources to outspend us on the airwaves and on the ground.

We can’t let that happen.

**That’s why earlier today, I launched a two-day goal of raising $100,000 by tomorrow at midnight.**

In just one week, Virginians in every corner of the commonwealth will begin casting their ballots, and we’ve got to make sure we have the resources to run all of our voter mobilization programs at the highest level possible.

clean_body: It’s crunch time | | | = | | It’s crunch time, Derek. Early voting begins just ONE WEEK from today and, according to a poll released last week, the Virginia governor’s race is truly a coin flip. We urgently need your help to win. Here’s why: Glenn Youngkin has vowed to spend $75 million of his own money to win. If he makes good on that promise and we don’t match him, he’ll have infinite resources to outspend us on the airwaves and on the ground. We can’t let that happen. That’s why earlier today, I launched a two-day goal of raising $100,000 by tomorrow at midnight. In just one week, Virginians in every corner of the commonwealth will begin casting their ballots, and we’ve got to make sure we have the resources to run all of our voter mobilization programs at the highest level possible. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being on this team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Culp for Congress
subject: Biden's War and Newhouse's Silence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BwvZJn&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVKZBwo&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/e243122f-cbac-436b-80b1-0c4e9b359d36.png]

Biden Declares War on Personal Freedom; Newhouse is Nowhere to be Found--As Usual.

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/2c8d2680-ef56-4f1c-886a-4c0564fcceee.jpg] [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKuaqZ&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESQ2BoJ&]
Biden declares a new war on American freedoms

I spoke to my staff and instructed them to send this message to you first thing in the morning. I don't know about you, but I'm angry. I'm angry that our dopey President stood in front of the American people and blamed them for all of his administration's failings. I'm angry that the Republican Party is doing nothing. No action. No results. We get zero. Am I the only one pissed about this? Are you mad, too?

Bad economy? It's your faultbecause you didn't get the jab and they were forced to have you fired. I mean, if you'd just OBEY your masters--all of this will go away. If you did get the jab, YOU didn't do enough to influence your family and friends.

Surging COVID cases? It's your faultfor not complying with his orders. You are killing everyone--it's your fault. Despite the fact that Dr. Fauci recently admitted that they have no test for these new variants and that MOST of the new cases are people who have already taken the vaccine.

As it stands now, small businesses that have over 100 employees will be fined $14,000 for every employee who is not vaccinated or the company must facilitate weekly COVID testing on their dime to prove their team is not infected.

Government worker or contractor? Forget about it. You're hosed. If you don't get the vaccine you're out. No job. That means the Federal Government WILL lose at least 500,000 jobs in one month. And where the hell is our elected public servant? Somebody check under his desk.

Newhouse is a ghost

As of this writing, in the hours following the President's threats to Federal employees, contractors, and small business owners across the country, our current Representative is a ghost. No statement. No pushback. No counterpunch. Zero. Nothing. He's AWOL. Total weakness. Where's this conscious Dan Newhouse said told him to vote for impeachment? Why isn't Dan Newhouse working to impeach Biden for leaving Americans in Afghanistan and giving terrorists billions of dollars in money and equipment?

There is no one speaking up for you in Washington DC from our State. To make matters worse, at a State level, our own tyrant Jay Inslee, is about to collapse the state government as thousands of state workers and contractors are set to be fired on October 18.

RINO's like Dan Newhouse helped create this problem.

Newhouse showed his true colors when he voted to unconstitutionally impeach President Trump. Newhouse's voting record continues to show his eagerness to side with the radical Dems despite the fact that their agenda is tearing apart our country. And he's quiet when we need him to be our voice.

I could go for a few mean tweets about now. I could go for our elected public servants showing some courage and actually fighting against this tyranny. But what do we have?

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/03613249-5e5b-43ab-982c-c592887328d9.jpg]
We got nothing.

We aren't getting what we're paying for. We're getting ripped off.

We need men and women in Congress who will uphold the laws that have made America the beacon of freedom to the world.

I will always follow the constitution and hold those in office accountable for violating the laws of our great land. We need public servants, not politicians. We need everyday American to say enough and to support America First candidates.

I will continue to fight for the American people. I will take a stand, and I need you to take a stand with me.

Stand up for America.

Loren

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKuanz&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Ewnh9os&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKuaDu&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMIkIBg&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKua4r&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9FxMBj&]

I WANT TO MAX OUT IN THE PRIMARY $2,900 [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKuaAn&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMugIBm&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=BwvZJn&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECJTVWF&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=BwvZJn&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhsDh5A&pt=change_details] at any time.

subject: BREAKING: a far-right super PAC is going on the air in NC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

**_BREAKING NEWS:_** A far-right super PAC just launched a $1.4 million ad buy to boost our Trump-endorsed opponent. [**Rush a $3 donation to our campaign right now to fight back and elect Cheri Beasley.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35538246/305385278/1741212721?refcode2=d4ed5388-5612-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVkNTM4OC01NjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GE7GLXjMsvs3qNdfn_l6ZGmrIhRLyET-FotXa6nrrRw=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35538247/305385281/1741212721?refcode2=d4ed5388-5612-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVkNTM4OC01NjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GE7GLXjMsvs3qNdfn_l6ZGmrIhRLyET-FotXa6nrrRw=)**
Club for Growth, a far-right super PAC, is already getting involved in the North Carolina Senate race to try to buy this seat.
They started spending earlier this summer, and now they just announced a brand new $1.4 million television and digital ad buy to prop up our opponent Ted Budd.
Ted Budd is Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate, and special interests, like the Club for Growth, know that he’ll rubber-stamp their extreme agenda.
This is a clear sign of how important this race is — but also how expensive it’s likely to get. Republicans and their super PACs are willing to spend limitless sums of money to try to drown us out, and it is up to us to make sure that doesn’t happen.
No doubt it’ll be tough, but we’ve got something these dark money groups don’t have: people power. That’s why we need to ask:
[**Please make a $3 donation to our campaign right now to make sure Republicans cannot buy this seat. clean_body: BREAKING NEWS: A far-right super PAC just launched a $1.4 million ad buy to boost our Trump-endorsed opponent. = = Club for Growth, a far-right super PAC, is already getting involved in the North Carolina Senate race to try to buy this seat. They started spending earlier this summer, and now they just announced a brand new $1.4 million television and digital ad buy to prop up our opponent Ted Budd. Ted Budd is Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate, and special interests, like the Club for Growth, know that he’ll rubber-stamp their extreme agenda. This is a clear sign of how important this race is — but also how expensive it’s likely to get. Republicans and their super PACs are willing to spend limitless sums of money to try to drown us out, and it is up to us to make sure that doesn’t happen. No doubt it’ll be tough, but we’ve got something these dark money groups don’t have: people power.
