name: John Castorani
subject: Will Democrats ever learn?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Hillary had Benghazi. Now, Biden has Afghanistan. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0Hyxkte0czkkwXtKjOY6MygWyI--cVAeOfQxbad0UJqVrJO01X7iBe5p2KWYFY221fyMTtoYgUq5NNoeaD3556tLa7wkrIt1wDw1v79y1alBXH5FALlDqhBcO2WLlzsoRsYLXBC6sqtzAGxWgcF6Tf2SWGhKI95hFtLxFHNXnvgW2-WjW8wrulqBazL8tt4jpVUNiRIfQ9fDHzISXPtGKeGg8%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0HyxALu4QdbgC4gkWBw-6-a_-w4k60T6zUj7tI4H_TpADDbnjfM4VQGpK87fReg8Ip9IFOg831P2GliO19kN4mezqzbn4OZfDC7EGdLmLnWfXglGLzrnKCMdiOrhbw-wURVNeuHV2qEPXf1mO79zusih8SNHz5GyQFCUVNOjiWRSpFIflH7zLEzOfAqEluUj0PuYJRjjXBFiwHOx4KkiyuP0g%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0HyxsX_NFKePcKNN8zqJobAUf9gXxHAuhS5_YZKV9NwnN0xW3wQpT3gN-pqlfSSRWwOabTkSfuIrhRigjMiWBWhtULNx31FAhp-9QzVEuY56uk1MgsKxuRCQufcvRIakvHq6nUBRuysY2hWZ_abzlcxgYJtRSudr3IKa1grpkHhkjKaaBovbAls8FW7E0fj6PAXsyLRFaV3TU9gzrJPYAcnS4%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0HyzG-OjA3sqtnbeGuSv8oS3Ic22dp5c_0bVlk9BtXzlBF_O5qgnvbJEOHktW_C7X9fjtsVe4Kz__TGSWHFLYgr6H5ClE7iDUYw0snzOGBKhEYF4igMjeZ_Zm6zuSs5hqqVVYZvFYnGduAwx3bjtQ3dNtnro0dy94xXQ0MpUUchGMxNKsY3I3SYDxjc3Vqi7qn3lb3GIfewoGsnIFBnHcO58I%3D)**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0HyyeINVkjsMCSVAAQ_uZE211LiS_te9y0WpdB-xzM4xL6ul6Id9kpav2mKkD92QJnCyiXlwxe8bz5d5qD48vzeJko4l3NMivQqYJxx4hHFqbpmbfh75323L562wZr-9YL4tZzL1n4Ehk-542DkjNPxm0Pg6Q1t-GRmR4KWB4bSVvisVT50vrlldJWmA-zhMv23WP8T5GvG7_jCgbfcIFB-Hg%3D)
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0Hy_QqfH_J_68c9gkwcOypS_CGkmDu3-8aCjkpHAfQy9ErLoT2fgmoUH3utYyuNHCiQNyg_PeJzagGNopmV02wqs4-zqowiO5GuCSXwq6bXpm6DkwywDHz1pkJsA6k4ccYGt4sKCwhMt0xiJ0bXeoY_xc7Zphvy0x6J0YDJk-WP2KTqSgXFgF-hq4eCN0Cns7poTgboDw7SMYD9ipikus9qX4%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0Hy6jWjCasOoaJPxG0913FiqFIqJuMxRFSEtbWUMCUe1kPg4vINBX1F1-CgJbvXFdNEahreHKPeoELEt4Z1nqv5LKuykdtfBO6Oq_iN0qutsVrjqmpoKXk8E5qSPkRdM666ZPofHwI9qwU3SMZ8ABNasfY3w01vczSlsMqe-5F14XaOdXtYlk4qoCounALIsqmaxky5ah1pJj7SztXIA69Zl8%3D)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0Hy5azSd58BcJKiNS3mGiQtHZfjRKEqbC2PscSGEiQSypeSbVd0WUC2F8Lc2A_TZ4THX37oDA7rLYOguVhntU8UrxBbjY6HkWk79W6OC2dz5HuK7RFHE13rriaind7FbD5WHXUGRUgptsvAQ7yI4-MfwHn9njSXCccgauZIx4bDVmW-M2x23qb0unlNYk3MFeUjfFEWwh3Eq4Q032cxJHeBic%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af9af610651a4f73b796277f6910156c&_e=HDHQztUlog67CKuHWlUUioy2oiol2s8ZugZj4xnxFwzDO3bWyUSIO4zo0yiNhiNALzZ-MeFmcV5Az8L9ChBLais9wwjM3iV5ExPLi8uK4hhQf_fIq2NEN85DPsHeOwZtX7M53fI2O87X38XRisjramdKFq5KhBjo_KsWgYsdCEHFpH889D4mq3RICbTy5KdGKeRv658qcpA_N41Acyzu5crX7OcsJDyXUmuUou4gxDj4ENSY8prTZb0R2PIioWNLWUejgQbc8TLr4YFgyk0Hy76DVfU51r9pbNmeUjMD6iVxipBpTllHQwmZojG-BjdSzn1jj6qEpfKweBnqQxe3Cs-xvdQnRT0KXEyKWYZjYNueSXtPiDumnSKay15RVeH9dZzPeogUIIfAy9nUqyEzMsz1sYy72E6DCT21B0rAvAqDqUWqV0qBEfN4lXYRaOQxuKgqnTxSQ49R_vf90A9AysnnuSJjLmBJCKJryxIeBes%3D)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

subject: Remembering September 11

body:
Typically, we use this space each week to update Hoosier Republicans of the goings on of your Indiana Republican Party.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470830?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Remembering September 11_** Typically we use this space each week to update you about your Indiana Republican Party, our elected officials, and our county parties. This week, I wanted to do something a little different. Since today is the day before the 20th anniversary of September 11, I wanted to share some reflections on that terrible day two decades ago.

It’s hard to believe that 20 years have passed since September 11, 2001. Like most Hoosiers who were alive in 2001, I still have vivid memories of that day. Seeing the towers hit by commercial airplanes and then collapse. Learning about the attack on the Pentagon and the heroic takeover of Flight 93 in Pennsylvania. Mourning the thousands of lives taken by terrorists, and feeling the anger and resolve of the nation to punish our attackers. The intervening 20 years hasn’t made that day and those feelings any less vivid. Never Forget isn’t just a slogan or social media hashtag; it’s a continual call to action for all Americans to remember that nearly 3,000 Americans were killed in an unprovoked terrorist attack. It also means we must always remember the heroes of that day, and every day since. The first responders who ran into danger to save lives, and the men and women of our armed services who avenged the attack and have fought to keep our nation safe for 20 years.

There’s a beautiful 9-11 memorial in downtown Indianapolis, constructed in part with steel from the World Trade Center and limestone from the Pentagon. Tomorrow, Governor Holcomb will speak at the re-dedication and expansion of the memorial. Next time you’re in Indianapolis, I encourage you to stop by and spend a few minutes there. It’s just two blocks west of the state house, fittingly in the shadow of an Indianapolis Fire Department station. On occasions I’ve visited the memorial, I’ve said a prayer for the victims and their families, reflected on the world-changing events of that day, and reaffirmed my resolve to not forget the courage and sacrifice of our first responders and our men and women in uniform who’ve defended us these last 20 years. Above all else, it is a fitting reminder that the freedoms we enjoy as Americans aren't free.

Thanks,
Kyle **_Photo: _**_An indianawarmemorials.org picture of the September 11th memorial in Indianapolis. _
---

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Our supporters can’t get enough of our Team Franchot T-shirts.
We actually mean that literally: our Campaign Manager has just informed us that we’ve nearly run out of our initial supply of first-batch tees, and that we’re in urgent need of a resupply!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=20.22]Our campaign T-shirts are a great way for Marylanders to show their support for Peter Franchot’s bold vision for the future of our state. That’s why anyone who wants a T-shirt gets a T-shirt -- free of charge at any of our events.
Because we don’t make a profit on any of our merchandise, we have to rely on our grassroots supporters to help us foot the bill. That’s why we are humbly asking: will you rush a donation to help us order more T-shirts that we can share with new Team Franchot supporters?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising]Whether large or small, any amount you can give us is greatly appreciated. Peter Franchot is building a people-powered movement to change the way that government does business in 2022. By chipping in to help us order our next batch of T-shirts, you can help us grow our grassroots coalition in every corner of the state.
Our T-shirts are proudly union-printed, and the shirts are made right here in the United States. Click here to chip in whatever you can offer to help us resupply our stocks and get T-shirts in the hands of our supporters! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tshirtsfundraising?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot

Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Marisa Wood
subject: We JUST got word:
body:
McCarthy's blanketing our community with misleading information about his record in DC. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35539271/305389562/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTgyMzBiMi01ODEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNmSNZDvc5csUKQkziQviDpp2vk_W65MxM97LQl7D-M=)
Friend,

I want to take this opportunity to give you a few updates directly from campaign HQ. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop. **• I'm running against GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.** In the past month, he joked about "hitting" Nancy Pelosi with the gavel and he's threatening companies that release GOP records to investigators looking into the Jan. 6th insurrection. He's either protecting Trump or he has something bigger to hide.

**• Right now, McCarthy is blanketing our community with misleading information about his record in DC.** McCarthy can't hide from the truth. While he's protecting the likes of Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene, the Central Valley suffers. We're one of the poorest areas in the state and he isn't doing a damn thing about it -- no matter what his glossy postcards say.

**• In response, our team is ramping up our field efforts.** We're hiring bilingual canvassers to make sure everyone in the 23rd knows that I'm the viable Democrat running against him.

**• To fully fund our field operation, we have to hit our $25,000 goal before the end of the week, and unfortunately we're coming up $9,981 short.** **[Friend, can you chip in $3 before midnight to help us keep pace and close this fundraising gap? clean_body: McCarthy's blanketing our community with misleading information about his record in DC. | = Friend, I want to take this opportunity to give you a few updates directly from campaign HQ. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop. • I'm running against GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. In the past month, he joked about "hitting" Nancy Pelosi with the gavel and he's threatening companies that release GOP records to investigators looking into the Jan. 6th insurrection. He's either protecting Trump or he has something bigger to hide. • Right now, McCarthy is blanketing our community with misleading information about his record in DC. McCarthy can't hide from the truth. While he's protecting the likes of Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene, the Central Valley suffers. We're one of the poorest areas in the state and he isn't doing a damn thing about it -- no matter what his glossy postcards say. • In response, our team is ramping up our field efforts. We're hiring bilingual canvassers to make sure everyone in the 23rd knows that I'm the viable Democrat running against him. • To fully fund our field operation, we have to hit our $25,000 goal before the end of the week, and unfortunately we're coming up $9,981 short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Too much is at stake for our working families, small businesses, and farmers -- and really, the entire country -- to miss the mark on this goal. My team has fundraising deadlines we have to meet, budget lines to balance, and strategies to execute but none of that is possible without YOUR HELP. "DONATE $10>>" "DONATE $20>>" "DONATE $30>>" Democrats need just one more seat in the Senate in order to have TOTAL CONTROL over America. And with TOTAL CONTROL, they can get rid of the filibuster, pack the Supreme Court, raise your taxes, limit your freedoms... name: ElectEducatorsEverywhere
subject: Teachers deserve a voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
body:
Friend,
Did you know that on the House Education Committee — whose job is to ensure that our public education system is equitable, well-funded, and meets the needs of every student — only 18% of members had previously been educators?
Even more astonishing: On the K-12 subcommittee, whose members are tasked with ensuring that every child, regardless of where they live, has access to high-quality public education, only 3 out of 18 members have ever taught in a K-12 public school.
We desperately need more educators in the halls of government. Join our mission to elect educators to elected office with a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_l1]
For far too long, politicians in Washington have made decisions about education policy without input from the people who've directly experienced the consequences of those policies. Our solution is a simple one: Elect more teachers, guidance counselors, principals, school bus drivers, and their educator colleagues to Congress and state legislatures across the country.
We’ve made undeniable progress already (Reps. Jahanna Hayes, Katie Porter, Jamaal Bowman, and Carolyn Bordeaux are outstanding examples), but our work is just beginning. Massive barriers remain for educator candidates across the country. Running for office is incredibly expensive, and too often, educators simply don’t have access to these resources.
That’s why Elect Educators Everywhere exists: We serve as a bridge between incredible (and frequently underestimated) educator candidates and a grassroots network of donors, volunteers, and supporters. And we need you on board.
Will you donate now and join us in electing educators to office from coast to coast? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_l2]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_l2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_abx10&express_lane=true&amount=10]

Donate $100 ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_abx100&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Other Amount ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_abxother]
We're excited to have you on the team.
Team E3
Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.
Give Now ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries1_eee_new_xx_ftr]
https://www.facebook.com/ElectEducatorsEverywhere/ [https://www.facebook.com/ElectEducatorsEverywhere/] https://twitter.com/electeducators [https://twitter.com/electeducators] https://www.instagram.com/electeducatorseverywhere/ [https://www.instagram.com/electeducatorseverywhere/]

Contributions or gifts to Elect Educators Everywhere are not tax deductible. Your contribution will be deposited in Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account. name: April Becker
subject: This working mom can take down Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Becker for Congress
body:
I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff375cbddca14f4a90e4aa3532b7e779&_e=kOIkGqG3qUPir-x7ZARkdSDJv7g4k_9RW1xtUN2M7j5zEaeQXniYL2nAelmOYwYssvMVicHEWg0qbolcFKklNX8ifknHbaTWNHsHAC8KL1uLy_3Uy1Bsk_JRvkiq3b77DYUvgA4zvyXHlLs63cLsxaX-YqpGwjHkga_Oe2WAHiiE51pXFdoy8RquCi3es1QgceLfTUs_lhnJ6Ekb3VQ0RYRvS-DHfRXbdn5W8dF_RNS3HmPKuUysdDx8rY0ZYnYElK6xqxA-JR0zinE1EoaJggWIWT55iVC1g1ORmHHinGDMNk8A1iT6NNISfHNziVBTr9VQCTnDEM4YkC607_-h6xOCtQYtqC2SQFzuFGGXnwYLyom1_Tf-do-LLqICXKiRZUbt1auQmhJkYUO5PTk1iyySSbGBCulHP49j3_JKobTcr0obaln1GJ0OA8vOfa6T-9ApSfNrQFdMfZO7KQ2q9_mjw13SaCifySN9lLktLGc%3D)

subject: DNC National Coalition's Phone Bank for the CA Recall
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,

We are less than a week away from the California recall election. Coalitions are the party's base, and we know that when coalitions turn out, we win. So join us in propelling Democrats in California to victory by phone banking with the DNC Coalitions & Community Engagement Team at a national phone banking event on this Monday, September 13th! The event will take place at 4:00 PM ET/1:00 PM PT. You can find more information and the sign up link [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f9dd1d515d&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

Below you can also find our California recall social media toolkit, which includes resources and graphics to share digitally. Thank you for working with us to continue building our nation back better!
Best, Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
|
---
**California Recall National Phone Bank**
Join the DNC Coalitions & Community Engagement Team in a nationwide phone bank on Monday, September 13th, at 4PM ET/1PM PT. The election is on September 14th, so this is our last chance to urge Californians to **vote** **NO to the Republican recall.**
| [Sign Up Now](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7df61d7fd0&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Sign Up Now")
---
|
---
|
---

Peter,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6f44adc0449c49a3a9c63b3e6a568685&_e=Owrw6c8a9GJYRzS3gc6sb0cfFFkCX6ioUJGT6-NV1JJrTIrpgHflbggC2-F5mEnBCEMdJ3P5Zjf7L1e4A3eKR7Z1Mzt1ES7D7Z0363A5OugBvi8_4577QqimbUs62VEwhxe-mIeq-_FiUWcskA0cNXFJ7i0DrhUBAn8XT0clKA2W_8o6TdOqt3YfCWKyGF6vNTphzQUF5rZjPQcjAKgRFn3fc_GO99viSKJzYzutbmnbC7zE1ikX9glFYYWfP_wngMZRMPoNpqMbUpOSKE5FXKm1pWbpL3nGiBj9YQVRF0QEIHdwV61m3rKv-WeRwaWoTId0sRFZ6G6jSNDNGtEtzkddGQXnR7xUEsvpLYjTJsfmsRxM_ihlFXxfjyzTaooGNzIPfI7pB0TS_BArMABUHVqeQIesHCmZp-zHF-DQlASDIUDugLE9SzADZn4yNsHNXn6YXVls0DdOyoqZuQ0oXg%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6f44adc0449c49a3a9c63b3e6a568685&_e=Owrw6c8a9GJYRzS3gc6sb0cfFFkCX6ioUJGT6-NV1JJrTIrpgHflbggC2-F5mEnBCEMdJ3P5Zjf7L1e4A3eKR7Z1Mzt1ES7D7Z0363A5OugBvi8_4577QqimbUs62VEwhxe-mIeq-_FiUWcskA0cNXFJ7i0DrhUBAn8XT0clKA2W_8o6TdOqt3YfCWKyGF6vNTphzQUF5rZjPQcjAKgRFn3fc_GO99viSKJzYzutbmnbC7zE1ikX9glFYYWfP_wnDFHwFun2gMqE3cwaYpIXqsePe13zvnHrodHLtv2QtZdvcTr1VM4UhVXLUg0xUzk0bpDyzONgeHK-ng_6mVlGOOIUeduWE0lqSYyDl2UigE58rE6HUawVfqUVCAsGI5DlbR1z00ZtKI4WYb8OUo-Yjyh0nzvsAElHRpEGcO8BX3NgmPS4XCoUQmZpIbayk8Qsrboldg6bf1v_B5-YpRhVYw%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6f44adc0449c49a3a9c63b3e6a568685&_e=Owrw6c8a9GJYRzS3gc6sb0cfFFkCX6ioUJGT6-NV1JJrTIrpgHflbggC2-F5mEnBCEMdJ3P5Zjf7L1e4A3eKR7Z1Mzt1ES7D7Z0363A5OugBvi8_4577QqimbUs62VEwhxe-mIeq-_FiUWcskA0cNXFJ7i0DrhUBAn8XT0clKA2W_8o6TdOqt3YfCWKyGF6vNTphzQUF5rZjPQcjAKgRFn3fc_GO99viSKJzYzutbmkXk3ypDyzd1J-IhaGjraoSss4Q53Xent6w-yG7EPHyEDLVFiTIewN2a6juhCFgJNlw_xh847_RS3A-wy9aQetaAb7WPxmesqrts_ABPk7ORn-kzDJAvFghrqSUHEkyMKkXYwESJ-wM1dDUW9kkBUgkFvpJDwd4jfSQlTD1QHFFaBnc2R3WF-Sm6HvXry8dR9GZ73ARWVExlb_XzjZ2U0jRflZaZhqAN0GOYpWJRF0wL5k4g8Tu6TRXn7ewca8JNjU%3D)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6f44adc0449c49a3a9c63b3e6a568685&_e=Owrw6c8a9GJYRzS3gc6sb0cfFFkCX6ioUJGT6-NV1JJrTIrpgHflbggC2-F5mEnBCEMdJ3P5Zjf7L1e4A3eKR7Z1Mzt1ES7D7Z0363A5OugBvi8_4577QqimbUs62VEwhxe-mIeq-_FiUWcskA0cNXFJ7i0DrhUBAn8XT0clKA2W_8o6TdOqt3YfCWKyGF6vNTphzQUF5rZjPQcjAKgRFn3fc_GO99viSKJzYzutbmkXk3ypDyzd1J-IhaGjraoSss4Q53Xent6w-yG7EPHyEJJcEYOFfOyMekRyL0-1GRdgsR6YaiGfRuJIeKgnpSB7z-JLD8k3d9olmQLz9Htz8NuaSZ6v5Ve-FXXKHjMMWuP4Pa8IBxVZKALzCGApoPjjq2aywmDeYj2NnjzaMFznoytfJXSsc1gmJcpcVGtyruE0N5AO1WHLHHMhSX3437JXLv7zIvYA24AJ8I120dYVrYDLYKn3u4Q_OnhWrMhGuVE%3D)
The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6f44adc0449c49a3a9c63b3e6a568685&_e=Owrw6c8a9GJYRzS3gc6sb0cfFFkCX6ioUJGT6-NV1JJrTIrpgHflbggC2-F5mEnBCEMdJ3P5Zjf7L1e4A3eKR7Z1Mzt1ES7D7Z0363A5OugBvi8_4577QqimbUs62VEwhxe-mIeq-_FiUWcskA0cNXFJ7i0DrhUBAn8XT0clKA2W_8o6TdOqt3YfCWKyGF6vNTphzQUF5rZjPQcjAKgRFn3fc_GO99viSKJzYzutbmnbC7zE1ikX9glFYYWfP_wnf6OgaktRb_drgAQd6tL6VFk3X2MmhDGv-D6ros55PZkefMfogmOUdNcQp8KMbqHyNtAie-Y4ss6sdP-pP9wgRPgt-A6sJhdGQN0z8QgSliC7m_fQAMEDIhSKQbmTzds3zoj8WVoWq4CCoyTL38t6-sy78TN2a0uwna0KZtLMqp_JLup3Y3V5_b0DVut6ZYGBH8_WBvCk1Zu4B1amzpcdYA%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20Chairman=20IN=20GOP?=
subject: Fwd: Block the Biden Administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Did you see my team’s note? Our country is at a crossroads.>>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470818?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-biden-fail-2-090821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_biden_fail_2_090821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=fd6adc4f99&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

Our country is at a crossroads. We are faced with a stark choice: Either we accept the failures of the Biden Administration and let our country continue down the dark path of socialism, or we fight back and reclaim a Republican House majority to put the Democrats in check.

Our Indiana delegation is fighting tooth and nail against the radical left’s policies in the U.S. House. The problem is: there’s only so much we can do without a Republican majority.

We need your help to ensure that we can stop the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda in its tracks.

The path to a Republican majority runs through Indiana. It’s crucial that we hold onto key battleground seats here in Indiana and fight to solidify strongholds throughout the state.

The clock is ticking until the 2022 midterm election, and we need to make sure that it strikes midnight on one-party Democrat control on The Hill. (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-biden-fail-2-090821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_biden_fail_2_090821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=fd6adc4f99&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Please, contribute $5, $10, $50, $100, $250 or more right now to ensure that our Indiana Delegation has the resources they need to fight and WIN BACK the House in 2022.

- Kyle Hupfer, Chairman IN GOP
To: All Supporters
From: Team IN GOP
Subject: Block the Biden Administration
Sent: August 9, 2021
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-biden-fail-2-090821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_biden_fail_2_090821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=fd6adc4f99&mc_eid=UNIQID

Friend,

The trajectory of our country has changed drastically since Joe Biden and his handlers took office in January.

Just 8 months into his administration, he has taken our country into a downward spiral; making our economy weaker, damaging our international reputation, and hurting American families with skyrocketing inflation.

His leftist policies have led to:
* A disaster in Afghanistan. In a stunning series of events, this administration handed over control of the country to the Taliban and abandoned Americans and our allies.
* A failing economy. Just go to the grocery store or fill up your gas tank, and you’ll feel the pain of Biden’s inflation.
* A major border crisis. Illegal immigrants continue to stream across the border, overwhelming our border patrol and ICE agents.
* A sustained attack on our energy independence. Biden scrapped plans to build a pipeline that would have given Americans more control over our energy resources.
* A spineless response to Communist China. The Biden Administration refuses to stand up to a regime that caused COVID-19 and the deaths of more than 600,000 Americans.

STOP THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-biden-fail-2-090821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_biden_fail_2_090821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=fd6adc4f99&mc_eid=UNIQID)

It couldn’t be clearer, Friend. Joe Biden is one of the most hapless presidents in our nation’s history, and he must be stopped.

That’s why it’s so imperative that we TAKE BACK the House in 2022. We need a Republican majority to block the left’s radical policies ruining our country.

We’re only 8 months into his four-year term, and if we continue at this pace there’s no telling how bad it could get. (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-biden-fail-2-090821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_biden_fail_2_090821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=fd6adc4f99&mc_eid=UNIQID)

With your help, we can TAKE BACK the House and end Nancy Pelosi’s iron grip on Congress.

Joe Biden’s administration is taking our country down a dangerous path, and THIS is our opportunity to hold them accountable for the damage they are doing.

It won’t be easy, but with your support for our Indiana delegation, we can get the job done.

- Team IN GOP
DONATE NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-biden-fail-2-090821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_biden_fail_2_090821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=fd6adc4f99&mc_eid=UNIQID)

| | Derek, Make no mistake, if Republicans take back the majority in Richmond, the progress Virginia has made on voting rights, health care, reproductive freedom, and much more will be in jeopardy. That’s why it is so critical that we step up to defend our Democratic majority this November. Senator Warner is working hard to reelect Democrats like Candi King and Elizabeth Guzman to the House of Delegates, but he needs YOU to make sure they win come November. **_[Will you split a $5 contribution now to reelect these Democratic women in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35542085/305395246/-1074768240?refcode=mw_em_210910_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTFlNjA3ZS01YzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdMHDPSs-2HRFF_0hLXw8xeoVK7vpBmsBwO7rpf15uM=)_** **Candi King** represents the 2nd District in the Virginia House of Delegates. With over a decade of experience in government and community relations, including experience securing millions of dollars in funding for underserved educational programs, she knows how to get things done. **Elizabeth Guzman** is a prolific and effective legislator, running for her third term to the Virginia House of Delegates. A mother to four children, Elizabeth is a social worker and public administrator who was one of the first two Latina women elected to the House of Delegates. As leaders in our Democratic majority, Delegates King and Guzman helped pass paid sick leave for home health care workers and coronavirus aid to help families stay afloat during a pandemic. These are the kinds of public servants we need to continue to have fighting for Virginia’s families, Derek. Mark Warner is committed to defending our Democratic majority in Virginia. Are you with him? **_[Donate $5 or anything you can now to support Candi King and Elizabeth Guzman.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35542086/305395247/-1074768240?refcode=mw_em_210910_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTFlNjA3ZS01YzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdMHDPSs-2HRFF_0hLXw8xeoVK7vpBmsBwO7rpf15uM=)_** Thanks, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35542088/305395248/-1074768240?refcode=mw_em_210910_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTFlNjA3ZS01YzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdMHDPSs-2HRFF_0hLXw8xeoVK7vpBmsBwO7rpf15uM=)**

If we meet our goal, we’ll be able to fully-fund the next round of effective online ads to grow our movement and help Elect Republicans.

name: American Update
subject: Are You Ready For Financial Lockdown?
body:
Consider this your final wake-up call... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8756%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=za%2bLbqJGtJTT6tS2sVDv%2bg&sysid=1)
## Are You Ready For Financial Lockdown?
* * *
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03016%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZq93vpGysUzVaLV78eJ7A&sysid=1 "See how this could impact you")
Most Americans are still going about life, business, investing, and retirement planning...
As if nothing unusual has happened to our financial system.
**And few seem to realize the repercussions of[ _$11 TRILLION_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03017%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zOtNcowOVSzV5heh2gsZWw&sysid=1) being pumped into the U.S. financial system in the past 18 months.**
So consider this your final wake-up call...
Billionaires including Warren Buffett, Stanley Druckenmiller, Paul Tudor-Jones, Bill Ackman, and more have stated publicly that Americans aren't paying enough attention to this development.
And a former Goldman Sachs trader says what's coming next is a phase he calls: [**"Financial Lockdown."**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03018%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=roBuZiyi%2bzmFhycjXV42ng&sysid=1)
He says, sooner than most people think, millions of Americans will be pushed down... out of the middle class... out of private retirement and private health care... and out of a decent life based on independence and privacy.
To most folks, how and why this will happen is a complete mystery.
And that's why he has gone public with the most important and useful analysis on this situation in the financial world today. (**[Click here to see his full report.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03019%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KRWtDpfWUWOGXIKl2dCqzw&sysid=1)**)
**It includes a detailed look at what's happening now, what's coming next, and most importantly, 4 steps he says you should take right now.**
Get the facts. **[Learn what you can do to protect and grow your money in the years to come.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03010%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p5eI7AoIHsp6lRL1JxK9sg&sysid=1)** There's no doubt we are in for huge changes to our financial system in the next few years.
If you are counting on IRAs, 401(k)s, insurance policies, annuities, pension plans, stocks, or bonds, this information is critical.
We've posted his brand-new, full analysis, including his FOUR recommended steps, on our website...
[**You can access it free of charge today - click here to view.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03011%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJumG8EtLvjfZ43QatQg9w&sysid=1)
Sincerely,
Mike Palmer
Founding Partner, Stansberry Research

Sent from: American Update | 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[www.americanupdate.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03012%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ziM3B%2fXFtE6Kxmlq37WfyQ&sysid=1)
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8756%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=za%2bLbqJGtJTT6tS2sVDv%2bg&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8756%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=za%2bLbqJGtJTT6tS2sVDv%2bg&sysid=1)

Friend,

We just launched this campaign, and Max is already being hit with attacks from the far-right online, some even disparaging his military service.

Max can take these attacks, but here's the kicker: our opponent Doug LaMalfa never served in the military and voters are starting to take note of his hypocrisy. Take a look at a recent letter to the editor from Ed in Chico sent to the _Chico Enterprise-Record:_
"I just read the lengthy email Doug LaMalfa sent out concerning our withdrawal from Afghanistan. Remind me again when Doug, or any of his family members served in the military.

**I'm sick and tired of LaMalfa's hypocrisy, and as a veteran myself will vote for a veteran in the next election."**

_-Ed, Chico Resident_

To continue spreading the word, we need your help in raising grassroots resources to fuel our communication efforts in mailboxes, via digital ads, and on TVs.

name: O'Halleran HQ
subject: Why September matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

It’s an important month.

Fellow Conservative,

While not a lot surprises me in politics these days, recent events are shocking. The ineptitude with which President Biden orchestrated the withdrawal has been a catastrophic failure of leadership.

I have never been one to mince words – I didn’t support Joe Biden in the 2020 election, but I never rooted for him to fail.

Seven months into his presidency, Joe Biden has failed the American public on a number of fronts – whether it be his handling of the COVID-19 pandemic, his failure to secure the southern border, or sending the nation into an inflation crisis. All of these failures are bad. However, leaving billions of dollars’ worth of military firepower, aircraft, munitions and AMERICANS behind enemy lines is not only a failure of leadership – **it’s weakened America on the world stage**.

**[Right now, I want to know what you think: should President Biden resign? Please Let me and my team know as soon as you possibly can](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=361f6a3f3845463ca92839bea03d1e0d&_e=erYECx7ySXKyIa0_t7ykevifMIQqyK-OM6P3COWntZHGz-bKjXbjtPwKJxuF47kPazH3DyAGisDziqQtVaxIbHATMUTVZWlEymh-1h79CjWeUnYM1Ol9_BZQH0mkvCLScAyncFeSNQpfbaxi3_5oBTsJMi_2nNussmkm_sToomrx2qAGMji8yO6VbThTr1fqv3g7LXZZTDJwhLcOJ4yt2Vyoh7YptYqbW8BJ95Q39hSi17HU-titGSpDD6NWtsjV4Gj-dnptmE_cRHvRZHOkM6YtHnOwdQ1i7Hy2DtqC6_32dzlhSmysRydI-Jja5Kf2EQgiKTHeqWXbyBHtsio8DcDiSfhJKcRVy5n-VbA1QVhumxk9YvHBpo4fFLTufqHywOSpx52aH0hQA4fUkwoSfABf_-Ireq9nIbcBh9Q4iqcnkdp3V6AaFoF0Cw1QUnIVy7kHj6YA3drNR9ULxHhN6BtJOvpUInewBdf6K4jSbYloIaZV8hOh_GhuuAz8fq8r)**.

|
**POLL: SHOULD BIDEN RESIGN?**

On a scale of [1-5], how important do you think it is that Biden resign from office?

[TAKE POLL→](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=361f6a3f3845463ca92839bea03d1e0d&_e=erYECx7ySXKyIa0_t7ykevifMIQqyK-OM6P3COWntZHGz-bKjXbjtPwKJxuF47kPazH3DyAGisDziqQtVaxIbHATMUTVZWlEymh-1h79CjWeUnYM1Ol9_BZQH0mkvCLScAyncFeSNQpfbaxi3_5oBTsJMi_2nNussmkm_sToomrx2qAGMji8yO6VbThTr1fqv3g7LXZZTDJwhLcOJ4yt2Vyoh7YptYqbW8BJ95Q39hSi17HU-titGSpDD6NWtsjV4Gj-dnptmE_cRHvRZHOkM6YtHnOwdQ1i7Hy2DtqC6_0ohXr7px0eQV8wSixoHAOhN8dmo8pOg-mef4p4Aj1-RwfBZnIyXe50wl6aVioQLDxM_L_T30xOSZ03miUwpKSJnv525lj5bDfYTJaLwXccIENHxKBlqL89UsCSCGibA0eeDWhzvbPUKy1YXyv6xMf4Pgu0xjI6r2OhFn20HlajlE2UemMxrUcgKOWj7zic0e1xB1YYo4RrrO7PogwsTvFd)

There are so many parallels to be drawn between what we’re currently witnessing in Afghanistan and the debacle that unfolded in Benghazi, Libya in 2011.

I’m afraid that once again, we’re witnessing a Democrat administration that is more preoccupied with politics than with actual facts on the ground, much less the lives of Americans on the frontlines.

Despite Democrats' best efforts, America is still the greatest country in the world. But would we be better off if Biden just resigned? **[Let us know](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=361f6a3f3845463ca92839bea03d1e0d&_e=erYECx7ySXKyIa0_t7ykevifMIQqyK-OM6P3COWntZHGz-bKjXbjtPwKJxuF47kPazH3DyAGisDziqQtVaxIbHATMUTVZWlEymh-1h79CjWeUnYM1Ol9_BZQH0mkvCLScAyncFeSNQpfbaxi3_5oBTsJMi_2nNussmkm_sToomrx2qAGMji8yO6VbThTr1fqv3g7LXZZTDJwhLcOJ4yt2Vyoh7YptYqbW8BJ95Q39hSi17HU-titGSpDD6NWtsjV4Gj-dnptmE_cRHvRZHOkM6YtHnOwdQ1i7Hy2DtqC6_0lgb5RxoDphsCMSJi6W6FhMLdkkJRq0pGCXCfCmKQNrozkjq0MV6qED5QLPu3vDTi1WqMaBabTzYnqvpsLy037CfmWOrEpbukNhZ5cR3qClwXEo5bJn9oaAerxGcOcRAjNSt4jH9GTcyxq74KikEX643nQYRKJ3A2JtvBvNZMgvzt4b3i3-lZ7b-aXrmGR3mEiFzGWPHpeELl1lQHAVUlZ)**.

clean_body: I have never been one to mince words – I didn’t support Joe Biden in the 2020 election, but I never rooted for him to fail We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. | Fellow Conservative, While not a lot surprises me in politics these days, recent events are shocking. The ineptitude with which President Biden orchestrated the withdrawal has been a catastrophic failure of leadership. I have never been one to mince words – I didn’t support Joe Biden in the 2020 election, but I never rooted for him to fail. Seven months into his presidency, Joe Biden has failed the American public on a number of fronts – whether it be his handling of the COVID-19 pandemic, his failure to secure the southern border, or sending the nation into an inflation crisis. All of these failures are bad. However, leaving billions of dollars’ worth of military firepower, aircraft, munitions and AMERICANS behind enemy lines is not only a failure of leadership – it’s weakened America on the world stage. . | POLL: SHOULD BIDEN RESIGN? On a scale of [1-5], how important do you think it is that Biden resign from office? There are so many parallels to be drawn between what we’re currently witnessing in Afghanistan and the debacle that unfolded in Benghazi, Libya in 2011. I’m afraid that once again, we’re witnessing a Democrat administration that is more preoccupied with politics than with actual facts on the ground, much less the lives of Americans on the frontlines. Despite Democrats' best efforts, America is still the greatest country in the world. But would we be better off if Biden just resigned? . Sincerely, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 Don't want to receive our emails?

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e73bee3886c6472292a9866b303f9ff4&_e=TxD8BLDjoMtiCf4KS0mXatd_JxG15u_-FcQIMIXhxDMfeQFNxl_BLRC8YvTgj7k_qmI6xq7aFCrLQqodhs6Usy_zYSKwh34Zi7Ephe5cZsOcO8uPycsXKzAtCJDKJVEWxganoDUmTv1j_X43-r3hJ3FVd9WeUK9gwy9S_37kBeq_YvY8lIry1d4NuL-azHEcNvPvLIaZEmeFM949R2D2eMWnqmAax8pi-kfVSgv6VNnmK8sHU0zpvHpMTGDVQtHa1S5E3atzpftWcykHG8igONjEYVrR42gA9PLzvNGUylAw-rC-M0GQiFfRM1bSbZ_a-XgjSKXSHpmmlNZivkGt7pwZxo4XwZU-UZ-bwAlZovBLDv271TGhjQqV2xbvkRYiAxxkxXJPOKi6SzJEqwyerjb2he_3NkKDI0rpURfDAeiBmlOfeCrgQswpgkDqMZ7Y2px2-Q5OnP6t_Sau8LQi5Q%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

**[My name is April Becker: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e73bee3886c6472292a9866b303f9ff4&_e=TxD8BLDjoMtiCf4KS0mXatd_JxG15u_-FcQIMIXhxDMfeQFNxl_BLRC8YvTgj7k_qmI6xq7aFCrLQqodhs6Usy_zYSKwh34Zi7Ephe5cZsOcO8uPycsXKzAtCJDKJVEWxganoDUmTv1j_X43-r3hJ3FVd9WeUK9gwy9S_37kBeq_YvY8lIry1d4NuL-azHEcNvPvLIaZEmeFM949R2D2eMWnqmAax8pi-kfVSgv6VNnmK8sHU0zpvHpMTGDVQtHaxJFW85_oq3pASHQyixBsjR7reqIAgSm4JBOF36e2b5c5yKOEpPpmVceIVYuI1cAUcMIcHyHcd4Y6AN373nPY6tNFyL8KWBGzQGYJOHnoqUsNpj5XjejJfi9gUCZS1CwejjkbyGZ4aXZc6e_FZEdYCacWvZQunHmeIT9Kwt-tdIGfmmK1IREOdwR7p0hvYnfMBetME2q-6fm4dHNPCIvLJA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e73bee3886c6472292a9866b303f9ff4&_e=TxD8BLDjoMtiCf4KS0mXatd_JxG15u_-FcQIMIXhxDMfeQFNxl_BLRC8YvTgj7k_qmI6xq7aFCrLQqodhs6Usy_zYSKwh34Zi7Ephe5cZsOcO8uPycsXKzAtCJDKJVEWxganoDUmTv1j_X43-r3hJ3FVd9WeUK9gwy9S_37kBeq_YvY8lIry1d4NuL-azHEcNvPvLIaZEmeFM949R2D2eMWnqmAax8pi-kfVSgv6VNnmK8sHU0zpvHpMTGDVQtHarMd77Q8IoyZ5a23xHBz_rh9HdU08H6GPEj6EpNzvhthPH3dZSEBKoEwnn2v0t8Dki5ahMdyv85uebXH87KYgGX8OoWws8xR1lKSE9wTcBt1pkLXxGpLtkjt8nXQrwgm0IZpLN1t_KvZ_sJAYU-k9gtHa41GetUiQ1aTk0w3JIM0ooXT9_M-KQzP3vKMS5n6-OvDRWHDehNgHh6nduFeMpQ%3D%3D)
[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e73bee3886c6472292a9866b303f9ff4&_e=TxD8BLDjoMtiCf4KS0mXatd_JxG15u_-FcQIMIXhxDMfeQFNxl_BLRC8YvTgj7k_qmI6xq7aFCrLQqodhs6Usy_zYSKwh34Zi7Ephe5cZsOcO8uPycsXKzAtCJDKJVEWxganoDUmTv1j_X43-r3hJ3FVd9WeUK9gwy9S_37kBeq_YvY8lIry1d4NuL-azHEcNvPvLIaZEmeFM949R2D2eMWnqmAax8pi-kfVSgv6VNnmK8sHU0zpvHpMTGDVQtHaPeluLi2VsYhyk1OONReGnjtP2yZfNNlBiBQphNpaXEjLubUcbZr8dBVP1tSo_hDREU3LuayQMgnMUn77kBECF3tylRNW7Nl7CsC5E6JT1rZPGSZsEJF40VtXBFwltpHjncBOtFKtrOIH0sUcX3BkWlPNcr71BZea-6Rw2HOFc-hDjSwOqYnOfNpMGaZMmbRkuVoycYTs0BEORr1Mj977Ug%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e73bee3886c6472292a9866b303f9ff4&_e=TxD8BLDjoMtiCf4KS0mXatd_JxG15u_-FcQIMIXhxDMfeQFNxl_BLRC8YvTgj7k_qmI6xq7aFCrLQqodhs6Usy_zYSKwh34Zi7Ephe5cZsOcO8uPycsXKzAtCJDKJVEWxganoDUmTv1j_X43-r3hJ3FVd9WeUK9gwy9S_37kBeq_YvY8lIry1d4NuL-azHEcNvPvLIaZEmeFM949R2D2eMWnqmAax8pi-kfVSgv6VNnmK8sHU0zpvHpMTGDVQtHavOM8ivSkwguoUpfZ0DWW0JULvKRg5ZabSLEv-L0FCE5unQkfILsoOWAVDHcb53CpwjBKRFbBpByAwfzxWyGrZtZDmTySysqQJ1BYd9WNfXqxgF7acC0rPhqubFpZLR5-ZrPJABlCbSXINVroL3gFqJ29gYvv15tGUVv0W-5zI_eObamFBr1cHHFoFRPXCzhAXK-YL9MqHppsEe_3caj6LQ%3D%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

subject: Even the experts agree with me that Fauci absolutely did fund COVID-19

body:
Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.
_Sponsored message_
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** _**[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4nsk3i4d2q9901kabd54apciq67coeposvs3bko_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)**_ [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcug1fp8srh597kpeohk9agr5e5640lj3ms4evk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs) | |
---
Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about school closures. Now he’s lying about whether or not he funded the gain of function research that led to the COVID-19.

HINT: He did.

Thousands of documents were already available to the public when I called Fauci out in a July hearing, but as of today, 900 more documents have been released to PROVE Dr. Fauci approved funding for gain of function research at the Wuhan Virology Lab. _(Yes, that one.)_
[**FIRE FAUCI: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhkh3n6b1ibvd5ai5qm0kgmjfup1s1vd2otjdpoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)
The truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

He refused to retract his lies.

He didn’t even bother to cover up the paper trail that proved him wrong!

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh2148jh8081go32etga3c4udll7et54l277khjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ritjkbip8cln1eau4i2f8kds1oheaukkphsvcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpfa8726d1uov7epp0bcj49rh5mejqsou0hp2kdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zemmh0ft7dibq2u6vkp6ilet9a3sscqou6d1al7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he’s doing.

He’s not an expert in COVID. He’s an expert in political theater!

Even the media-approved “experts” in microbiology are agreeing with ME now that Fauci was behind this whole pandemic. Richard Ebright, a molecular biologist at Rutgers, read the grants revealed this week and he says there’s no DOUBT that Fauci was “untruthful” about his role in funding COVID-19.
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj8n2do1imhpecthhp6uojhfecjo4nb3virs0brg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)
_There you have it._

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It’s time for Fauci TO GO.

**I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2842554/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zchk54s9a163gcuqtua6ge7fpjm5aa0cphvs9938_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4rc2p93bilqtrpg973sejtf1j4ftpv6o1b3fo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9ie6o76cth2bs)

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35549618/305407476/2005998736?refcode=20210910_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNiZTJmYy02MzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ8XKnEkET51I2bmENY5BtWcqXZgg6dUHEt6CQXrkOw=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35549619/305407477/-238118833?refcode=20210910_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNiZTJmYy02MzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ8XKnEkET51I2bmENY5BtWcqXZgg6dUHEt6CQXrkOw=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. [**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve -- chip in now to help me and Seth Moulton stop the radical right. A donation of $25, $50, or $100 will go such a long way in ensuring that we can defeat hatred in our communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35549620/305407478/2005998736?refcode=20210910_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNiZTJmYy02MzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ8XKnEkET51I2bmENY5BtWcqXZgg6dUHEt6CQXrkOw=) Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers

| Fellow American, join me on the 26th!

| |

| Hey Friend, I am Dr. Kelli Ward, the Chairman of the Arizona Republican Party, the first America First, Republican Party in the country.
On September 26th, I will be attending a fundraiser for Laurel Imer at the Dunafon Castle in Idledale, CO. Joining me at this event will be my friend and fellow Arizonan, Pinal County Sheriff Mark Lamb, and Former Congressman from CO-06 Tom Tancredo.
I am writing you today to invite you to join me and my husband, Mike, at this fundraiser for Laurel.
I have known Laurel and her son Weston for quite some time and I know that Laurel is an amazing mother, a staunch supporter of the America First Movement and that she will never back down or compromise her principles in the face of the far left attacks or the censorship from big tech.
When Laurel asked me in July at the Rally to Protect our Elections in Phoenix, with my good friend and our 45th President, Donald J. Trump, if I would support her candidacy in Colorado, I responded with a resounding Yes and that is why I am writing you today.
Laurel needs your support in order to defeat the radical agenda of the far left in Colorado. The Democrat party knows that Ed Perlmutter is vulnerable and they also know that Laurel will defeat him in 2022. So you know that the Dems and Nancy Pelosi are going to throw everything they have at Laurel in this fight.
Tickets are selling fast for this event and I want to meet you, so please click below and purchase your ticket now before space runs out.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Oakman?=
subject: Chairman Hupfer Statement on Biden Mandates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued the following statement regarding Biden's mandates. | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/chairman-hupfer-statement-on-2021-indiana-inauguration-470838?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b79d593b7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Jake Oakman, [joakman@indiana.gop](mailto:joakman@indiana.gop) **Date:** September 10, 2021

_**Chairman Hupfer Statement on Biden Mandates**_
**INDIANAPOLIS **\- Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued the following statement regarding Biden's proposed vaccine mandates:

"Joe Biden's authoritarian overreach is an admission of his own failures. Biden and his handlers inherited a robust economic recovery and a stellar vaccine rollout, so much so that President Biden even declared "independence" from COVID-19 just two months ago. Now he's gone from "shutting down the virus" to threatening to shut down businesses. He's gone from saying vaccines shouldn't be mandated to threatening to get elected officials who don't abide by his authoritarian power grab "out of the way." Vaccines are safe, effective, and should be taken by everyone who is eligible, but mandating the vaccines and threatening businesses and elected officials if they don't comply with unconstitutional orders is not the way to unite this country and put COVID in the rear view mirror. Joe Biden has failed fundamental leadership tests at every turn. Americans deserve better." **-30-**
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Grand Canyon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It’s time the government takes action to make sure we’re not ending up with radioactivity in critical water supplies.
#

Say you care.
That’s what I am asking you to do today — tell Congress you believe it must ban uranium mining in and around the Grand Canyon.
If that’s all you need to hear, sign my petition here:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/signup/GrandCanyonPetition**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/GrandCanyonPetition/?source=em210910-1-15&refcode2=1294.6688874.vAt1EG&t=1&akid=1294%2E6688874%2EvAt1EG)
As an astronaut, I was a radiation worker myself.
So I understand what it’s like to deal with radiation affecting my body. You could even see, when you closed your eyes at night, the gamma particles flying through your retina.
This is one of the reasons astronauts have higher rates of cancer, as is the case for people who live near uranium mines, as well.
It’s time the government takes action to make sure we’re not ending up with radioactivity in critical water supplies.
I’ve seen the Grand Canyon from space, and I’ve seen it up close. It’s a national treasure not just for Arizona, but for our planet.
That’s why we ALL have a role in making our voices heard to keep it safe, and why I am asking:
[**Can you please sign my petition urging Congress to take action to ban uranium mining in and around the Grand Canyon. The Senate needs to know you care about this issue.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/GrandCanyonPetition/?source=em210910-1-15&refcode2=1294.6688874.vAt1EG&t=2&akid=1294%2E6688874%2EvAt1EG)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/GrandCanyonPetition/?source=em210910-1-15&refcode2=1294.6688874.vAt1EG&t=3&akid=1294%2E6688874%2EvAt1EG)**
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1294%2E6688874%2EvAt1EG).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Fighting their schemes to undermine democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091021]

Dear Friend,

There was no election fraud at the polls in PA -- the frauds are the "leaders" who are dead set on foolish investigation efforts that aim to undermine and destroy our democracy.

PA Senate President Jake Corman and his colleagues launched the Senate Intergovernmental Operations Committee to use taxpayer dollars to investigate the 2020 general and 2021 primary elections. Sen. Corman told Steve Bannon on his show they’re ready to issue subpoenas to get the election information they want.

They’re grasping at straws -- and, on the side, scheming to limit our voting rights through nasty legislation! Trump lost Pennsylvania by 80,555 votes -- this is a fact. Two election reviews were already conducted in Pennsylvania -- in 63 out of 67 counties that participated, there was ZERO evidence of fraud.

The only actual cases of voter fraud identified in PA in 2020 were two guys trying to cast an extra vote for Trump under a dead relative's name. Voter fraud is, by and large, total right wing fiction.

We are working to ensure that our elections are protected from those in power like Sen. Corman, who are desperately and deviously designing to erode our democracy. Keystone Progress Education Fund is working on voter outreach, education, and registration in areas of the state that are often overlooked, because we know every vote counts and every voter deserves to feel empowered.

Help us keep our votes safe with a donation today.

Let’s keep up the fight!

Thank you,

Patrick Clark

name: Alek
subject: what kind of malarky is this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
While you may not live in Oregon, redistricting is probably going to affect a Republican candidate nearer you than you thought. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9e2edb5cff78480f92f692b7f8fd1d5e&_e=HGBLzNqJJbVKysoRlKWip-EE_GjKmhPjkMk9c79vJCgVwl6yT8Tkn5oymirwa6MRc8YVwclb8Mv7pvD4L-sdorfvbdg2jV2XVRq5vrHAqeW4BsfyXNQreQmcBAsZbjbhcCLtl6KsDBYPL18ekjSMTEQzkwLydDFhLzQ0v1k4mBZdlSxiC1zXuzjl7X_UgZ333z3WICB1BAIN2st-Ih8P4woxxpXWb0LeUr61Z8HKoMdfnbTBfJyTikGFMR4MGncR3IlEqhWZNlcgXVQ9M0CMJZOydnEn9CY8bgJlkqdbBEiKsu_rk5MatC6J29pZCmSvmx-thmrRmGoT2DxLAoBgjKwWkDSmoDmB-Pc71N9Vb6UoKFT3iBMxWNUeDlefIIe3xzeovEUCeRZkMiov4_k22TG3eIzqw7W_rgT_lSRj1Gh09f0e9xckLQdZzABFgqh3q9J7UVOEPUQW26vDagkNgR3czmwnsvtI88g3jx16U18%3D)

Peter,

Over the past several days, Oregon Democrats have begun to reveal their gerrymandered maps for the six U.S. house districts our state will have for the next ten years. In case you didn’t hear, Oregon is just one of six states in the nation gaining a federal congressional district this year.

While you may not live in Oregon, redistricting is probably going to affect a Republican candidate nearer you than you thought.

I know that redistricting is a complicated dance, and I don’t profess to understand all of the nuances, so I won’t attempt to explain the entirety of the process taking place here in Oregon to you right now.

**What I will say is that redistricting is a tool used by those who hold the majority in a state (in Oregon, that’s Democrats) to carve out congressional districts that give their candidates an advantage**.

Which is where my campaigns problems arise. You see, **Democrats know that I came within 5 points of defeating the 3rd longest serving member in the House last year, so when I decided to wage a rematch this year** - they knew that had to do everything in their power to give my opponent, Peter Defazio, an unfair advantage. That’s why Dems have submitted a new map to the governor which gives the advantage to Republicans in just ONE of Oregon’s six districts.

_**I don’t have to tell you that I’m not running in the district where the Republican is favored, do I?**_

**I’m really upset** by that Democrats are trying to rig this election in my opponents favor, so I’m putting together a special campaign fund to raise money for a future challenge to any map Democrats attempt to have signed into law which puts Republicans at a clear disadvantage. And **[I’m asking you to chip in a few dollars today to help me fill the coffers](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9e2edb5cff78480f92f692b7f8fd1d5e&_e=HGBLzNqJJbVKysoRlKWip-EE_GjKmhPjkMk9c79vJCgVwl6yT8Tkn5oymirwa6MRc8YVwclb8Mv7pvD4L-sdorfvbdg2jV2XVRq5vrHAqeW4BsfyXNQreQmcBAsZbjbhcCLtl6KsDBYPL18ekjSMTEQzkwLydDFhLzQ0v1k4mBZdlSxiC1zXuzjl7X_UgZ333z3WICB1BAIN2st-Ih8P4woxxpXWb0LeUr61Z8HKoMdfnbTBfJyTikGFMR4MGncR3IlEqhWZNlcgXVQ9M0CMJVLRYCtgliXCIDyRrTR30I_MqzDMwzuhvZcb0VIcSymuB_tge9CZ76Hw06rJEgiTd4Mvt3X482ACo-I9C90sTr5qr8vd9Dg-_Ipv67gqevIOEpcLtHWS0lrN9ocVApWRTxFzKjljTj8lk6JywRamwb4jROH9n3FEja3dGmYrKOGIN3LctQYb5HxW8VJf0s0B_HmrkTImG9P5MhH-IWPUgtg%3D)**.

Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- September 10****, 2021-** **\- Governor Holcomb, INGOP Wave White Flag on COVID-19 -** It's simple: Governor Eric Holcomb has not held a press briefing about Indiana's fight against COVID-19 for more than 164 days - leaving Hoosiers in the dark as cases, hospitalizations, and deaths are up across Indiana. The Indiana Democratic Party will continue this call until the Governor puts his partisanship aside in favor of science-based facts. The last time Indiana experienced a surge like this the Governor described Indiana as being "on fire", yet, Holcomb is still refusing to hold something as simple as a press briefing or town hall on the pandemic. It's as if Gov. Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have given up on the pandemic altogether. The fact is, Governor Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have not proactively promoted vaccines online or in public since April and instead, have been more focused on photo-ops instead of helping Hoosier families put the COVID-19 pandemic in the rearview mirror. Now more than ever Hoosiers are seeking leadership from Holcomb and want to know what it'll take to end COVID for good. But right now, Hoosiers are hearing what amounts to silence. Indiana Democrats have been working overtime to try and put COVID-19 behind us. Under President Joe Biden's leadership, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan and delivered much-needed relief for every Zipcode in Indiana, including shots in arms and stimulus checks for families. Democrats are meeting Hoosiers where they are and providing honest conversations and solutions about today's most pressing problems facing their families. **\- See You at the Statehouse -** Indiana redistricting starts next week on September 14th. Hoosiers will finally have a chance to see this decade's legislative maps, however, it's going to be very clear that Indiana Republicans want to continue the status quo and manipulate the system against voters for another 10 years. Voters are tired of the same canned lies from politicians, their families consistently falling short while others get ahead, and being lied to when it matters most. Indiana Democrats agree, and it's why we called for a genuine conversation about redistricting and the partisan gerrymandering the Indiana Republican Party has executed this fall. We believe that now is the chance to have fair elections, fair maps, and the opportunity for Hoosier voters to decide the future of Indiana -- NOT the other way around. For the last 10 years, Indiana Republicans created a "work more for less" economy, underfunded the state's public schools, and promoted unnecessary culture wars that divided families and communities in all 92 counties. All of this falls squarely on the Indiana Republican Party. They created this reality through redistricting in 2011 and we are left with a broken system today. We cannot allow the INGOP to continue taking the power away from you, the voter. Indiana Republicans are on notice that their time of extreme partisanship and misinformation needs to come to an end. Democrats and Hoosiers know Indiana is at its strongest when there are two strong political parties because that's when the right solution - not a partisan one - solves today's problems facing their families. It's time for fair maps and a better future for Hoosiers. **\- Opportunities -** **\- County Party Trainings -** **** Join Indiana Democratic Party for a presentation on campaign finance for county party chairs and treasurers.
Please email Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Campaign%20Finance%20Training%20Sign-Up) for sign-up information. **_This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers._** **__** Join Indiana Democratic Party for a training on what party chairs should know about reprecincting and local office redistricting. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 9/16/21.
Please email Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Reprecincting%20Training%20Sign-Up) for sign-up information. **_This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers._** _**-Save the date-**_ **Warrick County Democrats:** [Golf Outing](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551364/305413453/-852996682?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22group%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.09.10.21=FFF.09.10.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzY1MmE0Yy02OTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zm8VIzdxJmnkpEjrlpmO7hp7vLKzsjRKibyDzsyPQdI=&emci=f86ef26e-8211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3652a4c-6912-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535), September 10, 11:30 AM, Quail Crossing Golf Club, 5 Quail Crossing Dr. Boonville, IN

**Steuben County Democratic Party:** [SCDP Celebration Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551371/305413497/-194752424?FFF.09.10.21=FFF.09.10.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzY1MmE0Yy02OTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zm8VIzdxJmnkpEjrlpmO7hp7vLKzsjRKibyDzsyPQdI=&emci=f86ef26e-8211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3652a4c-6912-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535), September 10, 5:30PM - 7:30 PM, Selman Pavilion at Commons Park, 299 S John St, Angola, IN 46703
