clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- September 10, 2021- \- Governor Holcomb, INGOP Wave White Flag on COVID-19 - It's simple: Governor Eric Holcomb has not held a press briefing about Indiana's fight against COVID-19 for more than 164 days - leaving Hoosiers in the dark as cases, hospitalizations, and deaths are up across Indiana. The Indiana Democratic Party will continue this call until the Governor puts his partisanship aside in favor of science-based facts. The last time Indiana experienced a surge like this the Governor described Indiana as being "on fire", yet, Holcomb is still refusing to hold something as simple as a press briefing or town hall on the pandemic. It's as if Gov. Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have given up on the pandemic altogether. The fact is, Governor Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have not proactively promoted vaccines online or in public since April and instead, have been more focused on photo-ops instead of helping Hoosier families put the COVID-19 pandemic in the rearview mirror. Now more than ever Hoosiers are seeking leadership from Holcomb and want to know what it'll take to end COVID for good. But right now, Hoosiers are hearing what amounts to silence. Indiana Democrats have been working overtime to try and put COVID-19 behind us. Under President Joe Biden's leadership, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan and delivered much-needed relief for every Zipcode in Indiana, including shots in arms and stimulus checks for families. Democrats are meeting Hoosiers where they are and providing honest conversations and solutions about today's most pressing problems facing their families. \- See You at the Statehouse - Indiana redistricting starts next week on September 14th. Hoosiers will finally have a chance to see this decade's legislative maps, however, it's going to be very clear that Indiana Republicans want to continue the status quo and manipulate the system against voters for another 10 years. Voters are tired of the same canned lies from politicians, their families consistently falling short while others get ahead, and being lied to when it matters most. Indiana Democrats agree, and it's why we called for a genuine conversation about redistricting and the partisan gerrymandering the Indiana Republican Party has executed this fall. We believe that now is the chance to have fair elections, fair maps, and the opportunity for Hoosier voters to decide the future of Indiana -- NOT the other way around. For the last 10 years, Indiana Republicans created a "work more for less" economy, underfunded the state's public schools, and promoted unnecessary culture wars that divided families and communities in all 92 counties. All of this falls squarely on the Indiana Republican Party. They created this reality through redistricting in 2011 and we are left with a broken system today. We cannot allow the INGOP to continue taking the power away from you, the voter. Indiana Republicans are on notice that their time of extreme partisanship and misinformation needs to come to an end. Democrats and Hoosiers know Indiana is at its strongest when there are two strong political parties because that's when the right solution - not a partisan one - solves today's problems facing their families. It's time for fair maps and a better future for Hoosiers. \- Opportunities - \- County Party Trainings - ** Join Indiana Democratic Party for a presentation on campaign finance for county party chairs and treasurers. Please email Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Campaign%20Finance%20Training%20Sign-Up for sign-up information. This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers. Join Indiana Democratic Party for a training on what party chairs should know about reprecincting and local office redistricting. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 9/16/21. Please email Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Reprecincting%20Training%20Sign-Up for sign-up information. This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers. -Save the date- Warrick County Democrats: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22group%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.09.10.21=FFF.09.10.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzY1MmE0Yy02OTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zm8VIzdxJmnkpEjrlpmO7hp7vLKzsjRKibyDzsyPQdI=&emci=f86ef26e-8211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3652a4c-6912-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535, September 10, 11:30 AM, Quail Crossing Golf Club, 5 Quail Crossing Dr. Boonville, IN Steuben County Democratic Party: , September 10, 5:30PM - Friend,

For far too long, the filibuster rules have allowed a small minority in the Senate to stop our government from getting anything done -- even on basic issues that the overwhelming majority of Americans support.

**We are the only democracy in the world that routinely requires a supermajority vote for basic legislation.** And as a result, almost nothing gets done, urgent problems are left unsolved, and people continue to lose faith in our government and our democracy.

**We have an opportunity to change that by electing Conor to the Senate in 2022.** This is the most important Senate race in the country, and Conor's vote could break the gridlock on important issues like voting rights, democratic reforms, and many others.

At a time when our democracy is under attack, the American people need to know that our government can still function to protect their right to vote, to organize and bargain in the workplace, to make a living wage, to have affordable health care, to live in safe communities.

The House has passed legislation on all these issues and more -- many with bipartisan support -- only to see them die in the Senate because the filibuster allows even one single Senator to stop a bill in its tracks. That's not democracy.

We need leaders who will step up and do what it takes to end the gridlock and start getting things done. And that's exactly what we'll get when we elect Conor Lamb in the Senate.

**Conor is ready to win this race, but special interests will spend millions in this race attacking Conor and trying to keep our government in gridlock. We need to raise enough money to compete, and we can't do that without your help.**

**[We need Conor Lamb in the Senate to help strengthen our democracy and get things done for working families. Can you chip just $5 or whatever you can to make sure he can keep helping all of us get a fair shot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551915/305415533/773704285?refcode=em21_210910_EndFilibuster&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVkMDAwMi02YTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iErB74m4HdFRxDfR0S2lrMM1tC-ArH2JJ-X5rtGNyjU=)**

Thanks for your support -- it's never been more important.

\-- Team Lamb

body:
I refuse to stand by while Arizona Republicans bring the worst of other states' extremism to our doorstep
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551927/305415570/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjVkMDAwMi02YTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i5YlveY1yrePYo_P6k9bjbaNjXx0imIbOU66_ZZbdc=)

Friend, the stakes of our race for governor just skyrocketed – and we have to take them extremely seriously.
**The Supreme Court's failure to intervene in Texas' horrific anti-abortion law is a disgrace – or, as Justice Sotomayor called it, "a breathtaking act of defiance" of the Constitution. And now, our extremist opponent is following in Doug Ducey's (R) footsteps by calling for a similar abortion ban _right here in Arizona._**
**I refuse to stand by while Arizona Republicans bring the worst of other states' extremism to our doorstep so they can strip millions of women of their rights. I'm running for governor to build a state that works for all people – but I can't hold GOP extremists back by myself. I need you with me, friend. [Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to help me flip Arizona blue, defeat GOP extremism and defend reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551931/305415571/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjVkMDAwMi02YTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i5YlveY1yrePYo_P6k9bjbaNjXx0imIbOU66_ZZbdc=)**
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551932/305415574/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjVkMDAwMi02YTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i5YlveY1yrePYo_P6k9bjbaNjXx0imIbOU66_ZZbdc=)
---
We elect leaders to protect and expand our rights – never to take them away. Yet when our extremist GOP opponent saw Texas leaders attacking reproductive rights and denying abortion access, she said, _"Well done, Texas. Arizona next."_
**Let me be clear: If we flip Arizona and I become governor, I will absolutely not be taking my cues from the draconian anti-choice "leaders" who just ripped away a woman's right to choose in Texas. I'll take them from Arizona voters – a majority of whom support Roe v. Wade. **
But Arizona is already 2022's top battleground, and POLITICO says the Republican establishment is piling up MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me – to defeat our movement. **I'm not waiting on some shady megadonors in the wings to power our campaign. I'm relying on YOU.[So please, will you rush as much as you can by midnight tonight to help me flip Arizona blue, protect abortion rights and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35551933/305415575/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk205-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjVkMDAwMi02YTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i5YlveY1yrePYo_P6k9bjbaNjXx0imIbOU66_ZZbdc=)**

body:
A better tomorrow is what we all seek, but we cannot get there if career politicians only want to pull us down. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f09b8f2c97c49d39e1df046de2f975f&_e=Hppja4uNg-gQP3HDOOSZi1VqRy6R5fnoTCn4ILvcVeNLKHM7-YmqGJsvsozzn8tGP_eYunp4VhUCujDTn4_jf_7iHDCx4DB0cgl_XM64WQZsYbgwdcGe71NtKpKqlqwSKMxup-yMkaxtMRoWg3ZourmUum1vZqEVKhOAHW0Jc-o8ay15lwsSsG38GmX7feK45d3GzuxdH9ZRmDuOS-94wfdHLFq5YYq6HmxtyCsYRI6w28-cZmaobZ-lpek7ozWvJxeKyo6ingo88-mElU0odq-JOl4cQNZCqUVzq7gWxfF7yTTtiGkkD6NlKRDZtXcTipZGPfzIip1JHmoUDX2JosAMGRnER8P4pgIF6yND4-deA79bycXgksr81SDUTi0UQC6UP3kui9y_u7Iu6vml85Y-Pe7TamzEZu_u_Jqkgoi53fYtOtUmBaTny19Zt1YgO7Dl9Wzh-sn7VJj-dJ_QSe90_QHjBBmqqn2OkYQpVS0%3D)

Peter- Do you want a better tomorrow?

I know this might sound like an odd question, but I’m asking because so much of our society is so preoccupied with the “here and now” that they’re forgetting about tomorrow. Future generations are relying on our actions today to decided what the land of the free will look like when they come of age.

**I’m James Tarantin, and I want a better tomorrow. I want a better tomorrow for my two sons. I want a better tomorrow for you and your family, especially one where you’re not harassed for being Republican. I want a better tomorrow for our nation, not a future polluted by job loss, crime, and woke politics telling us we’re not good people if we believe in being one nation under God.**

[**I want to heal this nation, but we can’t do that when we have extreme liberals and career politicians telling us we live in a nation that’s not worth healing.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f09b8f2c97c49d39e1df046de2f975f&_e=Hppja4uNg-gQP3HDOOSZi1VqRy6R5fnoTCn4ILvcVeNLKHM7-YmqGJsvsozzn8tGP_eYunp4VhUCujDTn4_jf_7iHDCx4DB0cgl_XM64WQZsYbgwdcGe71NtKpKqlqwSKMxup-yMkaxtMRoWg3ZourmUum1vZqEVKhOAHW0Jc-o8ay15lwsSsG38GmX7feK45d3GzuxdH9ZRmDuOS-94wfdHLFq5YYq6HmxtyCsYRI6w28-cZmaobZ-lpek7ozWvJxeKyo6ingo88-mElU0odnyYq0WVGvpCpIeoEsPKIJB8zCP5i7O2BW_Jm7SCCsT8AhdygBSSdwhG8yVGCaqfQJb-LGrtkxRAtLgpmQnYGOEcLGGqi08Q-pv6_1cbCrLQAbchse4LHylBOha7PZVgynsv_fJtMuStlYa85KamRTfT_tWgipsnkZpNVTougb-xUd3asyL0xcnjP4LnkqnrrdOvVNNdsrKFP0GjW61eZ44%3D)
**Our America is not racist, our America does not hate immigrants, and our America stands up for all people regardless of income or where you’re from.** I know because I’m an immigrant who came to this nation alone, without any family, and unafraid because __this is America, the land of opportunity.__

Not a single person can tell me America isn’t the greatest nation when someone like me was able to become a citizen, a business owner, and to create my own American dream just by working hard to succeed. **If I can do it, then anyone can**.

**For too long, extreme liberals have used tactics of fear to convince people that our America isn’t the land of the free when we both know that’s a lie.** The future of America is free and full of opportunity, but we cannot get there if we continue to let career politicians and extreme liberals burn down our futures in order to benefit themselves.

[**I want to heal this nation from the inside out, but to guarantee a better tomorrow we must retire these politicians who are out of touch with the hardworking Americans that run this nation.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f09b8f2c97c49d39e1df046de2f975f&_e=Hppja4uNg-gQP3HDOOSZi1VqRy6R5fnoTCn4ILvcVeNLKHM7-YmqGJsvsozzn8tGP_eYunp4VhUCujDTn4_jf_7iHDCx4DB0cgl_XM64WQZsYbgwdcGe71NtKpKqlqwSKMxup-yMkaxtMRoWg3ZourmUum1vZqEVKhOAHW0Jc-o8ay15lwsSsG38GmX7feK45d3GzuxdH9ZRmDuOS-94wfdHLFq5YYq6HmxtyCsYRI6w28-cZmaobZ-lpek7ozWvJxeKyo6ingo88-mElU0odr1zCihqxJ30y64wu6q5Lujvp8Mh6PDYVFCfvp8un7NojGc85QG1x3aTT8xBvjUZgVCbur1CTwMx8vA5kce86g13qVnTFY9SMZnFrnkyPvhvDXlM2r9ar8Da6q6VzpdrWDTJcitgno9ftpzg5XCngsph2h_eWPXnoxFfAP8p8Y7emi8BiGZ6Zg5Z1o_jsG5pWyS-LRfQFwIWaLsTBFKA2wA%3D)

I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland because the extreme liberals currently elected care more about being politicians than uplifting America. [**Will you help me unseat a 30-year career politician so we can finally get our nation back on track?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f09b8f2c97c49d39e1df046de2f975f&_e=Hppja4uNg-gQP3HDOOSZi1VqRy6R5fnoTCn4ILvcVeNLKHM7-YmqGJsvsozzn8tGP_eYunp4VhUCujDTn4_jf_7iHDCx4DB0cgl_XM64WQZsYbgwdcGe71NtKpKqlqwSKMxup-yMkaxtMRoWg3ZourmUum1vZqEVKhOAHW0Jc-o8ay15lwsSsG38GmX7feK45d3GzuxdH9ZRmDuOS-94wfdHLFq5YYq6HmxtyCsYRI6w28-cZmaobZ-lpek7ozWvJxeKyo6ingo88-mElU0odhxpUD1idb2-8njDNDc5T0aQiob_a-zNqk_vsvzYihVy5LG0kvzdeWCYt-kPNy6IDIqeL3nynmx7p5pYsEyc60H1B8I0gEmblAf2O8m7zbkyBAE4PAwp1ZtJvMbxi6-QC0lSl2csAZH7LXcJodztfjyz5524eZ4HSXfuiAkffk6irM49d2wdEFXdyyNbZgrz7-M8bNVOsOWwNK1V-1FDqM0%3D)

We are only as strong as those we surround ourselves with and [**I need you on my team Peter**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f09b8f2c97c49d39e1df046de2f975f&_e=Hppja4uNg-gQP3HDOOSZi1VqRy6R5fnoTCn4ILvcVeNLKHM7-YmqGJsvsozzn8tGP_eYunp4VhUCujDTn4_jf_7iHDCx4DB0cgl_XM64WQZsYbgwdcGe71NtKpKqlqwSKMxup-yMkaxtMRoWg3ZourmUum1vZqEVKhOAHW0Jc-o8ay15lwsSsG38GmX7feK45d3GzuxdH9ZRmDuOS-94wfdHLFq5YYq6HmxtyCsYRI6w28-cZmaobZ-lpek7ozWvJxeKyo6ingo88-mElU0odhhwHqgRgyspB1RTYsLPhUcUyO-Oviit0UYQTXsZZ6cEopdJ-nm3GSH-HosnAccs5BfdAh-K_B32yLkRN6LhTjmZ3PgXl-181ixR0c7errAKNOPbT_99UOJ9j57f0yER8iKi6WfSTpNI_mXACVACuiaG0tP2YF2L7KH8tyAC5vrykCqXraZTG_1SSeGU0WEvlMkUhL65WZiVbewdreK6GEc%3D), because I need Republicans with determination and good hearts to fight for America, to heal America, and to stop extreme liberals from dismantling our future just for political gain.

**We cannot allow America to be consumed by joblessness, crime, and self-destruction at the hands of those in our nation’s capital who are ashamed of the America we know and love.** Help me fight for free speech, school choice, our houses of worship, and for a free America. I’m a Republican because I know even if I had nothing, I’d be better off in the land of the free than anywhere else in the world.

[**Join me in this fight for our nation so we can ensure a better tomorrow for the nation we love. Together we can do this.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f09b8f2c97c49d39e1df046de2f975f&_e=Hppja4uNg-gQP3HDOOSZi1VqRy6R5fnoTCn4ILvcVeNLKHM7-YmqGJsvsozzn8tGP_eYunp4VhUCujDTn4_jf_7iHDCx4DB0cgl_XM64WQZsYbgwdcGe71NtKpKqlqwSKMxup-yMkaxtMRoWg3ZourmUum1vZqEVKhOAHW0Jc-o8ay15lwsSsG38GmX7feK45d3GzuxdH9ZRmDuOS-94wfdHLFq5YYq6HmxtyCsYRI6w28-cZmaobZ-lpek7ozWvJxeKyo6ingo88-mElU0odk20IWwWY-Jc-KNPrMeejNsVpuzpmWPH5eEslBsoJ_1cwZeFkWJFKeHQM9GW55xX6Zz0uVaTJFigRWydBnQtv_DTJ_ebY7jqPwPAD-hGoxIeCP7n74dND3zzHRjHGlHi2isTbNGItqGdL73T0deSz50oEBd4hrMMqDupSK9kr9EeTPhVDPlXB2UUfFAg-QpflmUtrxuvFe1LfEISN2UJubA%3D)

clean_body: A better tomorrow is what we all seek, but we cannot get there if career politicians only want to pull us down. | Peter- Do you want a better tomorrow? I know this might sound like an odd question, but I’m asking because so much of our society is so preoccupied with the “here and now” that they’re forgetting about tomorrow. Future generations are relying on our actions today to decided what the land of the free will look like when they come of age. I’m James Tarantin, and I want a better tomorrow. I want a better tomorrow for my two sons. I want a better tomorrow for you and your family, especially one where you’re not harassed for being Republican. I want a better tomorrow for our nation, not a future polluted by job loss, crime, and woke politics telling us we’re not good people if we believe in being one nation under God. Our America is not racist, our America does not hate immigrants, and our America stands up for all people regardless of income or where you’re from. I know because I’m an immigrant who came to this nation alone, without any family, and unafraid because this is America, the land of opportunity. Not a single person can tell me America isn’t the greatest nation when someone like me was able to become a citizen, a business owner, and to create my own American dream just by working hard to succeed. If I can do it, then anyone can. For too long, extreme liberals have used tactics of fear to convince people that our America isn’t the land of the free when we both know that’s a lie. The future of America is free and full of opportunity, but we cannot get there if we continue to let career politicians and extreme liberals burn down our futures in order to benefit themselves. I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland because the extreme liberals currently elected care more about being politicians than uplifting America. We are only as strong as those we surround ourselves with and , because I need Republicans with determination and good hearts to fight for America, to heal America, and to stop extreme liberals from dismantling our future just for political gain. We cannot allow America to be consumed by joblessness, crime, and self-destruction at the hands of those in our nation’s capital who are ashamed of the America we know and love. Help me fight for free speech, school choice, our houses of worship, and for a free America. I’m a Republican because I know even if I had nothing, I’d be better off in the land of the free than anywhere else in the world. Together we can do this. | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
#

Ted Cruz’s famous lack of empathy is on display again:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35552217/305416699/451935881?refcode2=7bd94044-6b12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmQ5NDA0NC02YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Ac-RZ4IjqDLJmC2wdSIXqhZURkNFSruf8ej__D2YGE=)
**Look — it’s a market failure that Americans re-entering the workforce are forced to make starvation wages, plain and simple. No one should be working full time and still be unable to pay their bills.**
If Ted Cruz were serious about Americans getting back to work, he would join me and my Democratic colleagues in supporting a $15 minimum wage.
But let’s be honest — Ted Cruz has never been known for his compassion or commitment to his constituents. Earlier this year, he flew to Cancún during a devastating winter storm that caused mass power outages across Texas and left millions of his constituents in the cold.
**[I’m not afraid to go up against bullies like Ted Cruz to push for a $15 federal minimum wage. Can you make a contribution to stand with me in favor of a living wage for all working Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35552218/305416700/451935881?refcode2=7bd94044-6b12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmQ5NDA0NC02YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Ac-RZ4IjqDLJmC2wdSIXqhZURkNFSruf8ej__D2YGE=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35552219/305416701/451935881?refcode2=7bd94044-6b12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmQ5NDA0NC02YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Ac-RZ4IjqDLJmC2wdSIXqhZURkNFSruf8ej__D2YGE=)**
I was proud to help pass the American Rescue Plan earlier this year, which extended robust unemployment payments to help Americans who continue to struggle during the pandemic.
I’m alarmed that millions of Americans will be struggling to make ends meet now that these payments have expired — and the fact that Ted Cruz isn’t reflects how little he cares about his role as a public servant.
**[I’m supporting a $15 minimum wage so that no American has to work full time only to still come up short on funds every month, and I’ll keep fighting to make it happen no matter what people like Ted Cruz have to say.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35552220/305416702/451935881?refcode2=7bd94044-6b12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmQ5NDA0NC02YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Ac-RZ4IjqDLJmC2wdSIXqhZURkNFSruf8ej__D2YGE=)**
If you’re able, please make a contribution here to support my fight for a $15 federal minimum wage.
Thank you for reading,
Mondaire

clean_body: Ted Cruz’s famous lack of empathy is on display again: = Look — it’s a market failure that Americans re-entering the workforce are forced to make starvation wages, plain and simple. No one should be working full time and still be unable to pay their bills. If Ted Cruz were serious about Americans getting back to work, he would join me and my Democratic colleagues in supporting a $15 minimum wage. But let’s be honest — Ted Cruz has never been known for his compassion or commitment to his constituents. Earlier this year, he flew to Cancún during a devastating winter storm that caused mass power outages across Texas and left millions of his constituents in the cold. = = I was proud to help pass the American Rescue Plan earlier this year, which extended robust unemployment payments to help Americans who continue to struggle during the pandemic. I’m alarmed that millions of Americans will be struggling to make ends meet now that these payments have expired — and the fact that Ted Cruz isn’t reflects how little he cares about his role as a public servant. = If you’re able, please make a contribution here to support my fight for a $15 federal minimum wage. Thank you for reading, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Team Nelson
subject: corporations need to be held accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Team,

Here in Wisconsin, multiple manufacturing plants closed in _just one month_ , costing hundreds of people their jobs.

Despite devastating Wisconsin families, these same companies are getting tax breaks — taking money and services from working families and helping executives get richer at our expense.

The bottom line is this: we need to either tie tax breaks to investment and job creation or toss them out altogether. If you aren’t helping our economy, you shouldn’t expect our tax breaks. Corporations need to be held accountable — but the only way that can happen is by electing leaders who will fight for what’s best for voters, instead of only serving big companies and their lobbyists.

It’s time for change, and Tom is ready to fight for hard-working Wisconsinites as our next Senator. He even wrote an op-ed about the need for reform _(read it at the bottom of the email)_ :
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35552821/305418306/-1560481487?amount=5&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210910_1_1&refcode2=f87a34b8-6c12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdhMzRiOC02YzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1_UZhBh-BZLxrkRiBc8iYTyg_66zl4ej6RrgunANZao=)

---

Thanks for your support,

Team Nelson

**TOM’S OP-ED:**

Wisconsin is one of the top manufacturing states in the country, with more than 9,300 companies supporting 483,000 jobs. That should come as no surprise. We make everything: lawn mowers, snow blowers, toilet paper, toweling, tractors, planes, engines, trailers, speed boats, motorcycles, battleships, and yes, cheese.

Although we remain a strong center in the manufacturing world, we have begun to lose our past prominence.

In one month, our state lost three manufacturing plants supporting more than 500 jobs. In Janesville, Hufcor, thanks to its parent owner OpenGate Capital, is heading south of the border. In the Fox River Valley, Clearwater paper of Neenah shut down a facility last month, and a few weeks ago Neenah Inc. announced plans to close its Appleton plant.

Since the early 1970s, our engine companies, paper makers, defense contractors and other manufacturers have paid no property taxes. At the same time, Wisconsin manufacturers pay an effective corporate tax of 0.4%. These two mammoth corporate tax breaks take billions of dollars of tax revenue that fund important public services that benefit all members of the community, including manufacturers and their employees.

These deep tax cuts, which are intended to be reinvested in business innovation and workers, are instead being siphoned off by executives and their stockholders. Money that should be kept in Wisconsin communities is being sent out of the state and even out of the country. Whatever their excuse, their motive is the same: greed.

For Hufcor, the tax breaks were not enough. They are simply moving to Mexico for the cheap labor, a common strategy among American manufacturers to cut costs, jack up profits and increase shareholder value — all at the expense of the American worker. Indeed, Wisconsin alone lost 46,000-plus manufacturing jobs since the North American Free Trade Agreement went into effect in 1994. This is a point John Nichols has forcefully and rightfully been making for the last quarter-century.

Clearwater Paper, which makes essential material for face coverings, folded up shop, saying they wanted to get out of this lucrative market. What they really wanted to do was to cut labor costs by getting out of town. The Washington state-based company was turning their attention elsewhere, investing $330 million into their southern non-union facility, which pays lower wages.

Neenah Inc., which was born in the Fox Valley but is now headquartered in Georgia, betrayed the people of its hometown just to make a quick buck. By closing its Appleton facility, the company estimated they make an annual profit of $7 million to $8 million, a drop in the bucket for a company worth $870 million. They, like Clearwater, are investing in their southern, non-union facility too.

We need to either tie tax breaks to investment and job creation or toss them out altogether. Neither the property tax break nor income tax cut are currently contingent on any kind of economic activity.

Companies that shutter facilities should not be allowed to force non-compete clauses on buyers — those clauses prevent new owners from running the facility as it is intended. This kind of behavior is deliberately and explicitly anti-competition. It keeps new entrants out of the market and consolidates market share, destroying local jobs and making products more expensive for consumers.

Workers’ interest should be protected at every turn. They must at the very least be afforded a robust package of worker retraining and unemployment compensation that matches their foregone income and, most importantly, their benefits, especially health insurance.

And corporations should be held to account. More and more companies are shirking their responsibility for Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) compliance, often closing facilities sooner than the required 60 days. This activity is illegal according to existing law, and there must be stiffer penalties for violators.

These reforms fit nicely with pro-labor legislation circulating in the U.S. Congress and should not be a heavy lift. Then again, with Ron Johnson as our senior U.S. senator — a person who once equated the paper industry with the Boogie Whip — we should not be so bullish. But you get what you give. Election day is right around the corner and Johnson is well past expiration date.

Despite devastating Wisconsin families, these same companies are getting tax breaks — taking money and services from working families and helping executives get richer at our expense. clean_body: they ignore science and reason | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Have you seen the news from Australia? You can barely even leave your house anymore. Lockdowns are severe. Travel is restricted. Government tracking apps follow your every move. I fully believe if we don’t fight against the petty tyrants like Biden and Fauci, we could well be next. Over the past 18 months, our government has tried to destroy businesses and schools through lockdowns, mandates and other foolishness. They ignore science. They ignore the harm they are doing. They just want you to comply. You and I need to keep standing together to fight back and to make sure we don’t follow the path Australia followed. I need you to stand with me while I fight. | | ** Do you know how many people in office are TRULY willing to stand up to Biden and Fauci, stand up to local petty tyrants, stand up to those who would seek to control us and do us harm? It is surprisingly few, but I’m one of them. And for that, I've become a target of the entire left wing machine including their allies in the media. They attack me non-stop. But I don’t let it bother me or stop me. But what I do know is that means I need to raise the funds to fight back and get my message out to the public. | | | | | ** I hope you’ll help today. You can see how I am fighting for you every day. I hope you’ll continue to stand with me now. In Liberty, Rand Paul MD | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Democracy reform is hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZIB0U-iZxE77S_IF4gzP4lVg50MLCc7b2eOGa9_iWUc=/3JoBsGE0fjEQtZXNfy71-KQk8sKrrY4wUrpQpgR91kQ=?refcode=em21_210910_Crow_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210910_Crow_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)
Peter,

My friend Jason Crow is a veteran, father, and dedicated public servant. It's an honor to serve alongside him in Congress, and together we're fighting hard to deliver results for hardworking families across the nation.

Congressman Jason Crow and I both know that if our government isn't working for the people, then it's not really working at all. That's why Jason served as an impeachment manager in President Trump's trial and has worked hard to pass democracy reform legislation like the For the People Act.

But I have to be honest with you, Peter: defending our democracy is hard work. If we're going to keep making our government work better, we need to defend the House majority, including Jason's district in Colorado.

**[So, I'm asking: can I count on you to split a donation of $10 between Jason's campaign and ours? Help us protect our majority so we can keep fighting for a government that works for all of us.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZIB0U-iZxE77S_IF4gzP4lVg50MLCc7b2eOGa9_iWUc=/3JoBsGE0fjEQtZXNfy71-KQk8sKrrY4wUrpQpgR91kQ=?refcode=em21_210910_Crow_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210910_Crow_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer and Jason Crow are leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support their grassroots campaigns.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZIB0U-iZxE77S_IF4gzP4lVg50MLCc7b2eOGa9_iWUc=/3JoBsGE0fjEQtZXNfy71-KQk8sKrrY4wUrpQpgR91kQ=?refcode=em21_210910_Crow_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210910_Crow_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

Peter,

This summer flew by! I hope that you were able to enjoy the beautiful weather and spend time with friends and loved ones. As we return to work and school, we also need to double down on our fundraising.
In fact, our next FEC filing deadline is just a few weeks away at the end of the month. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5 or more right away to ensure we have the resources to keep Susan in office. In 2020, Susan won one of the closest House races in the entire country — and we’re anticipating an even closer race in 2022. We’re already seeing outside Republican groups pour thousands of dollars into attack ads against Susan right here in the district, and that’s on top of Susan’s far-right extremist opponent spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on her own campaign.
Susan depends on grassroots supporters like you to fight back against these conservative attacks. Please, consider making a contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare right away. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-swc-q3-2021-donate?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210910-1-EM&amount=5]

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=821%2E3611125%2El9ZIvx ][IMG]

Hey there folks,

I need to make sure you saw my team’s message about the new poll in our
race.

ICYMI: I’m leading Republican JD Vance by just one point for Ohio’s open
Senate seat!

I know we have what it takes to win this seat, expand our Democratic
Senate majority and finally cut workers in on the deal -- and now this new
poll proves it.

But this is one of the most competitive races anywhere in the country, and
we’ll need all the help we can get to overcome the millions of dollars
national Republicans are pouring into this race. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2681?t=1007&akid=821%2E3611125%2El9ZIvx ]Can I count on you to
chip in $5 or more today?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2681?t=1008&akid=821%2E3611125%2El9ZIvx ]Donate

Flipping this seat blue won’t be easy, and the only way we can win is if
folks like you step up with grassroots support. So, I’m really counting on
you to come through today.

Thank you,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2682?t=1010&akid=821%2E3611125%2El9ZIvx ]Help Tim keep the lead!

New polling shows that no matter the matchup, if the race for Ohio’s
Senate seat were held today, the outcome would be within single digits. In
fact, Tim leads Republican JD Vance by just one point.

Vance has a $10 million billionaire-funded super PAC behind him and Tim’s
other GOP opponents are multi-millionaires able to self-fund their
campaigns. This poll is truly a testament to the power of our grassroots
campaign!

Tim Ryan has what it takes to flip this open Senate seat BLUE and expand
our Democratic Senate majority, but in a battleground race like this one,

subject: POLL: Should Ohio legalize marijuana?

body:
If you’re ready to legalize marijuana, you’re ready for John Cranley. | Friend, Did you know that the states that have legalized marijuana sales have generated nearly **_$8 billion_** in tax revenue? That’s money that can go into infrastructure — building new roads or repairing failing bridges — or improving public schools and social services for underserved communities. The evidence is in: Marijuana legalization _benefits_ states that pass it — and John Cranley will prioritize legalization in Ohio as our governor. Now, we want to hear from you, friend: | **Do you support marijuana legalization in Ohio?**
Yes!

Thanks for being on our team, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: I'm no stranger to tough races

body:
#

Hi there — It's Katie Porter.
I'm not one to beat around the bush. So let me get right to it: [**I’m asking you to donate to Alex Padilla's reelection campaign. Together we can send Alex back to the Senate where he will continue to fight for change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210910-1-15&t=1&refcode2=302_159979_Tw3BLZ&akid=302%2E159979%2ETw3BLZ)
Your support today is so important, because now more than ever we need bold, progressive Democrats like Alex in the Senate.
Right now in California, we are facing a brutal Recall — one that is led by anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.
We cannot allow them to succeed, because if they do they will use their newfound power to come for Alex’s seat next. That’s why it’s so important that he has your support not just today but over the next year as well.
**And I know if all of us chip in a few bucks today and show Alex we have his back, he’s going to win.
[**So please, do your part today by joining me and chipping in $5 or $10 to Alex Padilla’s reelection campaign. Together we can send Alex back to the Senate where he will continue to fight for change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210910-1-15&t=2&refcode2=302_159979_Tw3BLZ&akid=302%2E159979%2ETw3BLZ)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: 34 is part of who I am
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae96467fb77a4e11bf99c6b9077c78f6&_e=R76MAB7JYhQTpZ_owhDXUrPzFQsJsVmqRe9KOHzhe5C1WDlm8D3PElZ3l76m1UrBLsWj5O7dkWEBSgXaodf4jkTrjD4BmItJXY5KOPs3yphsv-8YJgldDg-aylJIhGHZx98mj_FcVj5mQcfxT7agygA-L2Ih2hTm2ARn2sT7LgK-XrTklCnyt9NGnjKjV3FNPYaC4dQFZ6EtpBL9DUAv-hzFuMlYiQj2lGELCP1dPxoWl3gr5cjjlAXksYn3wQNP6L-_AF6ZDn_O7rC6FUwbX5aixo9LdzY1Q0tncIcjJiF8zZtHTAzyJLnS9ltlW4KMWDwN6HvmX520jQNUH53HuGZz_sRSreUfOoRLvW-UlCKLFaZH57ES-EFjkLOHP0QMH2g2QYq9-5yn7kIO3OatK4ykY6sAtlGXIVuyZzK23X_eFcOfFFod00QibeTevhT6ZxI5x090FMoSeXinw8LnwA%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae96467fb77a4e11bf99c6b9077c78f6&_e=R76MAB7JYhQTpZ_owhDXUrPzFQsJsVmqRe9KOHzhe5C1WDlm8D3PElZ3l76m1UrBLsWj5O7dkWEBSgXaodf4jkTrjD4BmItJXY5KOPs3yphsv-8YJgldDg-aylJIhGHZx98mj_FcVj5mQcfxT7agygA-L2Ih2hTm2ARn2sT7LgK-XrTklCnyt9NGnjKjV3FNPYaC4dQFZ6EtpBL9DUAv-hzFuMlYiQj2lGELCP1dPxoWl3gr5cjjlAXksYn3wQNPPOZ9Ad8W28DI-3A34N8G8LOGIMpp-sJqtwOg92T8rtcEuYEdl5VqMFR9Svzzs9KjKHYi_UinPaDxElLXZrNv-7Pbzs_tBAnuzBkSfM94ayNdewHzGJm4d7cvVNbK_UyXDzJUBs3Ixxc9VGXX1eAdIrnPTWJ3rIguKs6pfzE6Rk6RG1Kc_zHf8LS5WSHCs-kUHcujlMn-SChYiI0myYFuSQ%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

subject: Reelect our pro-choice Democratic women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat. We need to reelect Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, Tammy Duckworth in Illinois, Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, and Patty Murray right here in Washington state -- or Mitch McConnell’s anti-abortion GOP will flip the Senate.
#
Peter,
Conservatives just made their boldest attack on Roe v. Wade yet with Texas’ radical anti-abortion law -- and the U.S. Supreme Court stood by and did nothing about it.
_This is a five alarm emergency._ And right now, one of the best ways we can fight back is to ensure our pro-choice Democratic women in the Senate are equipped to beat the GOP.
**Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat.** We need to reelect Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, Tammy Duckworth in Illinois, Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, and Patty Murray right here in Washington state -- or Mitch McConnell’s anti-abortion GOP will flip the Senate.
**[Will you rush in a $5 contribution to reelect our pro-choice Democratic women?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35556805/305433770/382418420?refcode=pm_em_210910_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWQ0NC03OTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsIynK5obzuxlWvmRFzkcgG6nV3bGiIVvHKIBIOd9iI=)**
Mitch McConnell and the Republicans are already plotting to take back the Senate in 2022.
They know that with the Senate majority, they can enact their extreme agenda on everything from undermining reproductive rights to picking and choosing who can exercise their vote.
Democratic Senators like Maggie, Tammy, Catherine, and Patty are some of the biggest obstacles for the GOP’s anti-choice plans -- and they need our support to keep up the firewall.
****[Peter, please don’t delay -- the pro-choice Democratic Senate majority is at risk. Pitch in $5 or anything you can to reelect these pro-choice women to the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35556806/305433771/382418420?refcode=pm_em_210910_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWQ0NC03OTEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsIynK5obzuxlWvmRFzkcgG6nV3bGiIVvHKIBIOd9iI=)****
Thank you,
Team Patty

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: WaPo: Corporate America launches massive lobbying blitz to kill key parts of Democrats’ $3.5 trillion economic plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Big Pharma, big banks, tech giants and other corporate groups are fighting our jobs and families package, including its proposals for raising taxes.
#
Peter,
This headline from _The Washington Post_ says all too much about our democracy and my fight for working people.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-621&t=1&refcode2=621_420207__OILec&akid=621%2E420207%2E_OILec)
They’re at it again. The wealthiest and most powerful corporations in the country are working overtime to stop action on climate change, tax fairness, and long-overdue investments in health care, paid leave, child care, universal pre-K and more. **I’m fighting back but we’re up against a LOT.**
**[Can you fuel my fight to pass the $3.5 trillion Democratic spending bill with a $3 donation today? It’s going to take a massive effort by everyday folks to beat back the corporate power working against us. I’m leading the way and I won’t stop until we win — and until we deliver for the people.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-621&t=21&refcode2=621_420207__OILec&akid=621%2E420207%2E_OILec)**
**[Chip In, Fight Back »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-621&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=621_420207__OILec&akid=621%2E420207%2E_OILec)**
It’s obvious why Big Pharma, Wall Street, and Big Tech don’t want our progressive priorities to pass. Our agenda passing means they’ll have to pay their fair share in taxes and have less profits to dole out to their ultra-rich CEOs.
**This lobbying effort is yet another attempt by corporate America to stop economic and social benefits from reaching working people.** Corporations are even spreading misinformation about the $3.5 trillion spending bill in order to stop it.
Our democracy is already under threat because of serious voting restrictions in states across the country and nonstop GOP election lies. But now, corporations are shelling out millions to spread more lies and try to stop our fight for health care, the environment, child care, and education. We need to stand up and serve the interests of the people — not a few CEOs and billionaires.
**[I’m in this fight for our democracy and delivering for the people. Support our work with a contribution of $3 today. I don’t take a cent from the corporate PACs trying to stop our progressive agenda, so you know your donations will go right to making a real difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-621&t=23&refcode2=621_420207__OILec&akid=621%2E420207%2E_OILec)**
Together, we can pass this historic spending bill and win real benefits for working people across the country. It’s time.
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Chip In, Fight Back »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-621&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&refcode2=621_420207__OILec&akid=621%2E420207%2E_OILec)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210910-621-footer&t=25&refcode2=621_420207__OILec&akid=621%2E420207%2E_OILec)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: John Kasich
subject: May we never forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I had the privilege and honor of being at ground zero soon after the attack. I was brought to tears by the messages of children who had written notes [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9250457b5dbf440391ad73ef8d334815&_e=f36gsLOhhYO4kalC5PIYo8MACX81fo-mVKkUDqp1sEokZQQzLb19zwgU9jEE9s-sxR_lDF-tzm4SGQnwXNZBMD9bsNlyRqEsrPFRu3CmZvtzkGZuESyGQzHx1klq0r60TlcryhnT4TuEVTaCslym5ux4ho0K3i9O3zWGbos0hNndQLmQ1-awdKN5q26xdTdG-LCTLv25mF9iclzU08k_hURgcGaY6BfFsrxrwj4FNkRioICGyKOxukcG7h68PTJvJKlcXCWcrHzO1amtxMrXVA%3D%3D) Peter, as we pause to reflect on the 20th anniversary of the September 11, 2001 attacks, I wanted to share with you my experience from that day. If you're interested, I'd welcome you to respond to share your own story with me. I had the privilege and honor of being at ground zero soon after the attack. I was brought to tears by the messages of children who had written notes to their fathers, mothers and siblings and posted them at ground zero. And I was also so proud to witness the heroism and determination of the workers and rescue crews. It inspired me to no end. | |
---
It's critical in our country that we remember those who lost their lives and those who worked tirelessly to try to rescue people. That's important in America - that we move from a society of I to a society of WE.

Life is not just about us, but it's about others that are around us as well. Our ability to do better at thinking of others in our society will solve so many of the challenges that we face today.

May God bless the victims, their families and the many heroes from 9/11.

May we never forget.

-John
|
---

Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
candidate or candidate's committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnkasich.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_s=9250457b5dbf440391ad73ef8d334815&_t=Gp9px3uZqC-F9p7UsDZJKQziFIgEpLDJUEYEb18ClZIAc4XT50qxjUIduPTvzj13odgP2_YTyRRDqgRpgfIQ7Q0KIqDTj5xi23-eAvGaEnePjR_M9JHMyH7je0VZOme6qdD_pcspMIXS76FRGkwtcUbhprPr3PD_Jk2rHtDzXAc%3D)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Have you noticed decreasing patriotism?
body:
The story of America reveals a spirit of exploration, courage, and independence—from Christopher Columbus’s landing on San S
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhpf041clu7ntuvp87e6ubra779qkvp1801pbij0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cpg6eor2cdh2bs)

Dear Fellow American,

The story of America reveals a spirit of exploration, courage, and independence—from Christopher Columbus’s landing on San Salvador to Neil Armstrong’s first steps on the Moon.

Sadly, in many of our nation’s classrooms, these great stories of American achievement are either ignored or presented as evidence of America’s history of oppression and racism. The result is a generation of young Americans who have been robbed of a true account of history, which an American novelist argued serves as a “lifeline” that can stretch “across the scary present and get us past that idiot delusion of the exceptional Now that blocks good thinking.”

That’s why I wanted to invite you to join us in exploring the remarkable history of America in greater depth by enrolling in one of our most popular free online courses, **[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z74hqkvtk0v76noa5r7im3r2491j7uug31ke4sa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cpg6eor2cdh2bs)**

Taught by Hillsdale Professor of History Wilfred M. McClay, this 25-lesson course provides a narrative account of the history of America from its discovery to the present day.

Today is the perfect time to learn the true history of America and share it with your friends and family.

You may enroll in **[“The Great American Story”](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4emgmcjf2nir614e8ohefq2666b78994n1cjdog_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cpg6eor2cdh2bs)** and begin learning today by clicking on the secure link below.

[Activate your free course now »](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zch9l94tf01ah5ph9hun6ko0ce79a7pdjsjksug8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cpg6eor2cdh2bs)

I wish you all the best in your future studies.

Warm regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

* * *

## Watch the trailer now
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpua9rd6re9q5on2e4hsavg13mr4ievagm9fdeb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cpg6eor2cdh2bs)
* * *

## What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life." **\- Fred D.** "Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge." **\- John C.** [Activate your free course now »](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8q653bic13do7u8f1qr4akrp4i6nu60ckdnpkhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cpg6eor2cdh2bs) | | This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

name: Jim Jordan
subject: No. Mandatory. Vaccines.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Do you agree? Let me and my team know before midnight. . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=d444a5930d694c90ac175e72b85094a7&_t=H-c6lDYtvpsZSKdI-ZXL063ZjHCx-QN6aKF6IlqwtTjZHixVT-z0gw-_OyXQlGEINrRiQn9hwumrjwG9EPATarAoWvhPIy-089Z1dsYj0spLGyfxxADQ5KY5qwEdDMqaIzsqKNPF56vtrVty3ELmnv8w1_OinABrSsmNPcfuMFs%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d444a5930d694c90ac175e72b85094a7&_e=OD1z-jR5NavAeX7SfKCzKN5ubMXTakzy3EEOS6XxXTzhIoOcOW-_MrIeCWVxplMVD7-96uI2XEpr6XFd6ZOzrIkhZ5P8ihcCX0B_hHTsNx5YJM_5b-5apRtb5lWeu8sTZr4mo0oADdtdBQH7pvRtjlML8-aBQsY6QQZqey-9_XxKBN_TsPhWG7WQ3koDeeoZk11GAqXdq-cz2Og2Jn1zFpdOxZubEn_q2xSzaxyk7ljo-tcUbaPtrjdRtlI9kL3DyDOA0Tvzr-Vajky-aSDdEHDn9P6RNGXaJ9fMuPpQC9RIHaa31eu6Z4tOq4yGnALHag0qidZJ36lQhFiCcYXrlzRTnfQQRwoWc9sdoGBBb7Ts3kXvkaFjWDajp6EmOoc57Pzl8pFPSSA4begUBKPHk2582OtDLwzh2DDIX2rd8VCHmu-uzyYxoT8sFv4jlVCNILUxnVW-Q1fW-47xQn3PCczsr1UJbKu747K1agXOSVRq8vhVuthbGK5UZ-f_6yjKWrjlQOJ3bsrf6o6u1iAB3Q%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d444a5930d694c90ac175e72b85094a7&_e=OD1z-jR5NavAeX7SfKCzKN5ubMXTakzy3EEOS6XxXTzhIoOcOW-_MrIeCWVxplMVD7-96uI2XEpr6XFd6ZOzrIkhZ5P8ihcCX0B_hHTsNx5YJM_5b-5apRtb5lWeu8sTZr4mo0oADdtdBQH7pvRtjlML8-aBQsY6QQZqey-9_XxKBN_TsPhWG7WQ3koDeeoZk11GAqXdq-cz2Og2Jn1zFpdOxZubEn_q2xSzaxyk7ljo-tcUbaPtrjdRtlI9kL3DyDOA0Tvzr-Vajky-aSDdEHDn9P6RNGXaJ9fMuPpQC9RIHaa31eu6Z4tOq4yGnALHa1dnSnNVoc4GDIVOSIoVkOm_tB_XZsnqKGJCn9WJjmARDk3Kck1dlfti_f97Wcc0My7EBPh9m9mMGHwHdGOEp8WFHRYKLBQPuUhGcdLaSTIEHCYzar9j5avM4CKpocRSrHDba1YOerfc9vKB80VRiRAbw2hR6X4HnWl8FDANRazbi-2EpHpk3uPzRjufzu4VJuHhnq5fRwQoftF79BVYkA%3D%3D)**

Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION! Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 10th Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. How ironic. Every day since the insurrection, Kevin McCarthy has defended domestic terrorists of his own party who incited it, tried to cover up his involvement, and thrown Capitol police officers under the bus. If McCarthy really wanted to support the Capitol police officers who stood between him and the domestic terrorists he had a hand in radicalizing, he would support the January 6th Commission, not send them chicken. McCarthy is the real chicken here, and CA-23 deserves better. name: Scott Taylor
subject: 20 Years...
body:
---
| | | | | | Friday September 10, 2021
---
|
---
| 20 Years
---
|
20 years - since my life changed, since our nation changed, since the world changed. The years in between would yield, among other things, the very altering of the U.S. government, numerous deployments by less than one percent of our nation, families fractured and broken apart, Amazing Grace played thousands of times at military funerals, and trillions of taxpayer dollars spent.
20 years ago, I awoke, like many Americans, just in time to see the second tower fall on live television. That moment was surreal. It was scary. I joined a group organized by U.S. Navy SEAL Team Four to go help in New York at Ground Zero, but there were so many Americans volunteering from across the country that they asked only those with firefighting experience to come. Most were unsure of what was to come next. But we knew what was coming next: war. My prior plans to leave Naval service were abandoned, and I reenlisted early.
20 years have passed since then, but like many others, I continue searching for ways to serve, to save lives, and to step up for our nation. I did so in the immediate wake of 9/11, and more recently, I've done so in the last days of this war.
20 years after 9/11/2001, I found myself headed overseas, called to help save American and allied Afghan lives, during a hasty and poorly planned withdrawal that ended our nation's longest war. There were some successes and some failures in helping people; the demand far exceeded the supply. Indeed, after two weeks of around-the-clock efforts, and ultimately after our failure to get beyond Taliban checkpoints to help hundreds of innocent and talented students...I broke down and wept. My moment came after the young women and girls did not make it to freedom. An Army special operations veteran called me from Afghanistan. Offering his selfless support, he said: "I'm here on the ground in Kabul. I will do anything to help. I have two girls at home, man." I thought about him and his willingness to put his life on the line, despite his own family at home...I thought about all my friends who have given their lives for a cause that they viewed to be greater than themselves...so many emotions overcame me all at once.
20 years have been a burden to bear on a small percentage of the population who will carry a heavy load for the rest of their lives. And 20 years later, at the end of this war, veterans, Americans - from all walks of life - stepped up to help just as they did 20 years ago. Regardless of your views on the war or withdrawal from Afghanistan, never stop showing appreciation for those in our country who live by a code summed up in Isaiah 6:8: "Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying, 'Whom shall I send? And who will go for us?' And I said, 'Here I am. Send me.'" We remember.
Your Humble Servant,

---
|
---
| | |
---
| P.S.
[Read the full story, "Afghan Female Orchestra's Escape Halted 100 Yards From Freedom", from the Wall Street Journal by clicking here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E5VxVFPhg_DuJEG0IXc22ApEnhl5CVZ28J4WxUhEwNh0C3ig3hGGYnEtAE65ZaDDbIwKbZ57CrPhhzgc8aocPT2OHnTwsOAErv25yCNyfLAmoWDfUvB_CCmda-LlX-2sdzsZ_G4hCsCFxoeTEGGcJlplF2VkZWo5WRBHBmi480jvS7pXd8AbGSYANllZxQsgdPoV3wX9xh4fwW-EF11ePocaRQEka15SfLhCc3_CgUXHt3fAHEpFo9iN0B9sSCGOLxKzaeYKxkEH6vLEbK1fKTxbLW_bPUoHzSzg7TvZ8NppRH2mSFQn2xjxgYS5FyyaTTu2pPhN3WDbsdf258Ej324tmNpILvgQ&c=iZRH4jZJiWUMutgnyQvSEqQxmXaa4DrdWoTNqcZRIS87TvMbkee5rQ==&ch=H6twv6t8sYcf2rK-Yf9oEIriCp90OdwMrMRuSrarJDAiejhRjUPY3g==)
This was a real tough one for me and many others involved. The United States of America should never have had to give the Taliban printed out manifests of passenger information, nor should we have been requesting approval of who stays or goes from the Taliban. Unbelievable.
"In the middle of the night, 15 hours after their initial departure, the buses made it within about 100 yards of a group of soldiers at an airport entrance. Mr. Taylor sent the U.S. troops a pin signaling the buses' location on a digital map, and told them the buses were marked with an "X" and Christmas tree signs.
But a Taliban checkpoint stood in the way. The U.S. soldiers drove to the Taliban position with printouts of the passenger manifests, Mr. Taylor said, but they couldn't get final clearance. The reason: The commander of the Taliban checkpoint was asleep, Mr. Taylor and others said, and the group was told he wasn't available to authorize the convoy's passage."
---

As we approach the 20th anniversary of September 11, we remember those who were lost to the senseless tragedies that took place in our natio

| | |

Dear Friends, As we approach the 20th anniversary of September 11, we remember those who were lost to the senseless tragedies that took place in our nation. Although we look back on this day with sorrow, it ultimately unified us as a country. As home to the Pentagon and Naval Station Norfolk - the world's largest Naval station - Virginia is home to so many who have proudly displayed selfless acts of courage and patriotism in service to our Nation. I am humbled by this sense of service that has come from our Commonwealth.
---
| | |
---|---|---
The results are in! WPA Intelligence recently released a survey that has me leading Terry McAuliffe by two points. This is excellent news as early voting starts in less than a week.
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVw_x32gTX0SW1NWJ8j8RzcsFW4PtzZh4xjr0VN1c6spV5knJmV3Zsc37CgDqMW96b1Q37-Hwm_W6Y8qPm8dMwWcW24phSR5JwwXxW3DP9vr4ZRbZnW16w7_q3yv5gXW3HBNNw6v1z9wW60flZG6JYCZtW2MCZNY66ZlrGW3J_qBJ6C4YbQW53cqwB2_0GX2V1tMXJ7qKrzjW21F-NW5cd0cyW7XbJl45VPV6RW1Cj7_F44q7R6W2VxMZn5sVRtjW2XbvRX4ljw2RW7f93dK8WMJRMW2S3rrD4--b6FVBRBJF25DmCMW8F3hQH3_LDzfW8_4pHW5lHxvjW9hYXV88PfjqmW47t-Wt8wRLbGW4XsHfM6z1NzdW2LzFsf1VYNnqW8jwTbL2GKp5VW25GvnM7xcL6jN2xLgVm2fQHJW141rZJ1qZQvCW5sq1bN2PH5PmW8BwV-b42w3SCVQxjpM2Lxtz6W1kjpk86RLpYdW6wl_JZ2bbtqj37Y91)
---
I want to thank everyone for working hard and for your support as we enter the final stretch of this election. I have no doubt that Terry McAuliffe will say anything and everything possible to win, but he cannot hide from his past or from his shameful lies. Let’s keep working hard and bring home this win together! Let's go, Virginia!
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
I started my week by visiting the destruction from Hurricane Ida in Hurley. It was incredibly moving to see Virginians coming together to support a community in its time of need. The strength and resolve of these incredible people made it clear that when Virginians come together, we can accomplish anything. I encourage everyone to keep the people of Hurley and all those affected by this tragedy in their prayers. And continue to assist our friends and fellow Virginians however you are able. If you would like to support the community financially, I encourage you to do so by clicking the button below.
---

Did you know that Virginia is only 1 of 13 states that taxes groceries? Friends, that is unacceptable! On day one, I will remove this burdensome tax to help make lives easier for Virginians by putting more money back into your pockets. It's just common sense!
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVw_x32gTX0SW1NWJ8j8RzcsFW4PtzZh4xjr0VN1c6sqt3lSbNV1-WJV7CgZ61W3Hb9Xv5761-5W63YpHt4WWfbtW1lYz-y8HhPWHW1K8PDR2gSBvvW5jn4QB9gNMbwW7kjyMh54LjVSW2N3lWG81QL2KW7J0mNT13PHLDW4prmfq8XK6r6W18qYWX7Yb4vHW7vCFbP71vR2YW1mmNj32B2Bh5W8w87_82P1kJ2W1MLKY58mCxzsW2dWrHM8p0ly4W3vbcQv57LmsPW3BXXHm1LGssNVCZbmZ3hX4PwW6PHFMg2yNVprW8S2xnc5CHtHXW11FfPr29YWFyW2P9_Tm39-nyM3pC51)
---
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
With just 53 days left in this race, we have a lot of work to do. [Terry McAuliffe has gone on record](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVw_x32gTX0SW1NWJ8j8RzcsFW4PtzZh4xjr0VN1c6sq93lSbtV1-WJV7Cg-gNW7mdyB27Fy7R-W1Gypm56RK9nBW8s8s2b4r3F2YW6yBmgz5m5y29W5bhG_07W_lKQW5F_W9X2NT11gW37Tvf93hgpMNW2qR8h85m_KNXW64PMMz2BFD6BW17Pphl6vxP14W3LBh8G850qwkW7ZKHF23GsPVkW5Pnntb9bDCBlVF8fRr1nzSMZW6hgggG25Sl6XW8W3fG85lS8bJW4QPNxn2vLrmbN3V_FZqmPkKCW7F6hxq29qqRgW6V7PSW73cMyl33XZ1) saying that he will make life more difficult for Virginians, but I remain focused in my mission to make life easier for everyone in our Commonwealth. Please join me at the polls _just one week from today_ to make sure that Terry does not get a second chance to put his own political interests ahead of the lives, safety, and fortunes of Virginians. My team and I are motivated, encouraged, and determined as we sprint towards the finish line. The momentum is with us, and together, we will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
I hope to see everyone at the polls on September 17! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin

clean_body: As we approach the 20th anniversary of September 11, we remember those who were lost to the senseless tragedies that took place in our natio | | | | ---|---|--- Dear Friends, As we approach the 20th anniversary of September 11, we remember those who were lost to the senseless tragedies that took place in our nation. Although we look back on this day with sorrow, it ultimately unified us as a country. As home to the Pentagon and Naval Station Norfolk - the world's largest Naval station - Virginia is home to so many who have proudly displayed selfless acts of courage and patriotism in service to our Nation. I am humbled by this sense of service that has come from our Commonwealth. | | | ---|---|--- The results are in! WPA Intelligence recently released a survey that has me leading Terry McAuliffe by two points. This is excellent news as early voting starts in less than a week. I want to thank everyone for working hard and for your support as we enter the final stretch of this election. I have no doubt that Terry McAuliffe will say anything and everything possible to win, but he cannot hide from his past or from his shameful lies. Let’s keep working hard and bring home this win together! Let's go, Virginia! | | | ---|---|--- I started my week by visiting the destruction from Hurricane Ida in Hurley. It was incredibly moving to see Virginians coming together to support a community in its time of need. The strength and resolve of these incredible people made it clear that when Virginians come together, we can accomplish anything. I encourage everyone to keep the people of Hurley and all those affected by this tragedy in their prayers. And continue to assist our friends and fellow Virginians however you are able. If you would like to support the community financially, I encourage you to do so by clicking the button below. | | | | ---|---|--- Did you know that Virginia is only 1 of 13 states that taxes groceries? Friends, that is unacceptable! On day one, I will remove this burdensome tax to help make lives easier for Virginians by putting more money back into your pockets. It's just common sense! | | | ---|---|--- With just 53 days left in this race, we have a lot of work to do. saying that he will make life more difficult for Virginians, but I remain focused in my mission to make life easier for everyone in our Commonwealth. Please join me at the polls just one week from today to make sure that Terry does not get a second chance to put his own political interests ahead of the lives, safety, and fortunes of Virginians. My team and I are motivated, encouraged, and determined as we sprint towards the finish line. The momentum is with us, and together, we will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. I hope to see everyone at the polls on September 17! For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
We are forwarding this statement by Governor Eric J. Holcomb in response to President Joe Biden's recent announcement to mandate the COVID-19 vacci.. | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/chairman-hupfer-statement-on-2021-indiana-inauguration-470842?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2bc483a2b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Jake Oakman, [joakman@indiana.gop](mailto:joakman@indiana.gop) **Date:** September 10, 2021

_**FORWARD: Gov. Holcomb issues statement in response to President Joe Biden's Vaccine Mandate**_
**INDIANAPOLIS **\- We are forwarding this statement by Governor Eric J. Holcomb in response to President Joe Biden's recent announcement to mandate the COVID-19 vaccine to employers. The statement was issued earlier today by the governor's office.

"I believe the vaccine is the number one tool that will protect us and our loved ones against COVID-19. It is the tool that will end the pandemic. However, I strongly believe it’s not the state or federal government’s role to issue a vaccine mandate upon citizens and private businesses. This is the approach our administration has taken all along. The announcement from President Biden is a bridge too far. Private businesses should be able to look at their own mission, their staff and their goals and make the decision best for them that will keep their doors open. I believe it is fundamentally a citizen’s right to choose whether or not to get the vaccine. While I wish everyone would get the vaccine, we are a country built on this exact type of freedom.”
**-30-**

A few months ago I told you about a bill I co-sponsored (the PAWS Act) to help our veterans get more access to service dogs. Well, I'm happy to share President Joe Biden signed it into law! We know that service dogs are a proven method to easing stress and PTSD when our service members come home. This bill has been years in the making and creates a pilot program for veterans to train service dogs and ultimately adopt them as their own. Once adopted, the pups help veterans with anything they need, such as shielding them from overwhelming crowds or waking them up if they're having nightmares. _Such a great program right?_ You all know how much Pam and I love dogs - we constantly have a rotating crew of foster pups, including Blue (see below!). So to be able to make sure our veterans have the support they need, and help give homes to great dogs, is a win-win. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FAdLIPr63nzlj7-6goQXM-gqLQIf-qDCcwuL3noDUzw=/VrPIILHapbJJs5dsw1mfsNrdN0hy1R9AWwbqQfR58pg=?refcode=E11239-20210910-PAWSAct-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) My work on this bill would not have been possible without the support of grassroots supporters like you. name: Rand Paul
subject: I was right. Fauci LIED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8644%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qV%2bIXxupO7TQmIgo112pvw&sysid=1)
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** _**[Chip in if you agree! >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03032%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=obNZbg7ixP6mH2G517xXcw&sysid=1)**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03033%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2fYy2mUlfy78044Y6iGP5Q&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about school closures. Now he’s lying about whether or not he funded the gain of function research that led to the COVID-19.

HINT: He did.

Thousands of documents were already available to the public when I called Fauci out in a July hearing, but as of today, 900 more documents have been released to PROVE Dr. Fauci approved funding for gain of function research at the Wuhan Virology Lab. _(Yes, that one.)_
[**FIRE FAUCI: CHIP IN NOW >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03034%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cBYpZ9FrmNRxIaQORsCL9g&sysid=1)
The truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

He refused to retract his lies.

He didn’t even bother to cover up the paper trail that proved him wrong!

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03045%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2mtuhHhP7VnT7ZL5RuT6jw&sysid=1)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03046%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tkO0BjjVsb%2bw258TTWVgVA&sysid=1)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03047%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WmQDd%2b7RSmMJZEeYRHGlrg&sysid=1)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03048%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gaMJyDZ7raXPUC096cZ%2buQ&sysid=1)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he’s doing.

He’s not an expert in COVID. He’s an expert in political theater!

Even the media-approved “experts” in microbiology are agreeing with ME now that Fauci was behind this whole pandemic. Richard Ebright, a molecular biologist at Rutgers, read the grants revealed this week and he says there’s no DOUBT that Fauci was “untruthful” about his role in funding COVID-19.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03049%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TQbly2gc9grPdTH1u0C3ug&sysid=1)
_There you have it._

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It’s time for Fauci TO GO.

**I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2842554/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03040%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=00mvUvH8rnn%2fqawNU2KULA&sysid=1)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03041%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8pmKFuoBzi7dZyVxQ9FdGw&sysid=1)

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Operation TaliBANNED
body:
I don't have much time, but I wanted to share this with you.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F1LUoWj41wTJpU6oHEscMQ/SdR763pkEhpzG27tMu9K0tQg) | Patriot,

I don't have much time, but I wanted to share this with you.

I had operatives working throughout the night to send a message to Jack Dorsey.

Here's a sneak peek:
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F1LUoWj41wTJpU6oHEscMQ/SdR763pkEhpzG27tMu9K0tQg)
Twitter and its CEO, Jack Dorsey, are allowing Islamic terrorists to freely use their platform while President Trump and tens of thousands of Conservatives are silenced!

I've racked up about $6,200 in bills on travel and other costs for what I am calling "Operation TaliBANNED", and trust me, and it's definitely going to get their attention!

If you can, [**please donate now to help cover my costs and be part of sending a message to Jack Dorsey**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F1LUoWj41wTJpU6oHEscMQ/SdR763pkEhpzG27tMu9K0tQg) on the 20th anniversary of 9/11.

Stay tuned for details on the full operation!

Thanks so much!

Laura Loomer
