name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: CNN ranked #1 Most Likely to Flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The Q3 FEC fundraising deadline is one of the single-biggest tests we face.
#
Peter,
At the end of the month, on September 30 at midnight, John Fetterman will be required by the Federal Elections Committee law to make our campaign’s Q3 fundraising numbers public.
**The first thing our opponents, the press, and Donald Trump's handpicked candidates in the GOP will look for is how much money our campaign was able to raise in the last three months.**
After all, Pennsylvania is the ONLY Senate seat CNN ranked #1 Most Likely to Flip, so all eyes will be on this report and our grassroots campaign's momentum.
[**_Can you rush your very first donation of any amount to our campaign right now? The Q3 FEC fundraising deadline is one of the single-biggest tests we face, and the amount of money we raise WILL set the tone for this Senate race._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29990?refcode=em20210910-2592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2592%2E434096%2EiiQfeG)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29990?refcode=em20210910-2592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2592%2E434096%2EiiQfeG)**
Look, when we say that reporters and our campaign opponents are eagerly waiting to learn how much money we raised in Q3, _we’re being completely upfront with you_. They’ll use our FEC fundraising number to make judgements about our campaign and try to control the narrative.
**Then there’s the GOP.** Not only has Donald Trump officially inserted himself into Pennsylvania’s 2022 election — our Republican opponents have the full backing of Dark Money super PACs and Republican allies who are hell-bent on keeping this Senate seat under GOP control.
Here’s the deal, Peter: **If we want to continue being *the* winning grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022, then we MUST raise as much money as possible before the Q3 FEC Deadline on September 30 at midnight.**
We absolutely have the team out there to make it happen. We’re doing this the right way, no corporate PACS allowed. The only way we can win is with lots of small online donations from people like you.
[**_You donating *any amount* right now is even more important than how much you can donate. If you support John Fetterman, will you make your first donation of $5 or more to our campaign right now?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29990?refcode=em20210910-2592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2592%2E434096%2EiiQfeG)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29990?refcode=em20210910-2592&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2592%2E434096%2EiiQfeG)**
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210910-2592-footer-test-ctrl&t=27&refcode2=2592_434096_iiQfeG&akid=2592%2E434096%2EiiQfeG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: The Q3 FEC fundraising deadline is one of the single-biggest tests we face. Peter, At the end of the month, on September 30 at midnight, John Fetterman will be required by the Federal Elections Committee law to make our campaign’s Q3 fundraising numbers public. The first thing our opponents, the press, and Donald Trump's handpicked candidates in the GOP will look for is how much money our campaign was able to raise in the last three months. After all, Pennsylvania is the ONLY Senate seat CNN ranked #1 Most Likely to Flip, so all eyes will be on this report and our grassroots campaign's momentum. Look, when we say that reporters and our campaign opponents are eagerly waiting to learn how much money we raised in Q3, we’re being completely upfront with you. They’ll use our FEC fundraising number to make judgements about our campaign and try to control the narrative. Then there’s the GOP. Not only has Donald Trump officially inserted himself into Pennsylvania’s 2022 election — our Republican opponents have the full backing of Dark Money super PACs and Republican allies who are hell-bent on keeping this Senate seat under GOP control. Here’s the deal, Peter: If we want to continue being the winning grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022, then we MUST raise as much money as possible before the Q3 FEC Deadline on September 30 at midnight. We absolutely have the team out there to make it happen. We’re doing this the right way, no corporate PACS allowed. The only way we can win is with lots of small online donations from people like you. Thank you for everything, Team Fetterman HQ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Doyle Webb for Lt. Gov.
subject: On the Trail: Peter, we continue to be on the campaign trail fighting for Arkansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doyle Webb for Lieutenant Governor
body:
WebbforArkansas.com
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MiQ0GHjSZjDMnaM_4B3062yKZ_ritg7NuwkKATP4gCGTkVnXYpxa0NbPelrKBb0GS4w7FvEPmXomz4k9QXBsYSc8w-sreTDH-70kj_S5pJesOgN7EJoZHMx111cufepFZ7wsZnHhCwolthyKdqkJrNNNuflhW4MJ&c=QY3NZ7coRqS05jGW3C63gxWEKgSE77AD9GyUBcKav9-JlW-1YYeALQ==&ch=Rt0yK9bKANmKZUVRh5aUoyE4qTw1HMMP2N6kWunukXQdwvYRUew2kw==)
---
|
---
| | Peter,
It's been another busy week on the campaign trail!
One thing I've heard a lot about is Joe Biden's latest attempt to have the federal government interfere in our lives.
Let me be clear: Vaccine mandates are unconstitutional. Personal responsibility should trump the heavy hand of government intervention.
We need a Lieutenant Governor of Arkansas who has the experience to call it as they see it, and you know you have my commitment to do just that.
Your support still means the world to me. Take a look at some of our latest stops along the campaign trail:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MiQ0GHjSZjDMnaM_4B3062yKZ_ritg7NuwkKATP4gCGTkVnXYpxa0IkscPxjtKlVk2inUS_KUbOmdjGCIZt8LXY-OSjsqwTabAdZf3YeASSst861GGesJMATyE-huzHscdRX7ELGMzmhEPuaG2tLAcOQQ9l2tbn_&c=QY3NZ7coRqS05jGW3C63gxWEKgSE77AD9GyUBcKav9-JlW-1YYeALQ==&ch=Rt0yK9bKANmKZUVRh5aUoyE4qTw1HMMP2N6kWunukXQdwvYRUew2kw==)
---
| |
---
| Mt. Nebo Chicken Fry | Dardanelle, AR
---
The trek up Mt. Nebo is worth it for Chicken, Pickin', and Politicking! Great job by the Yell County GOP in representing are party well!
---
| |
---
| Faulkner County Republican Women | Greenbrier, AR
---
Republican Women's groups all around this state are the reason we Republicans have the majorities we do. I was glad to celebrate 101 years of Women's Suffrage last month!
---
| |
---
| 2021 Salt Bowl | War Memorial Stadium
---
A little Saline County rivalry never hurt anyone! It was great to have the Bryant & Benton showdown back and in action this year!
---
| | | | [>> Click Here to Donate $10, $25 or $50 Today <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MiQ0GHjSZjDMnaM_4B3062yKZ_ritg7NuwkKATP4gCGTkVnXYpxa0AgcsM5Kv8Mcj1BPCRSXR2SCa-h0mPk6ShkQRAX3-Mzl4Abb17DwMM0tb8furbukUaz7yYfr2JFw8h_jG09JAcIwrrQGTrM80KuUmO0AnRj-nzWUPqckhBo=&c=QY3NZ7coRqS05jGW3C63gxWEKgSE77AD9GyUBcKav9-JlW-1YYeALQ==&ch=Rt0yK9bKANmKZUVRh5aUoyE4qTw1HMMP2N6kWunukXQdwvYRUew2kw==)
---
| |
---
| Saline County Fair Parade | Benton, AR
---
A little cooler weather makes for enjoyable parade walking in my hometown of Benton. I was the first Republican elected here since Reconstruction!
---
| |
---
| Conway County Fair Parade | Morrilton, AR
---
The Conway County Republican Committee was out-in-force this week for their county's fair parade. Great patriots!
---
| |
---
| Clark County Lincoln Day Dinner | Arkadelphia, AR
---
The Clark County GOP recently had the largest county dinner of the year, with Sarah Huckabee Sanders and Leslie Rutledge keynoting. I look forward to working with our new Republican governor!
---
| |
Peter, we hope to see you on the campaign trail soon. Would you consider donating below to help us in this fight?
---
| | My Best for a Better Arkansas,
---

name: Michael Whatley
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:

clean_body: Hey, Peter... | Peter, The past few weeks have been crazy! Biden’s failure after failure has really hammered home why we fought so hard to re-elect President Trump. President Trump has called on Joe Biden to resign, and I agree with him. | DEMAND BIDEN’S RESIGNATION EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT | | | | | | | It’s clear that Joe Biden doesn’t have what it takes to lead this nation. He refuses to answer questions from the press because he can’t go off script. And every decision he’s made has taken our country from bad to worse. Seriously, Peter, can you think of a single thing that’s gotten better since Biden took office? I can’t. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

subject: YOU IGNORED PRESIDENT TRUMP?

Team -

Welcome back to our Newsletter!

Tomorrow is the 20th anniversary of the 9/11 terrorist attacks against this Country. The events of that horrific day shocked our nation to its core and rallied Americans to a common cause.

September 11th is a hard day for many Americans as we remember those who lost their lives on that terrible day. _We Will Never Forget_ their sacrifice and the sacrifice of all of those who fought to defend our freedom after those attacks in the global war on terrorism.

While it can never be enough, we all need to take time from our busy day in solemn contemplation of what it means to be an American and what unites us as Americans.

|
---
** _News from Team Scheller_**
**Susan Wild Collected $110,000 Through Defunct Corporation**

Is Susan Wild breaking the law?

According to the [Washington Free Beacon](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3e5fbf911864faea9c6a2b1fdfc673d&_e=Rj26b1oqyQuulkYVS0G1elF3v3hrfpoEslFC9y-sFRN5pBjnbjUiUgFv4eQyeiNWeHThaCHpKjaLhWei1m_xrvEkmy3P4U3tN-JZ2Hg8hLZwqICbJgBSzy1I6xw8kYBri-8WrLj0QxOyhehH5brLmCWH0Opjj-2XVv_3nv47ayP68VbH4NjQqsQzoZB-Pr1ZgcaOFKn9plUJJtf3-mxeD9HCIKOh4TKqsD-g1GQmGgfZzKvNhX3hHuceK6bgj-BsAztfK7tzHX2cQO0z6n1AswRCfyYs8CL7ARIVkDjdE6DBZQgsApfMa7TQRpVbIgei5xVhLBxSJ-JVrHjdIj3Q7A%3D%3D), Susan Wild has raked in tens of thousands of dollars from her rental property over the past few years through a company that has been defunct since 2016 because Wild and her business partner failed to file periodic reports that are required under Washington D.C. law. A separate [story](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3e5fbf911864faea9c6a2b1fdfc673d&_e=Rj26b1oqyQuulkYVS0G1etnL4_kJYuR6KCoPNWMAlT9st5reD1AohSDRM3618P4P3gZDUD8s7TxFXzWiKwhe_bseRFlA77ma4lC4Oq4Ozq275mZ-jyyD8ts_wx9hx8XH1iU7bNdYyq4KWScaMLlMhXI9Tv1yuy9VH6KTI3d-vMeXH1a5Y8IeaASOtP3hvJgsVxIdh48BrZlbOK5fStjyimh7f6kLeDkM-_kQhl9HH2wZFMHuoPZlzcMRpK8NxMugb3R83MCY28jkEhk7rhdT-r4S1CgUrgD16zylWhrU8KkSWrhx4DEkG4UhVuFagGo8Gwh_JG7Lg1jmUPFi8KfN5RYZAhw0IJCJGPDswj4vM1z6TuNMDH0bkrK-M53RlgnC) also revealed that Wild advocated for taxpayer funded landlord relief without disclosing that she herself was a landlord.

Under DC law, a revoked entity such as Wild's [Casa Stimus](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3e5fbf911864faea9c6a2b1fdfc673d&_e=Rj26b1oqyQuulkYVS0G1eukTt0FXsgs5qCH_oVwowvdELwjAOXXw4o01dfIk8P1FUE3c5ZGt6xQFJSe9c_D8sbmN-SKQjSbPkhXdDxOwgQoMHDPew0dME3ZrECc03l3LwHhh78sWkgIXrKH1s2uFUryOgouy6fbmg6AnAixcxV7W_eayW40E0TkS9l9bzui3gH11dlq37NPmJ9OYbQd9o3bK-9BorgaakMyrS1-_WZmRyUMGMXWJg7_3HjDYjcF0kYjSIDBzJDZUXQTtuJeDl68oGI3qPcwLbFAjYyY8xHw_1AJEO-HkQ1zmoRvkh7okWTgOL32W2iBDO7w0WXfZ8g%3D%3D) shall be void and all powers conferred upon such entity are declared inoperative," meaning "entities in revoked status may not operate in the District until they are reinstated." However, just this year while lobbying for taxpayer-funded relief for landlords, Wild collected tens of thousands of dollars in rent according to her own financial disclosure form through this defunct LLC.

"Susan Wild failed to disclose her rental income while lobbying for taxpayer dollar funded relief for landlords. In March, Wild called federal assistance for landlords a key part of our state recovery but she failed to acknowledge her status as a landlord in her public remarks" said Republican Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller. "Wild is not the only House Democrat to conceal such a conflict of interest amid a pandemic movement to cancel rent payments, squad members Reps. Ayanna Pressley (D., Mass.) and Rashida Talib (D., Mich.) reported up to $65,000 in combined 2020 rental income at the same time they backed legislation that would eliminate rent and establish a "landlord relief fund."

"Susan Wild is a member of the House Ethics Committee and in 2019 was named to a bipartisan working group to examine what types of service or positions outside of Congress could result in conflicts of interest and to craft proposed regulations for the committee’s consideration that govern those pursuits, so you would think that she would understand how to operate her LLC legally and disclose that she would benefit from a taxpayer funded relief for landlords. Unfortunately, Susan Wild decided that she could police herself and not follow the very laws she is entrusted in reviewing which seems like dirty insider politics."

"There should be a full investigation into this issue involving Susan Wild's rental income" said candidate Scheller. "Whether she is failing to disclose her income while lobbying for taxpayer relief, or failing to file the proper reports to keep her LLC functional, it is apparent that Susan Wild does not want to play by the same rules as everyone else and the House Ethics Committee and the District of Columbia should begin a full investigation into Susan Wild and Casa Stimus."
** **
[](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3e5fbf911864faea9c6a2b1fdfc673d&_e=Rj26b1oqyQuulkYVS0G1elF3v3hrfpoEslFC9y-sFRN5pBjnbjUiUgFv4eQyeiNWeHThaCHpKjaLhWei1m_xrvEkmy3P4U3tN-JZ2Hg8hLZwqICbJgBSzy1I6xw8kYBrlkud6tIW6zvMulC9MpL8nQmPI05Pm4SY-eQdPSXv3hrmZn2vraz_H2elAPQTipuBu84gNvcNB3VA4iNK-fRkUYQCB_u5lpCns2ngv-23gf0NIoODnIX1_4OOq3JXvNehYxhRiWr42hxSzUh5fHDvEfeZ2bG91iH9Xhwcbr1PmwsKXQrHCmK0SynfMQ2vL2aAUZXdez-Nz2WMKyyGQaRgFA%3D%3D)

subject: Marking 6 years since I looked a terrorist in the eyes

body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9tyPYTLo_CEiBwRjHYC1J5vkgoGaNJlciVXh_AeUhiXpd0S2dFkyW3wf_aaFuBI4DLsyllMInk7j4GDH_NSw39iIw22xT6PLkCf4f9ip3DKv6OUSfRsHY6iJ4TCmfGMKW0d3AQ8HnvpkDwfcQLrc9lXjTbn_ghDmqwJlfR7NHGapYd1KQpbY6vqJMs_y_aX4sAgSDbMusYbUsQRaAp8-Qrzth4Eax_AWwMQWJYhqRd80g%3D)

Peter,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9t896Q0pF52yJxYFe9_1HgXxzqsE7ykZzutPPIXmUpjCLjo0Mgf9lKhwu_YNc9Uq07Ef0zHCk_4GO_bW6vXiUhY2pnRwN5XFi6RIRtFTBk5CEXJwiPCZlsb7f5CndsFlIu6EzJQ0wqgpM-Z26VQx3Wp2Js1v998lpn-RKYIIRm0cY7EM3t2S-uS5NGZhZk26J3N8CgRKies0yiyoTEbKCk8XKnN8bwqrwOJMpApVwedfw%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9trpewxDNe5LPxsNC4nPA6ChuaKHD3caeFwzu9SESGtBSlkgERUmzKcrAVhFQiDzPoDlEJLPLGHNQrrqsSaq3j_RIHKCu7Q9-6-zhxlc7pvADi_j38izBpC28V9ak6cXLK8v-NMx6VT3_xeXE0xliA6HupxLd1zn3l4UHjaLzyRyE3DTpJMppEQSDrytzXQZhG5ckVyYCS3aOh0feMtg6IFadMix6a9jK7cevnKrJ_RGQ%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9tYWVTNNOX-h087zt3kszSHr32Ej-ghhEgE8RL5qZ-TQrffXMbGJnI9ydhJI2Am63F__wU_3bHGdTLk0x-m0aiuu1SrkZkYhNxpgrvPHqj1MpdxPfRGI0CWS6UPEm4kEtQbhOp6I5ic06Fu-R1AMFYAJc-t725LsjZc_boWS6tCi1IoN7Mtut__APRiafNRqEWW9BO5ZMjreOzf2EzlsTYIrmZ8mOOhHtZIHh1ovLJGAs%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9tOfL98eC0uDFCfVEJPiPukj28wKFjjA09g98WA3zD1ag7Hq-gUCnp2VuYq2jWaP3_gYU0esYw9NlbDTWpdE2Pk2eTqSN5xYFGLZrEjyi_ICwWJmD3yPPB4nLyfr9NsrK8xS825-ZY2bshAkccSOzFeqizZsAKmpyWoDHNSplolUgU8AmEL3XsLCfK-SBF7QgBpvR_yfOkjDwstpicrpboYO08nwYY5AgH_GYOkBDwnv0%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9t7LnFdVwS9_SYT1IQ366tuOa3N-f14eac9sbEBIkdmZFh8mhXg_FvbBpG0iemmE6Qd91baBJds0U9bZ6mxLuhX2rJyfnmpxGYRfU-0nXMXNgH5umzDuLWV0d8PARQcA6sr4oYh2NNEvP2B98ot__dUxKzZWiiwUa_vk0FnVOJ-cT0JwkS1o9jTqKcVtrGjqjVWJ6j_yaeeWGkc2fMQ3foSKNl4crtrMyW-tXPdOkGT1Q%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e699eb8e7d24dab8309666bd1223279&_e=4NluWkav1FunoTyq7T7nMqECY8nx205sQmpKQ0ISm_4v3hHG8NUQPNe2QpBzYGghCxMQbgm7LbNWOVTUzQkXSoqCwtMIuYYgCWGK5nkWnkMndrtHOVpt7zZB87jSzFVRluF1E6hYpUGxjYTBjo83JXQdImcWoussLT3LvdkHdMMZPCuGKVSSw13HAAHPZqUrEIkQMHAKjROPvHfs_HyUj3_-JbjOpjWhtWwMKa2r34NlzMdNNDX4kUbKb4zwJr9tOQy310s8IglJfXsNWbpqajNK2B9WdSB3dwjqrQe_YcWBvM37UYhHG9FA16wwzQMFqhJDacD2z1Jw1nL16qcNhhfHBIqgWr2AWezyHdK23nSPyxeQd1ZeETg1VPIQCBHY8_Vv0EeDRlfK8DOerS4SF-A1tNWE1MDkPCUmO9by2oJtdbUqnPVqdZGt_8DxfCViDk3PXLZF78ur_Y2MdoOKxWfKTyUVBtATY-dorKgVtb0%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Here’s the deal:

This month, we’ll face another FEC deadline. You know the drill: all of our fundraising numbers will be published for the world to view -- and pundits, opponents, and potential endorsers will see if our campaign has what it takes to win.

If it sounds stressful, well, it is. But don’t worry. We have a plan.

We just have to hit every single one of our fundraising goals this quarter. The good news (thanks to folks like you) is we met our August deadline in the nick of time.

**The bad news is if we don’t raise $8,000 today, we’ll be off track for our biggest goal yet. That could really put us in a bind for the quarter -- right when it matters most.**

**[If you could split a donation of $25 or any amount between our campaign and Common Good VA today, it would make a huge difference in keeping this campaign running smoothly and gaining momentum. Can we count on you?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xse0oiFMehVCFw5OIEsOxzzfV-bPS0jT1DuvgriO7sFHBQva5AJHx3L3zJXtu161C14L3U5GGZvgIGeIfOvs8P2uCtn4P6qWt651QJu4YXLwqU_NjwK2CYHy-Ze2ICxqi6_AjZXMY0sydtyP0rufmsnUKeZ1SJbo0jYMtx-q3ubvAjUybpeXmcmxNuf_D3TaYzZ16r9SjwryOmcfQ8wnIu8cW4Dr4GD_aWNsQCQo_nt9EF1Dk5kVidjtsw4K7RlVv6zqi-bi8QNGOW8WFQruWDot1Q8SyeR8nP1BFwr9tFeVdQ_QM7to0bPa4QIVFr7vYA/3f7/8CSODDrGRwy27uSwyj_MFg/h3/sFp9FOeS-WVB5MzksnXPfAbIrHpyQooGyjAs5mX7GOo)**

| | Here’s the deal, Derek.

At midnight tomorrow, Terry McAuliffe has a HUGE deadline.

It’s no secret why it’s so important, folks: Glenn Youngkin is vowing to fund his campaign with $75 million of his own cash. **He could drop tens of millions on Terry at any moment!**

So Terry’s gotta be ready. That starts with reaching his $100,000 fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow.

**_[Will you pitch in $15 right now to help Terry defeat this self-funded billionaire?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35561548/305448262/-2023814932?refcode=20210910.6_JC_9BL&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQ4NGVhNi04NjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAo0YGtjqPIvM0WtRdadHxOgPjJTjLxed_nTVdaaxv8=)_**

name: Erica Smith
subject: We did it!!! 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
You made this all possible.
#
We did it!!!
Last night, with a stop in Greensboro, North Carolina, we officially closed out our _100 Counties, 100 Days_ statewide tour. 🎉
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14088?refcode=em20210910-430&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)
Visiting all 100 North Carolina counties in 100 days wasn’t easy. It required an ambitious schedule, a lot of resources, and a ton of faith — _and I’ll be honest, when our campaign van broke down last week, we almost didn’t make it._
**But YOU and your support made this major feat possible._Thank you. Thank you. Thank you!!!_**
[**There’s still A LOT of work left to do to flip this U.S. Senate seat, and I simply can’t do it alone. So I have to ask: Will you make your first $5 donation to our campaign to help power the work ahead?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14088?refcode=em20210910-430&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14088?refcode=em20210910-430&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)**
At the heart of our tour — and our campaign — is the belief that everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented.
That’s why from our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities, and rural towns, our campaign went EVERYWHERE, meeting voters where they are and leaving no community behind.
I’m SO grateful for the important conversations we’ve had with folks about the future of our state and about how we can build a North Carolina that works for ALL of us.
Together we can bring power back to working people. Together we can win bold, urgent changes like Medicare for All, reparations, universal broadband, a Green New Deal, and more.**It all starts with winning this U.S. Senate race.**
[**If you’re ready to help today, chip in $5 to our people-powered campaign and help me take this Senate seat back for Democrats and transform our politics.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14088?refcode=em20210910-430&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210910-430-footer&t=23&refcode2=430_3698_QHXNQY&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=430%2E3698%2EQHXNQY)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

It required an ambitious schedule, a lot of resources, and a ton of faith — and I’ll be honest, when our campaign van broke down last week, we almost didn’t make it. But YOU and your support made this major feat possible.Thank you. Thank you. Thank you!!! At the heart of our tour — and our campaign — is the belief that everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented. That’s why from our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities, and rural towns, our campaign went EVERYWHERE, meeting voters where they are and leaving no community behind. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Brief Message from Action 4 Liberty
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=1)
---
September 10, 2021
## Winner of 'King Walz' Sign
Congratulations to **Billy Schmidt of Becker** for winning the infamous 'King Walz' State Fair sign. Thank you to the hundreds of people who supported our field operations this week. You are equipping us to win the war for our freedoms. If you saw my email from last night, we are now in the most important freedom battle of our lives. Joe Biden has gone full tyrant \- forcing us to get vaccinated. [**We have a plan**](https://www.action4liberty.com/here_s_how_to_stop_joe_biden_vaccine?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=2) though! Please make those calls and write those emails to your legislators. It makes a difference! **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=3)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=short_message_from_a4l&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need $34 today. Let me tell you why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Peter,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=816a68ecd7154851af1234ca3804361e&_e=dkk41HE-opNSL1d-H5cRfFiw_bJMLNt_Uf46qhgRXdWBSY6PfzL5HbUEcscu-H6J2vek9WhrUDwkbPKT1aoxXqsot0ohVEoNQYpvG_GD7h5nxZpX8vdAnUhqgC6IL2Y3FJSPWOWwCNzK3mOviEIHa_RD_7T6-yQ8dHHOjcz4LWdaeslBFKU0H2AwcNpe21X-pGVcQ4G2CbAeKPaeN6hgkjmQfvbqyCRN-NO-rrFiPcNRpaoqHMFr0PtmDL84dzHzRCs4i6NBMmabZtp6dmAiKqNVPYKRRmBRbApQYKiKKS4xkr774RtS8BDJCFOL08YP7f_cd_mikkPxG5fiAnhY6ymFMrWdc4yMoAoikBXuDVzTldfmzn_2gIS0bm4rt0jcF1Jeq3f-G7PntbiznqH1Lni4NTqSjWQT51fGQSTKMUlRYUIFLbiSvgsNVrmHIwaU_IcHPf1Xk3vZ7DDI2hqotQ%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=816a68ecd7154851af1234ca3804361e&_e=dkk41HE-opNSL1d-H5cRfFiw_bJMLNt_Uf46qhgRXdWBSY6PfzL5HbUEcscu-H6J2vek9WhrUDwkbPKT1aoxXqsot0ohVEoNQYpvG_GD7h5nxZpX8vdAnUhqgC6IL2Y3FJSPWOWwCNzK3mOviEIHa_RD_7T6-yQ8dHHOjcz4LWdaeslBFKU0H2AwcNpe21X-pGVcQ4G2CbAeKPaeN6hgkjmQfvbqyCRN-NO-rrFiPcNRpaoqHMFr0PtmDL84dzHzCRmtCVRuzeB8eRD5LOyZmJLM77cvpjinX20BJxc87hcUjm6j7x1fT_7La_UMsJz4EzY_7ccE4xcRrfmSiCw1YiqTnhrrai82vEPD9eQ8tlOJWM_e6YE7M6U_J94lzdM7Jlka_wavkXUw0ncdA1Zt5ogWkUDAk8FXl_6jqMZTHGnyG983tFh4dlTrb1cwHuJxjLv-5So_xDlaaWqsRq63pg%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=816a68ecd7154851af1234ca3804361e&_e=dkk41HE-opNSL1d-H5cRfFiw_bJMLNt_Uf46qhgRXdWBSY6PfzL5HbUEcscu-H6J2vek9WhrUDwkbPKT1aoxXqsot0ohVEoNQYpvG_GD7h5nxZpX8vdAnUhqgC6IL2Y3FJSPWOWwCNzK3mOviEIHa_RD_7T6-yQ8dHHOjcz4LWdaeslBFKU0H2AwcNpe21X-pGVcQ4G2CbAeKPaeN6hgkjmQfvbqyCRN-NO-rrFiPcNkylyDjhlFVHN9k_HrnZII-hfr4XR4CVscNHzbXUYI4g0pnMbL6OgSefbpbtrqlsGNRVyXe8TCBrdqZTw1woKepPRgLcu2W96GIxif4_XNfVl24CK_CkOTXFg9IEE1DYJCrMuLbNQaNa8QAaiEiU0-hLAnnofDLqNzALb2TrU08--xvxnZpys5GAdn3gfOUZPPYVxoimln-UNtCJC-AUhSnExZMegUeYZ8ihNXtwgK1CfzAlFZJvVt2j-kbk-NxYQ%3D)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, **[but I need your help.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=816a68ecd7154851af1234ca3804361e&_e=dkk41HE-opNSL1d-H5cRfFiw_bJMLNt_Uf46qhgRXdWBSY6PfzL5HbUEcscu-H6J2vek9WhrUDwkbPKT1aoxXqsot0ohVEoNQYpvG_GD7h5nxZpX8vdAnUhqgC6IL2Y3FJSPWOWwCNzK3mOviEIHa_RD_7T6-yQ8dHHOjcz4LWdaeslBFKU0H2AwcNpe21X-pGVcQ4G2CbAeKPaeN6hgkjmQfvbqyCRN-NO-rrFiPcNRpaoqHMFr0PtmDL84dzHzBM51oVWHKYuMXgIP0WSAMCYTNJAR84pEwumMcMna7-sfe-eadJAvh1o1jVejF3t-qVtEOHcmWNoxoiEcPzHIlFa5sSuh_WV-EZ4ajJdoPQcYQLJRvCVMOoN_E_p34AOHQAmWaYwfBJrpPGCIwUcMphMEtbzkxN2pvle0O-ExkxT2vZUbVAxSUnFSh6PewQwF-eRp7wF5Q7QjRMflAr6NXQ%3D%3D)** The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. **[So, if you can, please consider a gift of $34 if you can.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=816a68ecd7154851af1234ca3804361e&_e=dkk41HE-opNSL1d-H5cRfFiw_bJMLNt_Uf46qhgRXdWBSY6PfzL5HbUEcscu-H6J2vek9WhrUDwkbPKT1aoxXqsot0ohVEoNQYpvG_GD7h5nxZpX8vdAnUhqgC6IL2Y3FJSPWOWwCNzK3mOviEIHa_RD_7T6-yQ8dHHOjcz4LWdaeslBFKU0H2AwcNpe21X-pGVcQ4G2CbAeKPaeN6hgkjmQfvbqyCRN-NO-rrFiPcNRpaoqHMFr0PtmDL84dzHzXLadWpDuQK9WiZVXirFQbCjJ05jBdhj1CmoP6pElhbQn7JCLyTNz9wlc3bXtr_iLMdsGWSL-V78eiR_CjrTUjxWdbDEgifv9-U_uuZKGJRQLAdWnwFamoJnZawNGK5KUKTK5KZgEy04B9nRADqoww967851KLNUoRZ4_Z25Gbz9zt1MlZgHSjeioCOSHLgwySIWarlNnocWe6ma-RQoLZQ%3D%3D)**

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=816a68ecd7154851af1234ca3804361e&_e=dkk41HE-opNSL1d-H5cRfFiw_bJMLNt_Uf46qhgRXdWBSY6PfzL5HbUEcscu-H6J2vek9WhrUDwkbPKT1aoxXqsot0ohVEoNQYpvG_GD7h5nxZpX8vdAnUhqgC6IL2Y3FJSPWOWwCNzK3mOviEIHa_RD_7T6-yQ8dHHOjcz4LWdaeslBFKU0H2AwcNpe21X-pGVcQ4G2CbAeKPaeN6hgkjmQfvbqyCRN-NO-rrFiPcNkylyDjhlFVHN9k_HrnZIIMx5sly1jnmG4D8aRTWjiZEIUl9GFQ1brVn1AQzgwSYCZB78lb9uMBw7baJrDzIxpr9WgPfliYiPSXMZpdGfLRHJl_j03OM7lmVW9YOya_UPw5rlCmdDe3njt5ZLLyJINLHykThxWOGHBs8GcY_Wi8bpC3YbTQIrcvhXj69GwQeAT93AQWVQ0jFMrrJ0QXP52v5VEQf3Qa2yhEZKM9_RMN_n0qWz6VKf_KLkEZJTFwlE%3D)
The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.

I hope to hear from you soon.

Sincerely,

I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. | Peter, Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart. I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys. For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend. In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. My opponent has amassed a war chest of over TEN MILLION DOLLARS. If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field. I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career. We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and actually build a better America for hard-working families. My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years. And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand. I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. I hope to hear from you soon. subject: Do you support Biden's vaccine mandates?

body:
Yesterday, we saw shocking news that Biden is forcing unconstitutional vaccine mandates. Tell us what you think! | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c3f767d5a9&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting for us, and _**we want to hear from you.**_

**Do you support Joe Biden's extreme unconstitutional vaccine mandate? [Answer Now!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dcf5100e16&e=1050d051da)**

---
| 15 days to slow the spread turned into 18 months and counting, and now Democrats in Washington want to go even further.

_**Next on Biden's agenda: Use the full power of the federal government to force private businesses to vaccinate employees.**_

If they don't comply, they will face massive fines. This is an unprecedented overreach by President Biden that will result in**labor shortages and irreparable damage to small businesses.**

**Joe Biden's message yesterday was clear: If you don't get the vaccine, you shouldn't be allowed to have a job.**

We cannot let America go down this road. This is unconstitutional and against _the American ideals of personal freedom and liberty._

Team LaTurner

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Republicans are wasting your money on sham audits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
The GOP will do whatever it takes to make it harder for working people to vote
#

Folks,
It's been a week since one of the strongest storms in recent years passed through Pennsylvania, crumbling our infrastructure in its wake.
But while they should have been passing legislation to combat the existential threat we're facing in global climate change, Republicans in Harrisburg spent yesterday kicking off their taxpayer-funded sham audit of the 2020 election.
Look, I can't sugarcoat this for you — this is a breathtakingly absurd waste of working people’s time and money, all to promote Donald Trump's Big Lie.
They'll do whatever it takes to make it harder for working people to vote, so we need to fight back today, and we need to fight back hard.
I'm running for U.S. Senate to stand up to Republicans and make our democracy one that works for ALL of us, not just those at the top. And, if you're with me, I need you today.
**We've got our next federally mandated fundraising deadline at the end of this month, and that means we've got a big fundraising goal to hit. It's going to take everyone doing their part to hit our goal, so I have to ask:**
[Could you pitch in $3 to fuel our fight for a government that works for working folks like you and me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35562621/305451681/-353695395?refcode2=b9a92af0-8b12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWE5MmFmMC04YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryQyVQHJBLGJlrYV9315T_MOLNg4HoicW4U-8mn-L5o=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35562622/305451683/-353695395?refcode2=b9a92af0-8b12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210910-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWE5MmFmMC04YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryQyVQHJBLGJlrYV9315T_MOLNg4HoicW4U-8mn-L5o=)**
We deserve legislators who won't play political games — we need leaders who will take our needs seriously.
And when you chip in, you're helping us build a movement that will help shape our government into one that works for working people.
So thanks in advance for whatever you can pitch in today. It really means a lot.
All my best,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**HELP US RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d627a9d8dd1743829ee83ebca3c73657&_e=2ma2qYtfGH2CrCvmVAjWJidhODWgo9ZPUa07Hu7IXch0fv4DB80iRqKFumE7LOmwGAZdO_4MwG0WtIi2suK5cSgYUCrdicJkVCmUYmKWyXuqAs9IZTnC-r2PKKBqE94CRqRK8Lb9amNUiZ7j3mfK8tOHrabON_GYlq_StoA1S0vBiGoQmWWRtMh2_uUJH22KfQ0jjxwCLwGJrdaCMGSR-XPm3NAo7ozZvQKc7inLMUoOCUf3w-NfBL2dDjXXo6DViuKfK6dJw6S2oImVrT0ybmfNuj5PgL4uDlG8ajA9MYpipkTXtzNVxkGvuUJKhR30B2A4hbVVIjFo8tQGYmc0IVLx1x6t0xkAu0pSYUe1AIj6pPbZ42GMNeI1ZlTSPHGZ)
Newsom is more worried about upsetting his aunt Nancy than he is about protecting Californians.

This is absolutely sickening, and [**we need your help to send a message to Gavin Newsom.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d627a9d8dd1743829ee83ebca3c73657&_e=2ma2qYtfGH2CrCvmVAjWJidhODWgo9ZPUa07Hu7IXch0fv4DB80iRqKFumE7LOmwGAZdO_4MwG0WtIi2suK5cSgYUCrdicJkVCmUYmKWyXuqAs9IZTnC-r2PKKBqE94CRqRK8Lb9amNUiZ7j3mfK8tOHrabON_GYlq_StoA1S0tySFxNpbGTIwwbyClooVPvjBmuRO-qUS8135a8NXDRUglqFkKcHFjkInw_ZzNXfagDSXnG6YxuxQU8PdrfC5bzSYDIKRMWoAusewdgycyiyG3-SdbZ2sqbKB-288W0HvctTPF5Q8ECqzia-3A1JW9HzJtsDwWq4a43rVRLdwSXFXJ8xXRMcpLG9NyZTdRxBaasbzTj7xZfMjT5oUm0jLsY) This recall has nothing to do with the poor job Pelosi and Biden have done. **Newsom is facing a recall because HE HAS BEEN A TERRIBLE GOVERNOR.** Half the state is on fire, homelessness, crime and unemployment are at record highs. Not to mention, under his leadership the EDD sent out **$40 BILLION in fraudulent payments. WE WANT GAVIN OUT!**

So please send in $25, $50, $100 or more so that we can secure as many votes as possible against a failed elitist governor who is more concerned about the Left’s agenda than he is about Californians.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d627a9d8dd1743829ee83ebca3c73657&_e=2ma2qYtfGH2CrCvmVAjWJidhODWgo9ZPUa07Hu7IXch0fv4DB80iRqKFumE7LOmwGAZdO_4MwG0WtIi2suK5cSgYUCrdicJkVCmUYmKWyXuqAs9IZTnC-r2PKKBqE94CRqRK8Lb9amNUiZ7j3mfK8tOHrabON_GYlq_StoA1S0tVR0kbQgSoVseBiggfO5FSRZFkL88PSapXbbFbJoimVgNndIiETI2jhXYJmp4PdIzTJDGaqSTeZTlLsMx7IBmWmrn01N0Ian0RUJFHBcOZOMAR8HZJfjc1OaekuxXI10HY5pGxaB5BM94nBeN_J3jcwlJItGXo06kLMOmzLQvo8hSnNIef1oqdwB0QD2ldogg5yeivLyS3bVM7S-Wt9EGJ)

We know we don’t need to remind you what’s at stake in this hyper-partisan recall attempt:

🔴 An actual, fact-based COVID response to protect public health
🔴 A livable minimum wage for working Californians

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m doing Ron’s job
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Before the weekend, I want to tell you a bit about why I’ve been taking on the role of Governor over the past few months.

Here’s the deal: Ron DeSantis has failed to communicate truthfully with Floridians, failed to vigorously encourage vaccinations, and failed to keep our children safe at school. So while he’s travelled the country raising money for his Presidential campaign, I’ve stepped up.

The past few months have proved that DeSantis is the most dangerous governor in America. He’s put our children at risk by banning school mask requirements and played politics at every turn in this pandemic.

Defeating DeSantis next year is incredibly important to keeping Floridians safe and breaking the rigged system that has enabled politicians like him for decades. That’s why I’m asking for your support today.

Team, if you can support our campaign before the weekend, it would mean the world to me. Click here to chip in now and help us defeat Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-o-sentinel]

Ron DeSantis is attacking our rights, putting our health at risk, and continuing to attack our democracy.

It’s on all of us to defeat him next year and break Florida’s rigged system.

Thanks for being on my team—we couldn’t do this without you.

With Gratitude,
Nikki

Hey friendーit’s Jeff.

This is critical. If you haven’t heard by now:
_**Joe Biden has put in place an order that will require businesses to****mandate the vaccine on their employees****,****subject them to weekly testing****, or****face $14,000 fines!**_
[**TAKE A STAND AGAINST TYRANNY**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=ba73f9cb4eb14bb698898c2653184de5&_e=qiZgbTl7nIlUsp7C_7loP5dG9WtBE5_mdhe7rdG5pACGKiEqf87QQIF3Zk6syPDnOB2SKuX2GM_oY67QKZsXncgGrWB0wlKR9-imKkW5-3bQq1d8kpVd_mEk81S0vWN8Qd3XTCMXWbEVKyy3lLEe9ksovWrS96CB_DQMDbGxqGWApL2lVpVqPvParChIWT_n_z-LBRjy6T4zT6AZ4WhrBdS6rX7LKla8Cf6FmCGTCYmJ8t7GxxRo84HPgrvc-ibaRtiuOax2tLLsm3Q6E6xZFuQEeNziKsnv6fFuyXqjzPqJo05wqYTPr6kIwoTrQFv680HYo1LaiMqr20lSg1J5bEpF5vl30vMVIod0aXOaJfPEKLT03OBMIowZWYhMrz0W6maJ7tyMGRPndKmRG9y3XPCXx0dNYkqqkgO6LOkEatHKSzaTQXs8UEkGcGCdwWb_EYbZ-5NiLVlNgHO7Ba--kSqNtweZDUVrsqVy9tblVaNN7piuqWMcVr4u27DdzLIM)

This is about the rule of law!

Something that Joe Biden and his administration clearly have no respect for:

**❌ Refuses to enforce immigration laws**
**❌ Defies Supreme Court rulings**
**❌ Implements unconstitutional mandates on businesses and individuals**

**In Joe Biden’s America, individual liberty is the enemy, and****tyranny is the goal****.**

That’s why conservatives can’t afford to comply with Biden’s unconstitutional tyranny and overreach. **

**
**We must mobilize and energize our grassroots efforts to win back every seat, in every chamber across the country and I’m hoping you’ll start with my race here in Pennsylvania —**[ _**Rush A Donation Now Help End Biden’s Tyranny >>**_](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=ba73f9cb4eb14bb698898c2653184de5&_e=qiZgbTl7nIlUsp7C_7loP5dG9WtBE5_mdhe7rdG5pACGKiEqf87QQIF3Zk6syPDnOB2SKuX2GM_oY67QKZsXncgGrWB0wlKR9-imKkW5-3bQq1d8kpVd_mEk81S0vWN8Qd3XTCMXWbEVKyy3lLEe9ksovWrS96CB_DQMDbGxqGWApL2lVpVqPvParChIWT_n_z-LBRjy6T4zT6AZ4WhrBdS6rX7LKla8Cf6FmCGTCYmJ8t7GxxRo84HPgrvc-ibaRtiuOax2tLLsm3Q6E6xZFuQEeNziKsnv6fFuyXqjzPq5t1pz7SYu6cLoxNqh37o7faP5BCTK9ueDMYMF7gBuHoPXF_30nWSohUhfko4u1x7bDXDRvJtIkPa4qOfZpIlSGzji8Oj6S4g6iAq9l7LrcavPzW9P_Y8YqW5PM8yPucKNpxF4VYoJPOoCiuEB81WF-zQeuo1n3EgkNJqQcrvxBy9HQTyYKlNPe-i0KTuij1mwu90wCmHEbiV_m3jdh2Xp)

Thank you,
Jeff Bartos
[**TAKE A STAND AGAINST TYRANNY**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=ba73f9cb4eb14bb698898c2653184de5&_e=qiZgbTl7nIlUsp7C_7loP5dG9WtBE5_mdhe7rdG5pACGKiEqf87QQIF3Zk6syPDnOB2SKuX2GM_oY67QKZsXncgGrWB0wlKR9-imKkW5-3bQq1d8kpVd_mEk81S0vWN8Qd3XTCMXWbEVKyy3lLEe9ksovWrS96CB_DQMDbGxqGWApL2lVpVqPvParChIWT_n_z-LBRjy6T4zT6AZ4WhrBdS6rX7LKla8Cf6FmCGTCYmJ8t7GxxRo84HPgrvc-ibaRtiuOax2tLLsm3Q6E6xZFuQEeNziKsnv6fFuyXqjzPq21torv6E6QFK_qgGahaz8UkaKSyRnCaDbU548KIkb0JUu38Bp_8eJFR5exxg_sp_Z-9qg1h2Pxrp2G8mmut12i3kqLYCFcrCyZWw7Gtbjof_j0qxmJdRLuKAHHpg5d9ksiBd120DROUR7tzGnLaMr9OaUjob4LofXTd_KUyM4XWAgSLJdcOq7bWNiwSA4ewsdkWrMvhPcY_dvl2I-BglY)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Everyone endorses election integrity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Election integrity train rolls forward |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a678e98194&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

Wow. What a whirlwind couple of days. I’ve been wanting to write you sooner, but news bombshells keep dropping left and right. And I have news to report.

**Good things are happening, folks.**

My name is Mark Finchem, and I am in the vanguard of the Election Integrity movement. I paid for election hearings out of pocket when no one else would, I listened when so many turned their backs and covered their ears. I spoke up when others were afraid to be heard!
[***SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY IN ARIZONA!***](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=da5920a643&e=44b8c466b0)
**And this has led to good things happening. Not only do we have bombshell reports with the Maricopa Audit (more on that later), but many proud Patriots have stepped up to support my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

_And I couldn’t be more honored._

**_[Can you help me today of $25, $50, $100, or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e8116adaf7&e=44b8c466b0)_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=573659955f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Election integrity expert and former Army Captain, Seth Keshel, just endorsed my campaign for Congress!

He said:

_“Arizona needs a Secretary of State who will stand for election integrity and protection of the People’s voting franchise. That is why I am endorsing Mark Finchem for this crucial office. Mark Finchem has been on this from the start; the hearing he pulled together and chaired on November 30, 2020, was the first of its kind ever, and he has motivated other legislators around the nation to examine their elections as well. Mark is a team builder and as President Trump said he, “is a respected leader in Arizona.” Mark Finchem has my full support for Arizona Secretary of State.”_

Thank you Captain Keshel. I tremendously respect the work that you have done for Election Integrity and am honored to be part of such a historic moment with you. I will continue the fight as Secretary of State of Arizona!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b8515b6833&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Former Arizona Senate President Russel Pearce just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona! He said of me:

_“I strongly endorse Mark Finchem for Secretary of State. I have never worked with anyone more committed to doing the right thing, than Representative Mark Finchem. Representative Finchem is an unapologetic American. I take great pride and consider it an honor to have worked with Mark. I know Mark to be a Constitutional Conservative that honors that Sacred Oath of Office he swore to uphold. We must have warriors in the fight for liberty, and I know and trust Mark to stand up for our God given rights of Life, Liberty and Property. _

_I have worked with Mark on property rights, attempt to lower your taxes and nullify the federal government’s attempt to trample the state’s rights under the Constitution that clearly limits the federal government’s right to control or own property not expressly granted in the Constitution. I have watched Mark stand up loud and clear on election integrity. _

_I know Mark Finchem no-nonsense person who hits the ground running. Mark is a true Patriot and truly believes in We the People and this Republic_ _we are blessed to have. Mark leaves no doubt about who he is and what he believes. In today’s era these are qualities we must have in an elected official._

_ In this Biden era it is critical to have warriors in this time of the feds trying to stop voter integrity and_ _pervert and steal elections, we must have a strong powerful Secretary of State that stands up for Arizona and election integrity. I know Mark will be that warrior. _

_Please stand with me in vote for and support Mark Finchem for Secretary of State."_

Thank you sir! This means so much coming from a man I admire and have worked with for a long time. I will keep up the good fight, Russel!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e20fca4df7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Senator Amanda Chase just endorsed my campaign! She said:

_“I am pleased to endorse Rep. Mark Finchem for Arizona Secretary of State. Mark Finchem was the first to take a stand for constituents when they believed something was wrong with the 2020 election. He has remained steadfast in his pursuit of election integrity, putting everything on the line for the People. We need more like him in crucial offices like Secretary of State.”_

Thank you Senator Chase. I am excited to see what happens in Virginia as you fight for Election Integrity in your state!

And last but not least, President Trump’s Attorney Jenna Ellis!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3798038c5e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **I am simultaneously honored and humbled by having such great patriots in support of our Campaign. I know how far we have come, but we have so much further to go, and we can’t do it without the support of Conservatives like you!**

[_Donate generously today to spread the Election Integrity movement in all 50 states and secure them with me as Secretary of State of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=59c2d5e5a9&e=44b8c466b0)
**__I told you there was more good news__**
Friends, Patriots, and Conservatives. If you have known like I have from the beginning that there was fraud in the 2020 election, then you can feel absolutely validated.

**The results of the Maricopa County election canvas are in, and they are shameful. It is clear that, beyond a shadow of a doubt, the Democrats stole the election. This is why I am calling, officially, for a recall of the Arizona electors.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=35186325d2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And what about the evidence? There is plenty more to come but let me give you a few highlights:

-The canvas includes 4,570 data points
-The canvas organizers estimate 173,104 votes submitted to Maricopa county were not counted.
-There was a missing vote rate of 34.23%.

**And this is just from one county.**

We need a 50 state audit NOW. This is a huge endeavor that I will very much be a part of, now and through my election to the Secretary of State of Arizona.

**This is a huge fight and[I cannot fight it without your help!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d2b9cdfc15&e=44b8c466b0)**

[**_Donate TODAY to make a huge impact in election audits around the country!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5578a3c749&e=44b8c466b0)
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bb1563cc98&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=96ee74557d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I have a very important end-of-quarter deadline approaching at the end of this month where I must [raise $75k](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b3d310b5c0&e=44b8c466b0) to stay on target to defeat the Democrats in this Secretary of State race. [Will you contribute today to help me keep Arizona's elections secure?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=38c801a53e&e=44b8c466b0)

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=cea5f1bb18) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=cea5f1bb18).
---

clean_body: WE CANNOT LET THE CHINESE VIRUS RUIN WHO WE ARE AS A NATION. One of the biggest lies ever told to the American people was when Joe Biden said he wanted to "Unify America". | Fellow American, If you watched President Joe Biden’s televised speech announcing Covid-19 vaccination mandates for businesses with over 100 employees, what you saw was nothing less than the end of free enterprise, the end of states’ rights -- and the end of personal liberty in the United States. His threats against we the people over the Chinese virus are nothing less than the federal government’s total domination of our country -- the latest and worst offense against our lives and liberty coming from his radical leftist regime. That’s because just like he cares nothing for the way his agenda has undermined our economy, his open borders schemes allow skyrocketing illegal immigration, his feckless withdrawal from Afghanistan cost the lives of 13 American military personnel and billions of dollars in captured equipment, Joe Biden doesn’t care about our freedoms - only his own power and his disastrous, leftist agenda. He’s even threatening state governors who will resist his unconstitutional mandate, telling us he’ll push them “out of the way” -- instead of working to hold the Chinese Communists accountable for their deadly virus. Fellow American, Joe Biden’s announcement has nothing to do with our health -- it’s nothing less than the totalitarian plan to take over our country and destroy our liberty and prosperity - and I’m not going to stand for it. You probably first heard of me when my wife Patricia and I took an armed stand to defend our home against an angry mob of Black Lives Matter “protesters.” Now, it’s the arrogant and anti-American heavy handedness of Joe Biden and the Democrats that I stand against, it’s exactly why I’m running for the U.S. Senate right here in Missouri , Fellow American, and it’s why I’m contacting you today. Will you step forward right now and ? Let’s show Joe Biden and the radical Democrats that we won’t be intimidated and we won’t stop working until we’ve defeated their disastrous assault on our Constitutional freedoms - For a better America, Mark McCloskey True conservative for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Keeping Alexandria in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Powerful special interests are hoping to see our movement lose momentum.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210910-2502-header&t=1&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)
We want to talk about why this month is so important for our campaign.
At the end of this month, our campaign will submit a public report to the FEC detailing how much we’ve fundraised in the last three months.
As one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, Alexandria’s report will draw huge attention from political opponents, pundits, and powerful special interests who are hoping to see our movement lose momentum.
Alexandria has spent this past month speaking truth to power: From taking on Texas Governor Abbott over the state’s harmful abortion restrictions, to calling attention to Joe Manchin’s weekly meetings with Exxon lobbyists and his unwillingness to support climate action spending, to pressuring our own party to step up and do a lot more to protect voting rights.
We know that whenever Alexandria uses her voice to call out corruption and fight for the people, those special interests will look for ways to put a stop to our movement.
**That’s why it’s critical that September is our best fundraising month yet.** The amount of contributions we receive — no matter the amount — will help show that Alexandria and our unapologetic fight for systemic change has strong support — from your city and across the country.
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now to show your support for Alexandria on this report and help our campaign hit this critical fundraising goal before the end of the month?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-2502-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2502_2526796_0S4uWT&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-2502-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2502_2526796_0S4uWT&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)**
Our movement has always been driven by the dedication of individual, small-dollar donors like you giving an average of just under $20. We’re proud of that fact.
Because when hundreds of thousands of people chip in $5, $10, and $20 at a time, it all adds up to compete against the billionaires and corporations who use their money to rig the political system in their favor.
But, candidly, our fundraising has slowed down since the summer months this year, and we’re relying on your support today to get back on track, hit this goal, and keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for bold solutions for working families.
[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help post the strongest FEC report possible and power our movement forward?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-2502-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2502_2526796_0S4uWT&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)
This work wouldn’t be possible without you.
Thank you for everything,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210910?refcode=em20210910-2502-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2502_2526796_0S4uWT&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210910-2502-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2502%2E2526796%2E0S4uWT)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, | The Biden Administration’s decision to turn American job creators into the vaccine patrol is an unprecedented, unconstitutional and counterproductive power grab. After more than 18 months of mandates, shutdowns and new rules and regulations forced on businesses and working families, this decision will only further harm our economy and infringe on our liberties. Our country was founded on individual freedom and personal responsibility and this order flies in the face of what makes our country free. | | | Thank you for your support, Randy Feenstra | | | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? name: Rick Larsen
subject: Washington must NOT become Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35565269/305465973/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2UwYzAzOS05NzEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dWag-7Xl_taev-kyK87uvzVCXml_1WMKHfosX0ngjHA=&emci=1d22578e-9212-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=73e0c039-9712-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9494239)
---

| | We are facing a major battle on reproductive rights. Last week, Texas passed the most restrictive anti-choice bill in the country. Even worse, the Supreme Court, set to consider a repeal of _Roe v. Wade_ this term, refused to step in and uphold the long-existing law of the land. **What happened in Texas is a threat to reproductive health and personal rights everywhere.** Texas's six-week abortion ban effectively prohibits Texans from accessing critical reproductive health care, even in cases of rape and incest. And in the week since, emboldened by the Court's silence, states like South Dakota have introduced increasingly-restrictive measures in defiance of _Roe._ This is wrong. These decisions are deeply personal and private, and should be made between patients and their health care providers. It is abhorrent that so many Republicans in Texas and in Congress believe controlling women's bodies should be a matter for politicians. I will always fight to protect access to reproductive health care. **I am a cosponsor of the Women's Health Protection Act, a bill that would codify**** _Roe v. Wade_****into federal law.** We must get this bill passed. I am proud that Washington state is a national leader in recognizing the right to safe, affordable, and accessible reproductive care. We must fight back to ensure that reproductive rights are protected now and into the future — in Texas, and everywhere else.

body:
I called this, but I didn’t expect it would get this bad this quickly! |

Fellow American -

I'm working on filing a lawsuit right now, but I wanted to make sure you saw this.

**Biden just announced that he will “compel” private businesses to mandate vaccinations for their employees or face fines of up to $14,000 per violation!**

**This is a gross misuse of power, not to mention it’s illegal!** That’s why I’m preparing for court today, I’m fighting for your freedom and liberties to stop this mandate before it takes effect.

We need to stop these constitutional violations NOW. We need to be proactive, not reactive, to this massive government overreach. That’s why I need your help to make it to the Senate; we need leaders that will keep Biden in check.

Can you help me take my fight for your constitutional liberties from the courthouse to the U.S. Capitol with a small contribution today?

Here’s a secure link for you to donate: [**www.secure.markmeuser.com/donate**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=40d9cc7d9a894b5481933502c13ef4d9&_e=jnPL0VKNZ4i5ymSJ9UsdX_X4raM3v72DlERxwO-XJzL_baQQ_fO64qj-sklDUgJcE7HsQQz9HEvfqM8uWwhQJWyTVy1SGvdbkNFlC8mHKMixEIUJEe-PGFnPcLvmm07sk1T-QQQPT2cDC8-laW87XlRHDVs6j6C8UuaNufv30wRp_CA-fbgPXtay1qMgLs9hOuZTVkjH_87Em6mV9jBWUnzipBz6zaocDINfkF04tYnkHgOYy0p5SxOpHYrlc3KPkb2FdIcHWquaRkhZPlsn8k8sC5k7ZD1zp-722umv0a39w_TAS1_O9wIqoO6nlJ5FxSWW6ZBvpvlL9cX1c3geHg%3D%3D)

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin.** Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

We can’t keep going down this road!

Thank you,

Mark P. Meuser
Sent from my iPhone

– – – – – Forwarded message – – – – –
From: Mark Meuser
Sent: September 1, 2021
To: Fellow American
Subject: FWD:We are being trampled

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=40d9cc7d9a894b5481933502c13ef4d9&_e=jnPL0VKNZ4i5ymSJ9UsdX_X4raM3v72DlERxwO-XJzL_baQQ_fO64qj-sklDUgJcE7HsQQz9HEvfqM8uWwhQJWyTVy1SGvdbkNFlC8mHKMixEIUJEe-PGFnPcLvmm07s-D3FjgaYD_8uJg099fG8yeujllSI_ysYQwgJU-1MUD_0gu-4-cldvkd4h1Ph37ndqA71xa8kxw_q1-SiCvHgwt2F3Pw1oK_O3bOCAB3ePZJmbZArOrN-z9oTdLlq5ROpX8TN-Absw_XNdBKq-ByWMCJaozwlF5ecDs9aYY0-RWLKkUxKFCxjULvNEZh-MZf8SOp3CUOv5RSHnbuv-jnSCQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

While the vaccine mandate in California is dead for now, the radical left in Congress is trying to push it on us Nationwide.**They are trying to force us all to be vaccinated before we can step on an airplane!**

Chances are that if you're reading this email, you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. _And I agree with you._ You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but Congress is working to make sure that the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated. They have no right to do that.

The TSA shouldn't require you to show your vaccination card to get on a plane in the United States; that's well beyond their scope of authority. [**Who decided that, after more than 240 years, only select people are allowed to travel across our country?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=40d9cc7d9a894b5481933502c13ef4d9&_e=jnPL0VKNZ4i5ymSJ9UsdX_X4raM3v72DlERxwO-XJzL_baQQ_fO64qj-sklDUgJcE7HsQQz9HEvfqM8uWwhQJWyTVy1SGvdbkNFlC8mHKMixEIUJEe-PGFnPcLvmm07sm87M0Fyo240ABtv7vpSTKVB5Jrw9SZf3769zAVs9ehOK6iz8bwHWK9QKzK1Yckyuvkjhmgt82_V1_kv81OH8EP7Sgw5MyvppcYq85txEpf61FwbzIaKWOddMKx9ZCue1ueS-XZ-sfjZYNor0gONGA_r4JnVf8fRhRUMDfhqf3dpRPRamXGl-d7GfdW0MqrRA8ymNwbIaRYNJq-sWK37QAg%3D%3D)

You shouldn't have to prove you're vaccinated to get on a plane, go to a restaurant, school, or even get medical care. [**This is why I was so anxious to jump in this race for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who will step up and say enough is enough. Will you join my team and help me take my fight for the Constitution to the United States Senate?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=40d9cc7d9a894b5481933502c13ef4d9&_e=jnPL0VKNZ4i5ymSJ9UsdX_X4raM3v72DlERxwO-XJzL_baQQ_fO64qj-sklDUgJcE7HsQQz9HEvfqM8uWwhQJWyTVy1SGvdbkNFlC8mHKMixEIUJEe-PGFnPcLvmm07suyMRYJFZFmK44TCaWnL0otZLFWubg_JWuV_RYtWI4WAvxt7X5wI48D188AEiZLdYjqaad-nfNS_CuT_S3kBOxotUsND2WVsVZJrkOfVNGk1GuYtKCZqj16pEHi3TT-HG0ZFJ5XhtzSEGchqRpjPfMssAGjkOmlc6thlDtCEQoaHbeLu-VYwFhtgH7gFpKGFK7xoaztmeHhjxBv2CHIOOkw%3D%3D)

For the last 537 days, our Constitutional rights have been trampled on. I've spent that time in court, _virtually, of course,_ fighting against these unconstitutional lockdowns and regulations. **I've been involved in more than 25 lawsuits and stood up to the radical leftist in California to protect you!**

[**California is on the verge of a conservative revolution, and the Red-Wave is about to hit our borders. clean_body: I called this, but I didn’t expect it would get this bad this quickly! | Fellow American - I'm working on filing a lawsuit right now, but I wanted to make sure you saw this. Biden just announced that he will “compel” private businesses to mandate vaccinations for their employees or face fines of up to $14,000 per violation! This is a gross misuse of power, not to mention it’s illegal! That’s why I’m preparing for court today, I’m fighting for your freedom and liberties to stop this mandate before it takes effect. We need to stop these constitutional violations NOW. We need to be proactive, not reactive, to this massive government overreach. That’s why I need your help to make it to the Senate; we need leaders that will keep Biden in check. Can you help me take my fight for your constitutional liberties from the courthouse to the U.S. Capitol with a small contribution today? Here’s a secure link for you to donate: We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. We can’t keep going down this road! Thank you, Mark P. Meuser Sent from my iPhone – – – – – Forwarded message – – – – – From: Mark Meuser Sent: September 1, 2021 To: Fellow American Subject: FWD:We are being trampled Fellow American, While the vaccine mandate in California is dead for now, the radical left in Congress is trying to push it on us Nationwide.They are trying to force us all to be vaccinated before we can step on an airplane! Chances are that if you're reading this email, you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And I agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but Congress is working to make sure that the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated. They have no right to do that. The TSA shouldn't require you to show your vaccination card to get on a plane in the United States; that's well beyond their scope of authority. You shouldn't have to prove you're vaccinated to get on a plane, go to a restaurant, school, or even get medical care. For the last 537 days, our Constitutional rights have been trampled on. I've spent that time in court, virtually, of course, fighting against these unconstitutional lockdowns and regulations. I've been involved in more than 25 lawsuits and stood up to the radical leftist in California to protect you! With you in the fight for freedom, Mark Meuser Candidate for U.S. Senate, California | | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but._

name: Herschel Walker
subject: 34 stands for victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
