Fellow Conservative,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fa9b237ea3f346bab2a1ff0aa03c0ad9&_e=3lkmiNCwA7w1iGP_5Q-RFMQV2lMf6YwamZT1IkkxQP65TxEI38E-GBQEnQktB81gPIxlV-f1j_UHefhhSvj-6tSQZT5a3b-UDjYadICabNi6nJwA8zU9CgxdHiTkQfN1LmfwrF17rK24t8kDDSyAC034X1Muvo3uEoC5y5uGf8f5Wj5xZIlwS4EuPt_RByhUlJuW--UBFR8K4IhwEyUkzxS2_NlwVKSVII-6-KU8ex0_Rrb2Aan5YRQoj12sTqkuAinewuQuS2p0uH5_raewL5o0wK59FIW0_xuR6JdKdjtCkHgjnU8NYZLUvQeoD0hQfBFgOzOmrqzSlEDtbli3ThkZCnvgYoFePWGnmMZzdQ60CYevQYoQV99Bhht08ZRGo1Ec_UyaeZOHpugpOXPuL2r9R-PK0YUQ_nSwJPY4cI-UBX3aq0N4vJgLzHG5b1tLjgY5AgGOi8JGjLXRQzdFlw%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fa9b237ea3f346bab2a1ff0aa03c0ad9&_e=3lkmiNCwA7w1iGP_5Q-RFMQV2lMf6YwamZT1IkkxQP65TxEI38E-GBQEnQktB81gPIxlV-f1j_UHefhhSvj-6tSQZT5a3b-UDjYadICabNi6nJwA8zU9CgxdHiTkQfN1LmfwrF17rK24t8kDDSyAC034X1Muvo3uEoC5y5uGf8f5Wj5xZIlwS4EuPt_RByhUlJuW--UBFR8K4IhwEyUkzxS2_NlwVKSVII-6-KU8ex22MJ1TiaxYSjWhm-oOw9Qe-aiotA9f_xEjzjfR6RFCO0N6rT9_9sfCYmanWRxcSd1CZ3V9lXSXqKypjItv_Ly71ESgCZzptVLVLTIL3CUbXhsYHVIXPTjxv7Q3Xhzh3HF9Q_cb6y9q70jhhOeubfQU1ikccZ7QYL9_wU-Ao78HRQFFZekwBX_NzQrNLKJC6lLuus02fpwlHhwyewC492DE4LeFCC0oIe73DY9L1GvghQ%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fa9b237ea3f346bab2a1ff0aa03c0ad9&_e=3lkmiNCwA7w1iGP_5Q-RFMQV2lMf6YwamZT1IkkxQP65TxEI38E-GBQEnQktB81gPIxlV-f1j_UHefhhSvj-6tSQZT5a3b-UDjYadICabNi6nJwA8zU9CgxdHiTkQfN1LmfwrF17rK24t8kDDSyAC034X1Muvo3uEoC5y5uGf8f5Wj5xZIlwS4EuPt_RByhUlJuW--UBFR8K4IhwEyUkzxS2_NlwVKSVII-6-KU8ex2rguRTMV159QN5tJnFSKpuswVn9hya7s2ZSIY6Ad2WsqcDwAJLjarHMyMUDFPRz1JtGs_Szv0gULJqD9jfT8DkTSBPYCdDqM-ec-ETXvg46nAc0MSYr8H-ecJiQtAYD29fTwLnYUgMev3PzXnzpJW_dYBvN3aV2T3SK7_0uR8xnC95McpFlw_78K-QPTCgVthKh4WCJytvp2h651kT2wHwJVNWn7WOz5IslKrGKkg00g%3D%3D)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

body:
I called this, but I didn’t expect it would get this bad this quickly! |

Peter -

I'm working on filing a lawsuit right now, but I wanted to make sure you saw this.

**Biden just announced that he will “compel” private businesses to mandate vaccinations for their employees or face fines of up to $14,000 per violation!**

**This is a gross misuse of power, not to mention it’s illegal!** That’s why I’m preparing for court today, I’m fighting for your freedom and liberties to stop this mandate before it takes effect.

We need to stop these constitutional violations NOW. We need to be proactive, not reactive, to this massive government overreach. That’s why I need your help to make it to the Senate; we need leaders that will keep Biden in check.

Can you help me take my fight for your constitutional liberties from the courthouse to the U.S. Capitol with a small contribution today?

Here’s a secure link for you to donate: [**www.secure.markmeuser.com/donate**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6cc768b21f88491f99daeace9392c88c&_e=xSRoS1qkzfogPnxPhD5dyL9z6N-gHxqatg1rkelnS9X7sGTQ33LIFtGsFKUYy8H30f-R5ZVYkpr4KaQKDh8aVPCGB8viC5vWEkm91m5hZNt19Fv58C_KBFZh_3OQCV6QQOobbIbllPK8lDuXhGDEX97I9OoRboaqg8VdjDDzULCiRiy4WcLa2IGFMo6Chado2Wrt70elm41eaFvFTG_FqOC3Mgf4nzK0-THMxGoPe1MK8x1u5BNXSJbx69bej4PEn4GRibq_5zTukpBS0czDgYnvJAvYPI0il4QFgxlOq9D7X_AMtCFVJDAFwJBEZ4afzd3SBOrP6LBkrmhTA4IuVw%3D%3D)

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin.** Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

We can’t keep going down this road!

Thank you,

Mark P. Meuser
Sent from my iPhone

– – – – – Forwarded message – – – – –

Subject: FWD:We are being trampled

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6cc768b21f88491f99daeace9392c88c&_e=xSRoS1qkzfogPnxPhD5dyL9z6N-gHxqatg1rkelnS9X7sGTQ33LIFtGsFKUYy8H30f-R5ZVYkpr4KaQKDh8aVPCGB8viC5vWEkm91m5hZNt19Fv58C_KBFZh_3OQCV6Q1fGkow22ROounuhWCaaFMOT5CGiEH4aseYitl_SO9Y984YGrTL6hYsB90qqq6ZmcefdGlx7V5hS19Al27JmUMd5d2XFhAYgB4p9pLryvg3WjfpKU2-KGe1e7vbYLHuZy0Oy-bad3GLPK3lJ8YNNTJgo4PShx-FDEnQTQlI5Sl2Yre68pqzccE7N0lKwMPD1TWlPqRPIt8l8MUIBi8en6zQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

While the vaccine mandate in California is dead for now, the radical left in Congress is trying to push it on us Nationwide.**They are trying to force us all to be vaccinated before we can step on an airplane!**

Chances are that if you're reading this email, you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. _And I agree with you._ You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but Congress is working to make sure that the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated. They have no right to do that.

The TSA shouldn't require you to show your vaccination card to get on a plane in the United States; that's well beyond their scope of authority. [**Who decided that, after more than 240 years, only select people are allowed to travel across our country?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6cc768b21f88491f99daeace9392c88c&_e=xSRoS1qkzfogPnxPhD5dyL9z6N-gHxqatg1rkelnS9X7sGTQ33LIFtGsFKUYy8H30f-R5ZVYkpr4KaQKDh8aVPCGB8viC5vWEkm91m5hZNt19Fv58C_KBFZh_3OQCV6QRSkf8J4FWuGfsz6Dwf6mlo6yt6QCyEEx4DDdrQqLyvpO9jOg-_u3BSGrj5ybo3UNLVyQCNrTy65GbC3BdRCwxQfRvcL2bIYAAuB6SlU6Z506vfBfVuwYGUIf-rpvsEpO-xAcHWl6TycI1mq0JMdGQ-iO0q6R7oqs677wY6xChokFxs0DXL9PoYDA8XSPlihIh4BL036SS5FuMHP1Evj9-Q%3D%3D)

You shouldn't have to prove you're vaccinated to get on a plane, go to a restaurant, school, or even get medical care. [**This is why I was so anxious to jump in this race for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who will step up and say enough is enough. Will you join my team and help me take my fight for the Constitution to the United States Senate?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6cc768b21f88491f99daeace9392c88c&_e=xSRoS1qkzfogPnxPhD5dyL9z6N-gHxqatg1rkelnS9X7sGTQ33LIFtGsFKUYy8H30f-R5ZVYkpr4KaQKDh8aVPCGB8viC5vWEkm91m5hZNt19Fv58C_KBFZh_3OQCV6QAFgUkyOQdHqyLjuFgGRaMWxkHdI57HVf1LCJTfhou3wfkgYyiKfVX-8Ra_d44XO0Fad2VdE5VEiTKMreyzXnRl2M8MdoKEW0laCXs8eiB4qS9qoy9hE-lyb9K04-n9B2__9qvLZfeoCJrNNaeJ0D2YH0SbbmJOuwpyzeXnm5ugCDiAlY61JehngENUyLDq_ByWy8Wdd2le65ZHtbHDxnRw%3D%3D)

For the last 537 days, our Constitutional rights have been trampled on. I've spent that time in court, _virtually, of course,_ fighting against these unconstitutional lockdowns and regulations. **I've been involved in more than 25 lawsuits and stood up to the radical leftist in California to protect you!**

[**California is on the verge of a conservative revolution, and the Red-Wave is about to hit our borders. Can you help me jump on and ride that wave to victory in 2022?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6cc768b21f88491f99daeace9392c88c&_e=xSRoS1qkzfogPnxPhD5dyL9z6N-gHxqatg1rkelnS9X7sGTQ33LIFtGsFKUYy8H30f-R5ZVYkpr4KaQKDh8aVPCGB8viC5vWEkm91m5hZNt19Fv58C_KBFZh_3OQCV6QXG7pLdCgoK_ZdyybwB9BdvPaR4xB72wWOQ-VmohCzj37WnuhhPIOaqbJJqTv4GC3K9sFJLMlH9jJBDEoQldQwWw5esjwLkmAia0oUo6Y23AVre9kzzqXKlmaP3e2Y5W1BzPwda0HEybg7KqS9fAkPR_ixyeDWHTpVjp3P5QikvOcnaKLhYVtLRGELw-OIqKYFt4g4Ugg4N0gJEpDHhgwUA%3D%3D) [** JOIN MARK TODAY >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6cc768b21f88491f99daeace9392c88c&_e=xSRoS1qkzfogPnxPhD5dyL9z6N-gHxqatg1rkelnS9X7sGTQ33LIFtGsFKUYy8H30f-R5ZVYkpr4KaQKDh8aVPCGB8viC5vWEkm91m5hZNt19Fv58C_KBFZh_3OQCV6Q4eTdsdMJzcKZPsYYihkE31ZdaLkkVwKkeS8Osf309Iy5jF2KXzWITIk0DiJZWE1mFT-4nVNUvK2o6X0K69qp_VCQkesTjJdNNpPlCqVPOAkk5w3Sr9RmSQ8n_-wJHE53fN8Ek1nUtjl4zop5IVwcbmr_xnM0vd_2TbMh-8-X5hsZYOOpS5i9AOx-wTTMw5sHqtcLGlybDtriZ2xr1rHNnA%3D%3D)

**Mark Meuser**

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, As we turn the corner to cooler weather and college football, Jane continues to be in top gear, criss-crossing the state and earning the endorsement of the voters of Ohio. It was another busy week on the trail, and I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Standing Against Government Tyranny** In December, Joe Biden said he didn't think vaccines "should be mandatory." As recently as July, Jen Psaki said mandating vaccines wasn't "the role of the federal government." But yesterday, Biden instituted a massive power grab that tramples on American's civil liberties and threw the Constitution out the window. Jane fiercely spoke out against this big government power grab that highlights exactly why we need fighters in Washington that value "we the people" as supreme. Read more: **_"The Biden Administration just unveiled a massive federal intrusion into the rights of individuals and private businesses. A forced vaccine mandate should never be a condition of employment, is a total invasion of an individual's medical privacy, and will surely get challenged in the courts as unconstitutional.

At a time when we desperately need our workforce back and our economy going, Democrats continue to crush businesses and workers with their forced mandates and overregulation that will only make the labor shortage worse. This dictatorial approach is the wrong policy for workers, the wrong policy for businesses and the wrong direction for our country.

Today’s stunning overreach is yet another example of why we need leaders in Washington, and at every level of government, that value individual liberty as supreme - not the government.”_** **From The Trail** Jane continues to be a leading voice against the government overreach and indoctrination happening in our schools. As she travels the state holding townhalls with parents and concerned Ohioans, Jane hears real life examples of how many schools are putting leftist ideology first - not the fundamentals of a good education. As part of these listening sessions, Jane is holding a special event next week with New York Times best-selling author Vivek Ramaswamy, author of [Woke, Inc,](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW82WqtNFr8DokGkl1UBu_lfrHxHQVbhFv9IxG_p_nXhGQ7iP--D_LLrObaJgP_IU02lcCrA2mzeS015aIjtzD5gENQ252WueTowa4Ioo6BF67NjSl2ifa5Or-kJ6x0SjAJXQ3vE3QURKutPaExL1RVppAI6Rh8OyfNWR6zo77ysKWy_0w1d4dQYc7Wc_o9oBa9dfSo1HkAWDYpHkCWR0RhzZ7HKASgn6OsBXWi8Pqb5LmNPQO7QudVgHE05zxIJk95JPSl21tbnjALSytymzH1C3Tp8Dw4BwlEukIg6NuCKA6Z1MkpwdqBl3fStcf1HpRg%3D%3D) for a discussion on how we all can fight back against the "woke" education agenda. We’ll also be joined by [two Columbus-area moms who have been fighting the good fight](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW6ajH3HUgJa9QhtCjPNNFGBH3_QUN8t77z2K1xTywxHnPoyq7qitBjNerrL3Xwf2RhQm13Dek3NHuHMDod14ogAzEcISp6EhlNEu-_ImE9LUyq53_JWZ9ZN70LCt-TrsBQG8swza9utPt19Zc-VywINIABpjHeykfAiYRrZnbW4Su7N2djMuEtcbUfjwSLkzaySdvifyE6_w5x4ILYzihvlijIbt71Kdq7yg9fMOAD3zMwQITPMh0d7fi5E2Fc4apYJxfvRA0zf7OybJAEgCwI8BqACByA6gx2pbSKsucMc8GaolDKnsl3AyoF2bhF3wKY3hvMStJQmwWv9fgeL5KW9n9Cl2AhEbcfiXpOzkxT_WoJMVKOG_daMJHULxQdGO-g%3D%3D) for their children’s education right here in Ohio. We hope you’ll join us for this exciting event and make sure to [RSVP today](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyWxgAf7J7Jc4KrR-3m2cRIdk3Pk28BhESXlRpmckeR-MvxF-2kC_sqOazKmboY--6FOCAHzSytgSTc9STX5lsuA8ekB_2V_909R-ZW2qC68Hb8d7beaufbAIcbCIYBPRz0sLDlzGBijaC-cx9r1iEmgugpTNMTcnRy58DEVPvP2tgFzkscodM-NeewFJa1fy-LlglmeZjwPb4cuAkemIqrJWr1rtbgTl2sbBvsIB-7F4CZpAr5-jcDnKwQ-1pAa-FlvZGBQMIJiJA0QaGvweE-zSKVTJ_VYlz2rrIy9kA0kXYOtue0G3bK_CCDQJL6mR2J3Wd-cG6PQshH2VrKbLUX-YUKyTpgSy7w-RNYMJxkuoW3XmCIJPmKwkSe0PcllXYrA%3D%3D)! On Thursday evening, Jane was happy to join great friends and supporters in Butler County to share her vision for Ohio - one of putting Ohioans first, standing up for Ohio businesses and communities, and fighting for Ohio values. It's a critical time in the campaign and the robust show of support from across Ohio will help us be successful not only in May, but in November. Tonight, Jane is excited to be in Akron for a "Women for Jane" event where she can talk about the many things on the minds of Ohio women including soaring prices, unconstitutional mandates in schools, rising crime, and more. **Media Roundup** In a new opinion piece featured on Steve Bannon's War Room, Jane took Harvard, her alma mater, to task for their latest jaw-dropping attack on faith and religion in America. _**"Harvard’s new President of Chaplains is a devout atheist. Not only is this in complete contradiction of the university’s founding, it represents the leftward lurch our universities and institutions have undergone in America, led by the radical Left’s secular revolution.**_ _** **_ _**Of course, Harvard cites their reasoning as one of 'inclusion' for the student body – a word that has come to represent the Left’s march toward monolithic thought in the name of their preferred 'diversity.'**_ _** **_ _**In fact, a Harvard Crimson survey of the class of 2019 found that nearly 40 percent of students identified as atheists or agnostic, and nearly two thirds identified as ‘somewhat or very liberal.’ This is no coincidence. As Harvard and other elitist institutions cower and cave to the woke Left, they are creating a secularized student body that is void of any diversity of thought."**_ Read the full piece [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW_5N8e_NJmFJwa-EUFFm5Jbix7_KUESEqfS3gDk3tNB7u44cwd7tvNekdNHPolw_GW5lh0qzHSOLo7m8OOQA4HB2HBbj_8ei-0RB6iVsHCKEQQFhZ4Bp3TWScthcEoB0t4S3geZWdgB4UFYIK3Owi1CYKUYhdyaAZP5FzzQzHUK-rto4b3XkxPIVV-gFnPpwgrnzJtX3PUjOP-Gzg2Vs7Wa_3aGHqQWwxFCCHkMAjQIASLxt8CDk8JAP9Yt7LM_AEdDVa38Pd1lNSVJwXV18RUlYgX9VDTKoCoa6kTIuYrac). [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW2w3_Ewh8AsXe25pYK7YaWg8IY_FOQ5C8LfiTeUWKTr2xUYFzpZ3ztl81VBXE-VujcEdxtkJ91LRu8HP4XUPTvE4wYphCOoZCbu9SFlYDzs3C8KPpssQ1Bjg82JDhTrIDefDKqzHE7Ld3lYGS6iYdMpkHfWxftR9zBSqBsZqr0ZrEkcHXdniWW4HhMno36k4o0QOMzwLpKZWoSjTBsl9FY61af1GGAQtOQFCUR4XqwC00TjazbjgEGLgS_Y7KZfO6_AZK_sxKStClqxEQqp1QrXnOlZ6HNfZe-s-OW8GW5jQ6c-2Vfo45Mc7cQ9LgPb-BQGQFT3-hkFS6aKtmS4UHq-1zpUpsHMx-gLuqiLjV98Wzxt6MAJFrmSfpMjAdJVUEC4tk-BIisWY-lj3VniDntDx6FeAn7mFPNW4e9LIylIb0Irr4kCUt-GMjnS76NPOlw%3D%3D) This week, Jane endorsed the "Keep Nine" amendment, a constitutional amendment that would keep the number of Supreme Court Justices at the traditional nine. The intent of this amendment is to ban court packing and preserve the independence of the Supreme Court, an issue that is continuously under attack from the radical Left. In light of growing calls from the Left to pack the Supreme Court, Jane also called on her likely Democrat opponent, Tim Ryan, to answer unequivocally the question he has long dodged:
**Does Tim Ryan support Democrat efforts to expand the Supreme Court? ** Read more [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW2w3_Ewh8AsXe25pYK7YaWg8IY_FOQ5C8LfiTeUWKTr2xUYFzpZ3ztl81VBXE-VujcEdxtkJ91LRu8HP4XUPTvE4wYphCOoZCbu9SFlYDzs3C8KPpssQ1Bjg82JDhTrIDefDKqzHE7Ld3lYGS6iYdMpkHfWxftR9zBSqBsZqr0ZrEkcHXdniWW4HhMno36k4o0QOMzwLpKZWoSjTBsl9FY4oo3S4SMHUCu2CFk9vkOgEXsXUcWQQJQdPQzQWXRAY8lC4V0HgASzcT0eB9lBEU65SeGlNfkpg49JaRRb_nNPYE7FH-zKPxK-jtRBqjbi0hMxMHSUagO1nr-e9Bdq5KBGrnmeHwinQkhTNuDyxAU38F7nVxneZyecsuV_r-7rlMb5usLMjMNNQzxkkR4sn4X1P8OlIWZ9rFKqo3bfCA0E1PKIlV8150Z0txRq6UOLOSQ%3D%3D). [](https://www.buzzsprout.com/972157/9154554https://www.buzzsprout.com/972157/9154554) To represent Ohio, you have to have a real understanding of the issues and the diverse aspects of Ohio's economy. Jane lives on a farm that produces corn and soybeans, so agriculture is near to her heart. This week, she joined the podcast _In Ohio County Today_ to talk about agriculture issues and how in the Senate, Jane will always be a friend to farmers and protect Ohio's robust agriculture industry. You can listen [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyWw_dtE7yI25GXTVOFvbojEbbcjY5cmC7egUssf32u6ZiJuD3OeYA8bMPvktYl2-djFUP_wEngVS0_QGbcXTUmequ6v0JVcGhpiTkM_Y8gRfU4Y_cYQgSQ8AxzyQnpAztEpck_Hh6Eiik82HjarQZY_rEDtSBwRQZqWuKaTlpHMMu9w9FEshdf-dKnLVgRYOsYuRGImob6g8nwzzvZTRJEiQpVicPyZwaqNqh_OCLvMQg9J38yEGH9-FlYhyeGcZK-cyBlqgqbxjDA91VjxATN0g%3D). In case you missed Jane's radio interview with Eddie & Rocky in Cincinnati talking how to fight COVID mandates and more, you can listen [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW1uriab_GbgQ1RvWODg5vAJOgOp-tWzNrptMu5_rSNMe2zFo76xi6cFjlBnQXKu17l_L3ph6RUwDxKwRfEsw9WlaIbf4uNnjmsdo-Pc6sxE_1XiEXGR2MX0nlyv-DAC4B_NQNmIPU59RSCRFvo5dEUy1jqM2eY_XKxkffdYTpHQi5Erm1puOSmhGxG1buvWThDJ3Egu2xBAr05cpMnlQofJzxQGIk_qKMK7vcpNeKejUY1JNHlfQ6NTLQ48dOMJz2tSMCxJBs2uohddeo_pD_Rsvs5yesqt9VC7FLwKFV4sQrO9zIljNZkV3uTAvZ4OhD1uuaH8NghY7v4FL5EDAhY8Up3Y-RvQjJtuwb4NPVmDj). **Never Forget** Tomorrow, on the anniversary of 9/11, I hope you all will join Jane, her family and the entire campaign in remembering the heroic Americans and first responders that tragically lost their lives 20 years ago at the hands of terrorists. We must never forget their sacrifice and the sacrifice of those who answered the call of duty to avenge this act of terror and stand for freedom. This spirit of selfless sacrifice, courage and bravery represents the very best of American values, and now, more than ever, it highlights how critical it is that we stand strong for American resolve, not bow to weakness and cower to terrorists. Tomorrow and every day, may we remember the Gold Star families and our brave military men and women, and may we all be proud to be Americans. In memory, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_t=TUpW-20UGzSaohnOSV64dgjUTdaiv8eTB0q37WZKlFV1_SekLxgh_z7P9anlANZiySmMOaqa2aWnEa3M1Iq5TsINETEK1mvxI3bmQcyD4eWnxav3uvqSoD8buRu1CNw_gf3JyS-qSEsLiUqp7ScDBWZk6oZpKP4Qdcqw0MTglKw%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=XGWlDW_MmSbSP2oh8rKyW7WI3VaxuwY1zYfA9m-euxeRY5RwQcXfeatzXhvOwF8zzwBLBt1KFkmfaGR6v70zdc0BE1LmElW79D1xOQlDdFC5ifbbrE2pEstaomFIRzTd65Qy7WwfIMZTq_0V7A6DmU-gyh8gvr8TDF1IwSRDhnVJACLy66pTfQ3j7JFNLH5k0kVTIvWo-k6him7_tKov2wmnmMtPmBFlEg9o88x1s6lh4NzwQkjRvhhroHcXEjnIPQtN8plYpKU9yrKTqUOkPzpTbIQqyyVDDzLCUBn1C-o%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=56406ad61c564de4aacb54ad67557664&_e=jepU1TbxKgbI591J5BoAZprzqppnyJkfRUy8S_x3HTRtyAroqd0PqLajOGL5n4NMPBaxl2yk6JT0n0vSVq3zTbPJ3iJbqRyhkZ87y-U9R7jfzd4y83XIrARQGV-O0oTQi33eU4IO-SIbfJd6urVXwvuZuN3lRvfR1_ncGPVIIfIMy3-DmhbrY34MsplID-Nhb6N-0Omf-8wg4X6gw6D_0gJHi6NTW0kvtF0OWAReAjIFY6zNHK-3klm83PPNuMxpZO0UuIDIEZqcYegIFwc7Vw%3D%3D)

In memory, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: What Higher Ed Can Learn From Hospitals
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=f944f2bce4844b419928e6d32799bd2b&_e=4njCRwBqgwZW1LcI0rZ8hY9rbwYbd00XfO0087p1qNpg0PNK1EJNtUDMtJzq5Ti7oqBTRcKd_m416-lK-jJoCILSdzupWEErT-wSFEgV_FdBt4hI7ugS7QdRCF_otxbOThFiBFEQ4ut1zSexeT-CmG7GMG3aVOkzzAjMj4ANwx3qiZ07sKsFU_Wp-Mc5S2fyHohI2R28uLvlFZHXz6WtZqJ5vu9oPehOmcfkk3qoU7Pd89vJFWmY13ydyfPeM8KVZ9468HeJU4SiS6IZvaDXrA%3D%3D) What Higher Ed Can Learn From Hospitals By Bobby Jindal The pandemic has hit both industries hard, but healthcare has adapted better to market and cost pressures. | |
---
America is emerging from the Covid-19 pandemic with a changed economy. Many companies won’t survive, and others will be permanently altered. America’s universities are also wounded financially, and some may have to defer or eliminate classes in the fall—a potential death knell for the weakest. University presidents must learn from their healthcare counterparts and adapt before it’s too late.

Healthcare and higher education were battered in the pandemic. Hospitals were inundated at its height and forced to defer more-profitable elective surgeries and transfer noncritical patients. Meanwhile, more than 4,000 colleges and universities were nearly vacant and few offered classes on campus.

Leaders from both industries have long faced intense bipartisan pressure to contain costs and deliver better outcomes, demands exacerbated by the pandemic. The healthcare industry has been undergoing a transformation that will help it maneuver through the current challenges. Higher-education leaders will find it harder to adapt and have some tough decisions to make to sustain their institutions. Here are some lessons they can learn from healthcare counterparts to better serve students as consumers:
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=f944f2bce4844b419928e6d32799bd2b&_e=4njCRwBqgwZW1LcI0rZ8hR9kdnSMvlQuKdPkDfEFcpQMTjTfGMy4yvuidC95pESkCsfdSm-FNBHPA9U2V0Im5R4HlWJihj1o4ly8EDssxXwovbAPc8fZiQYwmDhZLwHv8mWFANDG6IScyJ77_NSmcFGLGMkHFovwza54ZRjd-91NiwsU1Sy1AnJoWZtW_eDEqBub_NItmaaoxpJhYXEdfS7b3jjAMcQ8MS5gmaRJBz5jvbEhr5G63KQi-HLdCW-CEd-3plwJISSPsm4gwuT3Ia06Qql6bW8bA26KxLoBp5TZswA141Pe9eZU81WIWSK5GUVLl0QAN-wlfwe9YElyo7XemNzGVFDDY6e5IWMKT8riJjvIcMHeBrBl0TGPlPCHspw4PXtxc3UB7axGd3sP7Q%3D%3D)**.

body:
It’s late, but it’s important
| | |
---
| | It’s getting late, Derek — but I wanted to get one last note out to you before midnight.

_**[This morning, I set a two-day fundraising goal of raising $100,000 by midnight tomorrow, and I need you to step up and make a contribution tonight to help us get there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35566346/305480528/-2023814932?refcode=20210910.6_TM_9BM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTRiODI5OS05YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t7zzo7DQBjQ6upFUx6eN3w5C9U6K1oww4Zjb_0Crc-w=)**_

Here’s the deal.

At any moment, Glenn Youngkin could write a check to his campaign — to the tune of $75 million. With resources like that, and a race this close, he could actually start to pull away at the exact moment when Virginians start casting their ballots.

We’ve already seen one poll showing Glenn Youngkin in the lead — _we don’t want that momentum to continue._

We don’t have Glenn’s bottomless bank account, but we do have something better: **a historic grassroots movement of Democrats across the country ready to stop Youngkin and stand up to Trumpism in America.**

I’m counting on you, Derek: it’s going to take all of us.

_**[Please, click here and make a secure contribution right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35566347/305480529/-2023814932?refcode=20210910.6_TM_9BM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTRiODI5OS05YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t7zzo7DQBjQ6upFUx6eN3w5C9U6K1oww4Zjb_0Crc-w=)**_

With gratitude,

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35566348/305480530/-2023814932?refcode=20210910.6_TM_9BM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTRiODI5OS05YjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t7zzo7DQBjQ6upFUx6eN3w5C9U6K1oww4Zjb_0Crc-w=)**

body:
Today we're coming directly to you to ask what questions you have for Beto.
#
Like our name suggests, Powered by People is focused on one thing: **Building the largest people-powered movement of voters Texas has ever seen.**
With the GOP's clear focus on voter suppression and restricting the rights of Texans, our democracy is in a perilous position, and we need everyone's involvement.
That's why Beto wants to hear from you! **So, today we're coming _directly_ to you to ask what questions you have for Beto.**
Curious how the recent passage of voter suppression legislation in Texas will impact your ability to vote? Want to learn more about the harmful GOP laws that went into effect this month? Or maybe you've been waiting for the chance to ask Beto about joining the fight for our democracy?
**No matter the question, we want to hear it![Please, submit your question to Beto here. We'll follow up with Beto's answers over the next few weeks.](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210910&t=1&akid=153230%2E444211%2Er5cf85)**
**[Submit a question »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210910&t=2&akid=153230%2E444211%2Er5cf85)**
Beto is doing his best to knock on every door in Texas — including in counties that often cast off as low turnout — and meet every resident he can because we believe politics should be inclusive. **Our work is about including as many people as possible in our democracy so we can fight for the change we want to see in Texas.**
**[Please, ask Beto a question today. We can't wait to hear what's on your mind!](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210910&t=3&akid=153230%2E444211%2Er5cf85)**
Together,
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=153230%2E444211%2Er5cf85).
clean_body: Today we're coming directly to you to ask what questions you have for Beto. Like our name suggests, Powered by People is focused on one thing: Building the largest people-powered movement of voters Texas has ever seen. With the GOP's clear focus on voter suppression and restricting the rights of Texans, our democracy is in a perilous position, and we need everyone's involvement. That's why Beto wants to hear from you! So, today we're coming directly to you to ask what questions you have for Beto. Curious how the recent passage of voter suppression legislation in Texas will impact your ability to vote? Want to learn more about the harmful GOP laws that went into effect this month? Or maybe you've been waiting for the chance to ask Beto about joining the fight for our democracy? No matter the question, we want to hear it Beto is doing his best to knock on every door in Texas — including in counties that often cast off as low turnout — and meet every resident he can because we believe politics should be inclusive. Our work is about including as many people as possible in our democracy so we can fight for the change we want to see in Texas. Together, Powered by People Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: President Jim Gash
subject: Waves of Flags and Honoring the Heroes of 9/11
body:
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vzf_c6ONS-yqU0_tI9lwAxRqCmHYakuXPUGu-RFWKpcDVKuVfELXjoihpa6spodDeHDIGjGqIR9NMaCOyfzBITOq1-blvsbjovcEBn7D3OJ7uIL1BBkVt78AU-NOyFLdzRM35_7udUCmLKzMNp_ZftC5SbWvEErpJ6AAkZu4eDaOUrDkR1WwgBj2E_uS39q2jIcbdxsZwBJ1JVi7qYU8ctm)

---
Dear Fellow American -

As you know, this Saturday marks the 20th anniversary of the tragic events that took place on September 11, 2001. As the president of Pepperdine University, the passage of two decades is a stark reminder that many of our students were not yet born on this day and many others were too young to remember. Yet we must never forget, and Pepperdine is committed to exactly that.

For the 14th consecutive year, Pepperdine University students and our extended community will be commemorating this historic day of loss and heroism with [**Waves of Flags**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vxfFaIehlN_zKxevA6leecDkKSwFbMknrllu5AkTxSLa2oTHh0vQaEbKnb2A8VhKUNrxka_OFLllA2CO3rOOLbqtnELgbl1bqjx5QgZGoU2usSjjW4qXMHU5zcTHaC_UEy9iQ1iRuVGkb4MndjLRqUGZkqoEc76H3-L3kWQLh3UgARpgkDFtmfGdkn2Izj4s-R1T1oop93r5H55qRgX2Tdl), a beautiful annual display located on our Malibu campus that honors the lives lost in the terror attacks on 9/11. The display features 2,977 flags—one for each innocent victim, including a national flag for each foreign country that lost a citizen in the attacks.

This tremendous display educates both students and visitors far beyond our campus about the history of our country and the overwhelming sacrifices that heroic men and women have made to keep it safe, prosperous, and free.

Started by students in 2008, Waves of Flags has become a Pepperdine tradition, one that attracts attention and admiration from across the country—and on this 20th-anniversary commemoration, we’re working to ensure permanent support of the memorial and educating the next generation about the attacks on 9/11.

That’s why [**I hope you will join us in this noble pursuit and take a few minutes to learn more**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vyQWmHugSD0gpYTjs597BiMIba9ofp1rsevZFJbeDKl4YSSkVJNo59oN_OQjgkbBJLdwrqoMV9UFwS7ALiEaCq-HpKdcA8bY2d0HbzomWmOEmj12qDex6GZ4Fn7G6DYcQsWc9KInWNNhggIz1fYFGatN4Qnb4u1l1Qiy7tjUu969sAt9tU-YmuSGL-p2q07oFF3lJxUMz8d3G-V32g6h2em) about the Waves of Flags initiative at Pepperdine. We need your participation and support to continue to inform and educate our community about the significance of the national tragedy and to honor together the innocent victims who perished 20 years ago.

Over the years, Pepperdine’s efforts have come to transcend the commemoration of a single tragic day, and we cannot allow September 11 to become a distant memory in our nation’s history. It is critical to [**continue to honor and remember those who sacrificed everything and educate younger generations for years to come.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vyFH3i0IgnjUYQ-ayY1W9Tm_Zei3NhLiUqUEWadkw--sqhKUboWHH4zZ3yyW4CtApysnYbRQRqlgG7votMJil_iLK_BAVqV2Am4pEsDZK6IBEpUHoAOg-pEkf32OQbqkDe29KKG_xj6ypJlS3DI-a0UFwTlV2h7YJPZy92bHFZcaIgWgYWR8UCr7JO3VkIujk0-pORLE4A4LdK5TvUX6ZP0)

This Saturday, in somber recognition of the 20th anniversary of one of our nation’s darkest days, Pepperdine University invites all members of the community to join us at Honoring the Heroes of 9/11, a day of events designed to commemorate the friends, neighbors, and family members lost on that fateful day. We hope you will take time this Saturday to do the same, whether here in Malibu or in your own community. [**Please learn more about and register for Honoring the Heroes of 9/11 here.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vz6Pr3vG-qY-C3-KIdXc5YSrRLNYxy2fOnv12138-t-Ha7KvcV7B6x3OVpcTCipA9-oCTrNe8TYN25xGfEfVqqYcD_4Ep99_3D3GjrFWHYK1K5RuCVtXFlN6zxygSKdsTf5T_tI4i0nn-ohIqlzn8HfA5S1T7UqQgWaadPM7AsCW99hmXBlzUxlqos2RexuZ1tqnhYI6KHjEwF7w-jA7WWM)

And if you would like to go even further in your observance of this worthy endeavor of remembrance and education, and support the endowment fund established to ensure our commemorative and educational activities continue in perpetuity, [**we welcome your generous support.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vzHJZl9nBoDTEnSSCp-Rq7SQulypvZrRoneDDnq3bu992GXtFuantYnl9PeQxKDc6UW9X44OHK-MdsXB_HZF_Ot1RWUWgl6D0GGihU--1ZD9K5iv-x8NOkY760naOhA43PbwzKX8yi0zVdrJvRTAM9JkcKAWtPQzA3FpwgMC9TXQwSsAeZ87E_vpG7h4R2q7ge8vG6HZR5tsQQFm4QMo4TO)

Thank you-[**I hope to hear from you today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vyEYo0KDYsJBDlqhRlphiA2aVbB_pUVSszbSfjxbjioeraVAhEKWF5IjYPs3bYcNL9Gr5RL8kkUuhK6apGJ6Q5faSkRdVJ0DLt0I4xwOfWh2n7bu8lD1ex2r2MZDAY3kRDHNPPeDnY9KNqGTM3pQJp3i5XaqfbWMiGTGw-7IhT-bGG-LBMJ3DutNZk7r2vVAD252owEzduOkXN7edoF5_4I)

Sincerely,

Jim Gash
President and CEO
Pepperdine University

[** GIVE NOW **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dd90a980f0b84c13b41c9b331207d8a5&_e=rLAypEXD3joaN7xSyjGrI2Wl8Kx9z2iOlGTI0GJxO2ne8d5PhZ5bAwjaoD-5srfPI4n1z3eIIrIohd4ZlCF4x5BOPkJjKW9DcqRKYfxWLexhx6qA2bZMIEuCcPfodTDcb87_Sbp4ICSiNfXv7ki_bkHjbItF0Wioni7t2UdQ1vzDvFsrh4FcI9TIdnIBzGu-OeVNsEwdsF3UCbefEsNmcbvXiz8yi4qo-ztNnhbBoDL1dLoWu-_k3vnZwAjnnBQRcj1ocTJp94O4efvQjDWb86SjbgDm4DOoYom3EfThTWlvtKoqB7zUI9aitcj_B81wpIUwjk-yW4wjfVHV0eo1E8jq9wn-p2gEZrDD-7ysZJ5PQ-0mnBVkw1JOnMYbQmTh)

Pepperdine University
24255 Pacific Coast Highway
Malibu, CA 90263

body:
Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84lYI6h1kcFN50uHJ57DyvE_7koAorXFdFJHAVb1h15pImr_D9qx7yA9LrkLEcJ6lxxQ3cY5wx07OnvH-bKTyxU-8jB4v3mjfZdt7ldKxLQ-WgxE5rDdFboMYFFLh6EZrMIAefv8eJ-xrjTZXFINV3kJReQZfp-9Nk49oym_-eyjDqHo8jokdAEGjof4dQfwjnGWwK_XDednhPXpDeyjKZyICzN7FQoAhLhslPTTPcTt3LK5sFgAIjlPNFgCQAW0dDstUK0EfiZpGkzTlNe-hv8QgGSh7U7UyAosIm6AWsSkL/3f7/2rNn2V4CSvmLPZ_6MjVaXQ/h0/D2_hhEFR-JGLHo56kiq_lkxp_WUlJBOGuiA25jhtCfY)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84lYI6h1kcFN50uHJ57DyvE8Ja5Vdkulpem3F8RXbwYc8e5cl-LwDxOOD7jy1EhWY22XGu-Osjtn82euD5KsJs_ZKna64OgL-UAqBOtqKS8U5SYtBsvpPrLOZhXdTqLOSuPeLfWjECY_lbRJPiLfl8tgbETSkV74X3z6Q_ZBRBdhFkp2Ypk-IH-QA9u6YTqBiV_sMxJSgYmo0-tLZFCRkPq_C2nSztZ1KP0OJs9Ma4DYi1IDFtjl-lgQf3KXL_Agofw-UMguXuBSfp13xa1qQ94aJtD4ugaPiDbbE7eYZ44es/3f7/2rNn2V4CSvmLPZ_6MjVaXQ/h1/JoVlj2b2cvlpR4gXrtkqgIQyO3M9A--xVeneNdrTo6o) Derek – I just got some urgent news I need to share with you:

**FIRST:** CNN named me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection – in a race experts say will decide Senate control.

**THEN:** Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves to smear me with attack ads, turn Georgia red and win back the majority for Mitch McConnell.

**NOW: We set a $50,000 grassroots-response goal to fight back against these GOP attacks, but we're still falling short of the critical resources we need to win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**

With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just _one_ seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. **I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first-ever Black senator and help lead the fight for our Democratic priorities – but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.**

**[So I'm personally asking, Derek: will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and Common Good VA – before our grassroots-response deadline at midnight – to help close our budget gap, keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84kNONyz_ugQhXa1-nm-FzKXGwQ9lQH0W1Vd9Tm9RcbRiq0931_ga_ZudYs5LsuuTHHZRGqNtxTqgaX4VrLFzMd4MQpG95TW4l5tFfXEYGuw4YonD8WpI4JRrSixTTH8l3ucm2ivI6ESq_85nA0DSDMUk8DBi68jdqvjT0gu7c5hwjfZ3kvkTxdUfYdorkAkIIq5cIEkEf2uLQTzh120w_efTVFCe_fQTNSdAgvv8VbI2C_rzEqadibSNt5wlnyWKfMXeblg9gtNGHy147vCcdrkWxS59qo_GyDeqEQsltWOmnIbe3KYur-kIoT1vsau59g/3f7/2rNn2V4CSvmLPZ_6MjVaXQ/h2/4NMue0gM6wXs-Ka6rsTZQP67M6l9j0cEYiLf9F5efpc) ** [ ****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84kNONyz_ugQhXa1-nm-FzKXGwQ9lQH0W1Vd9Tm9RcbRiUsOMppsCkcDIKFePnJaC1DQjzRuJOL_LqGpGCukiPX3-N41x-OetIkiAuJERPi3G3sKv57I_kD6zijYOh4nBV50V_BYclRJgQ8g4xMf7kXb9BqiPQtQkUlJLetqC-Zx1UoeDJ8ZFZSuMFNvEfd2Bfp07ANxbzRMxSMJ04FFbP3S-4Xtzr0Xfhi8feRsmsw-Z8rY0zqLIqKpc01oT1OJLx3dLxoVny-7IWwnf7Db2OHSRpz66E-kIvbPaeKktF0M3GldqJyhgtqHLskx9qMuYyg/3f7/2rNn2V4CSvmLPZ_6MjVaXQ/h3/gsqaiGZbtHrywR2XlM-286f1q1otNZXMLTfZI2RkxIM)**[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84kNONyz_ugQhXa1-nm-FzKXGwQ9lQH0W1Vd9Tm9RcbRiVKbTrqlQHHIH8TjeRY-ZyQlCjZNrlVQK5UKnWEatEyO85ILBNyjuZYY0pW-STCSTKHpW35EZvyN36CFK3c0-hpwhnnZ7-SCJ8STFmb8r_TkekWhytVBrbJ6DB9VExua3fXp4sc_GZSQW8DbFNkTQzUwk2ER--zH2fEIZy2fQ-GT9f6xht5D2L9FIFOJzSp-radDTuTvWIOPJX9j6mdf_lUCoZbQAyW6CiSReJU0EWE-DMNP5tk-StK-BTPro3XHMSfu0660zr0rkbJbMpAn98A/3f7/2rNn2V4CSvmLPZ_6MjVaXQ/h4/if2pQjHZDB5Qxkh6QFwMOcKiT9M7fxTgHuhD4kdvpaM)

clean_body: Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves | | | Derek – I just got some urgent news I need to share with you: FIRST: CNN named me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection – in a race experts say will decide Senate control. THEN: Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves to smear me with attack ads, turn Georgia red and win back the majority for Mitch McConnell. NOW: We set a $50,000 grassroots-response goal to fight back against these GOP attacks, but we're still falling short of the critical resources we need to win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first-ever Black senator and help lead the fight for our Democratic priorities – but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. Any missed goal stacks the deck against our communities, against our movement and against the progressive future we’ve worked tirelessly for. So thank you in advance for pitching in. – Raphael | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

Can you help us beat the Republican-led recall attempt happening here in California? 76% of ballots mailed to California voters have not been returned. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35567380/305484953/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwM2ZlZDFhLWE1MTItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DSaLligI-R_Od40adJnpFUi1vQGsCdzPVHMshT5-9uY=&emci=f07f34d3-a212-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=303fed1a-a512-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, We only have four more days to stop conservatives from recalling Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom and replacing him with a Trump supporter Republican. And right now, the GOP is spending a staggering amount of money to make this recall a reality. **[We can’t allow Republicans to take control over our state. Not after what happened in Texas and not when we are still fighting a deadly virus during a global pandemic. Would you rush a donation to the Moms for California to help us reach undecided voters this weekend?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35567381/305484954/949434673?refcode=0910&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwM2ZlZDFhLWE1MTItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DSaLligI-R_Od40adJnpFUi1vQGsCdzPVHMshT5-9uY=)** **76% of ballots that were mailed out to California voters have not been returned and we are just 4 days away from election day.** Have you seen who is on the ballot to defeat Governor Newsom? Right-wing Trump supporters, climate deniers and pro-life members of the GOP who don’t believe in a woman’s right to choose. **The people of California deserve better.** I need you to join this fight with me because recalling our governor would stop progress in our state and set California back decades. **[Can I count on you to rush a donation, whatever amount you can afford, to help Governor Newsom fight back against this recall that is costing tax payers millions of dollars?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35567382/305484955/949434673?refcode=0910&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwM2ZlZDFhLWE1MTItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DSaLligI-R_Od40adJnpFUi1vQGsCdzPVHMshT5-9uY=)** Please help us show the millionaire right-wing Republican donors bankrolling this recall that we are not just **a** **bunch of moms in tennis shoes** by joining our movement today. I won't stop fighting to stop the recall until polls close next Tuesday. **[Donate $5 today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35567383/305484956/949434673?refcode=0825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwM2ZlZDFhLWE1MTItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DSaLligI-R_Od40adJnpFUi1vQGsCdzPVHMshT5-9uY=)** Have you seen who is on the ballot to defeat Governor Newsom? Right-wing Trump supporters, climate deniers and pro-life members of the GOP who don’t believe in a woman’s right to choose. The people of California deserve better. I need you to join this fight with me because recalling our governor would stop progress in our state and set California back decades. = Please help us show the millionaire right-wing Republican donors bankrolling this recall that we are not just a bunch of moms in tennis shoes by joining our movement today. I won't stop fighting to stop the recall until polls close next Tuesday. = = = = = = Thank you! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #notjustamomintennisshoes = Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE

name: Laura Loomer
subject: DO NOT Comply
body:
I'm not vaccinated. Whether or not you are, is not my business. It's not Joe Biden's business.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WcYZjcMU8pKbO2RM4bLcbA/QXYo0Q1mQxqeYeJTSSoAfA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WcYZjcMU8pKbO2RM4bLcbA/QXYo0Q1mQxqeYeJTSSoAfA) I'm not vaccinated.

Whether or not you are is none of my business. It's not your employer's business. And it's not Joe Biden's business either!

I'm young and healthy, and I'm not at risk. Quite frankly, I don't think most people are at risk given that COVID-19 has a 99.7% recovery rate for those who end up contracting it. In fact, I'd go as far as saying that COVID-19 is an over-blown flu given what we know about its recovery rate. The only virus I'm worried about is the REAL virus that's infecting our country . . . the Fake News Media and their promotion of hysteria to further Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine and mask mandates. Never in our lives have we ever seen government officials so eager to force people to take an experimental drug. Let's be honest: **This vaccine has NOTHING to do with science.** It's not even common sense. **It 's all about CONTROL.** The government has no place to tell Americans what they should and shouldn't be doing with their bodies. END OF DISCUSSION! Joe Biden's vaccine mandates will put the jobs **and lives** of tens of millions of Americans at risk.

But Biden doesn't care about Americans. He and his party of radical Leftists ONLY care about controlling every aspect of your life as they continue to destroy constitutional American values and implement their communist agenda.

Last night during his address to the nation about his new COVID Mandates via Executive Order, Joe Biden said, "This is not about freedom and personal choice." Joe Biden is dead wrong: **This is 100% about freedom and personal choice.**

We have two options: **Fall in line like sheep
Or
Band together and yell,
["WE WILL NOT COMPLY!"](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WcYZjcMU8pKbO2RM4bLcbA/QXYo0Q1mQxqeYeJTSSoAfA)** [**Add your name to tell Biden that you WILL NOT COMPLY!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WcYZjcMU8pKbO2RM4bLcbA/QXYo0Q1mQxqeYeJTSSoAfA)
[**Add your name to this list**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WcYZjcMU8pKbO2RM4bLcbA/QXYo0Q1mQxqeYeJTSSoAfA) and support my Congressional campaign so we can send fighters like me to Washington who will take action and fight back against these unconstitutional mandates!

In Vigilance,

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Biden politicized service academy boards, Trump joins us next week
body:
and more... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bff758948328/biden-politicized-service-academy-boards-trump-joins-us-next-week?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Removal From Military Board Is Partisan Blacklisting
Wednesday, I received a letter from the White House asking me to resign from my post on the Board of Visitors to the US Naval Academy by the end of the day or be terminated. Spoiler alert: I didn’t resign. Real Clear Politics published my thoughts on it this morning. Check it out [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=454e6bede9&e=f6564bbe3b).

| [Read my latest op-ed here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=55207c48ef&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Don’t miss President Donald Trump on _Spicer & Co_ next week!
President Donald Trump will join us on _Spicer & Co_ on Tuesday, September 14th at 6p on Newsmax. We have so much to talk about, Biden’s weak jobs report, the stranded Americans in Afghanistan, COVID vaccine mandates and more. Set your DVR now so you don’t miss it.
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
## My response to being removed from the USNA Board on _Spicer & Co_:
The Biden administration asking for the resignation of Trump appointed board members was undoubtedly political, Jen Psaki questioning the credentials of veterans, including myself, on these boards made it personal.To watch my response to this unprecedented partisan move, check out this clip:|
---
[Watch here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6b972b32ca&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=698af51b60&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Four Taliban members swapped for Bowe Bergdahl now in Afghan government](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=39e0568769&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via NY PostThis is the new Afghan government
|
---
[Opinion: How the rise of Politico shifted political journalism off course ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=25ecd3d6cb&e=f6564bbe3b)\- via Washington PostJust when I think I have read the stupidest piece of journalism along comes this gem that argues that Politico tried to placate Republicans with its early coverage
|
---
[Defense Sec Lloyd Austin ordered by House committee to submit Afghanistan plan on evacuations](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0cb7f3d2b8&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via Fox NewsWell done Congressman Mike Rogers.
|
---
[Democrats and Lobbyists Gird for Battle Over Far Reaching Tax Increases](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=60f990cfe4&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via NY TimesThe DNC could not have done a better job writing this piece
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if you agreed with the Biden administrations assessment that their exit from Afghanistan was successful, [most people didn’t](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d6b788683f&e=f6564bbe3b).
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eaf3fb9992&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c9f49907b2&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## Pre-order _Radical Nation_ ...
I cover all of these issues and more in my upcoming book, Radical Nation. It is the first comprehensive look at the Biden administration and all of these policies. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=371b766f01&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Remembering 9/11...
#### Tomorrow is the 20th anniversary of the terror attacks that took place on September 11, 2001. We pledged then that the nation would never forget. Tonight on the show we spoke to former White House Chief of Staff Andy Card, New York Mayor Rudy Giuliani and former NYPD commissioner Bernie Kerik to remember the sacrifices so many made that day. Please take time to remember those that died that day, their loved ones and those who have kept us safe from terror the past 20 years.
| | | |
---

Friend,

**_I am SO excited to share this news with you._**

My good friend, Matthew Whitaker, Former Acting United States Attorney General, will be speaking at the Inaugural **MMM Tailgate Celebration** on September 18th!

Matthew Whitaker has done incredible things to support and encourage the conservative effort when he served as Attorney General under President Trump. And he doesn’t plan on stopping now!

Senator Tom Cotton, Matthew Whitaker, and I are really looking forward to sharing all of our plans for conservative progress in our nation. We’ve got a strong group of speakers, and an even stronger group of attendees. **I don't want you to miss out!**
| [**GET TICKETS HERE!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ea7ceca03a6e4f27b151057eeea094ae&_e=2tmrT-it8LlKcs-O2BQUrc65lem1L71F0GSbZy_2EK9Bp2UFUvCF_acVZ066zSFVzKscig0fsfgAvZUs5uTro9zOPi2gbaAy-P-4Lgo5_ipf0mhlXfRQ7sQ5tkUAurzUJH4xMdoJaBomBnK8XGrZZ9AlLrfJ1hjTDTA1P7xoXDZSXJ9c4RtBrhv_O5OKYMmYMw_CZd_WDy1swpP2Fd3yMT3X3Cgmr4qY7LzikZ6j0sYbF4uKUSg_lzwOotYXaaHadr4lmN94RJ6iwoimnM0Y9N9tOUns99MWzn5vg2291_sT1KIyzmR0P-4_XAmIqnKhQf0EF-yPA_1R5MiGS4QX_p1wwYo6I7NRGNhDGVAJ7dlldKrZgncDZy6jqZv2GQgOxhAfj0eksL48hgtmpWRrD_CxZGmu6qtL0DpCgEfm2LfB9NJrYdxa6cqZ5sg9G21jgFJs2HCbhqYvK8y4KgrscRPWYUonlUumhg4hMTPaV8O5Zmi9cRAcnxTQNEf_3wvZ9qSRQmUXc7Hw83alAmgvMDMrl6VYKNKlcpN-K9eEXLg%3D)
---

It has been an incredible past year with your support, but the uphill battle continues! Here in Iowa, we take pride in working hard, raising our families, and winning. Whether it’s by 6 points or 6 votes. I’m SO grateful for the opportunity to meet with you!

You have been supporting me through it all, and I would love to tell you how much your support means to me, Iowa, and our great nation, I hope you’ll attend!

I can’t wait to see you soon,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ea7ceca03a6e4f27b151057eeea094ae&_e=2tmrT-it8LlKcs-O2BQUrc65lem1L71F0GSbZy_2EK9Bp2UFUvCF_acVZ066zSFVzKscig0fsfgAvZUs5uTro9zOPi2gbaAy-P-4Lgo5_ipf0mhlXfRQ7sQ5tkUAurzUJH4xMdoJaBomBnK8XGrZZ9AlLrfJ1hjTDTA1P7xoXDZSXJ9c4RtBrhv_O5OKYMmYMw_CZd_WDy1swpP2Fd3yMT3X3Cgmr4qY7LzikZ6j0sYbF4uKUSg_lzwOotYXaaHadr4lmN94RJ6iwoimnM0Y9N9tOUns99MWzn5vg2291_sT1KIyzmR0P-4_XAmIqnKh8355Jqs9pKRNsYBfT7s4SUvBWoD68xJc6CqHWX-y3941yD2z9TFBHdMTko0hepUsv1IhCwKcIIpr4uGk4P5GGepSablnnhKtvBSN0OyCYNN7KDNOrceIrhXXv9whkhSYBpDmOejmTNf06NLqqvm72XHCFwne1beDRAVXFMPmIedWxN71yOoysHnjld3UDBD_EYXrg6PcJy97vVeieCq_Fone4HXP8drWEkw0w41hwEY%3D)

name: Chairman Stephen Stepanek
subject: Your Weekly New Hampshire Republican Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Keep up with weekly NH Republican happenings!

| | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fnhrepublicanparty/1/0100017bd1c98851-13aabf35-fe66-4d38-ab57-02588c8d141a-000000/W9n3uhbPLK9Ve8QARkg7B4XgNCI=235) | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FNHGOP/1/0100017bd1c98851-13aabf35-fe66-4d38-ab57-02588c8d141a-000000/cC-eHr97xxt-xwbtx0wAU47MDYQ=235) | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fnh_gop/1/0100017bd1c98851-13aabf35-fe66-4d38-ab57-02588c8d141a-000000/sRiyYlgqnQufXsi99w9gQyEk9nc=235) | [ ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fchannel%2FUCeVTFDHmk8hEwVsuHD2lAFg/1/0100017bd1c98851-13aabf35-fe66-4d38-ab57-02588c8d141a-000000/3tLQUb3rmULYgUpWjO5Dqku1GUQ=235) | [ ](https://)
---|---|---|---|---
| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek**
**
****Twenty years ago tomorrow, on September 11th, America witnessed an unforgettable tragedy. Thousands of lives were lost, and more were left mourning loved ones in the wake of the attack against the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center.

On behalf of the New Hampshire Republican Party, I extend our deepest sympathies to the families who paid the ultimate sacrifice. America will never forget this attack on freedom, nor those who were lost as a result. Please be sure to take the time tomorrow to pay remembrance to Patriot Day. There are a lot of poignant moments we remember from that infamous September day and the days that followed.

Those reading this newsletter likely all remember the bullhorn speech from President Bush standing upon the rubble, declaring to New Yorkers that they were being heard by the world and that the people who took our towers down would be hearing from all of us soon. Those of us who remember the attacks and the emotions from that day must do our part to ensure those who weren’t alive are able to know what took place. We must never forget and we must always remember, and do what we need to do to teach the next generation about the sacrifices made and the many lives murdered by terrorists on that day. As we reflect this weekend on the sacrifices made in the ongoing fight for freedom and our American way of life, please participate in one of the many remembrance events being organized in towns across New Hampshire.

Next week, we will be holding our Federal Delegation accountable in Exeter. By calling out wasteful spending, we’ll make sure Maggie Hassan, Jeanne Shaheen, and Chris Pappas can hear us loud and clear. Join us at Exeter Town Hall on Tuesday, September 14th at 12 PM for a rally against wasteful Washington spending. I’ll be speaking there and I hope you can join me - find more information **[**here**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Fstop_the_pend_rally/1/0100017bd1c98851-13aabf35-fe66-4d38-ab57-02588c8d141a-000000/SAXyz6Uoqu5kKBMJlYkx5zVteQU=235)**.**

---

NHGOP Chairman **

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

name: Polling Update via Team Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ][IMG]

Team,

A new poll of likely voters just revealed how Tim stacks up against
potential Republican nominees for Ohio’s open Senate seat -- and it
couldn’t be closer:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2688?t=1007&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Tim 37.3%, Republican 37.6%

With less than 1% separating Tim from the Republicans in this race, we
have to ramp up our efforts NOW to compete with the GOP’s dark money
machine. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2688?t=1008&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]This race could make or break our 50/50 split in the Senate --
chip in $25 or more to help Tim take the lead!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2688?t=1009&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2689?t=1010&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2690?t=1011&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2691?t=1012&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2692?t=1013&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2693?t=1014&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Other Amount

According to the poll, “relatively high proportions... don’t know how they
would vote” and “the 2022 Senate Election in Ohio will be one to watch.”

We were already anticipating tens of millions of dollars in outside
spending from national Republican groups attacking Tim. Now that they see
he’s gaining in the polls, they’ll stop at nothing to block our momentum
and keep this seat red.

Tim will fight like hell to win this race and cut workers in on the deal
-- but he can’t do it without you. We’re relying on this grassroots team
to help us even the odds against Tim’s millionaire opponents and the
billionaires and special interest groups backing them.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2688?t=1015&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Can we count on you to chip in $25 or any amount now to help us get
Tim’s winning message out across Ohio and flip this Senate seat blue? This
is a make-or-break moment for our campaign.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2688?t=1016&akid=833%2E3611125%2EGJS9Q7 ]Donate

Let’s do this!

-- Team Ryan

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Saying No to the Biden Mandate
body:
| | | | President Biden announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, President Biden announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date. He is seeking to mandate large employers to vaccinate their employees.
This is wild. We all know that the federal government has no such authority to issue this mandate.
You know it, I know it, and even President Biden knows it.
Yet here Biden goes again, refusing to adhere to the rule of law and our Constitution. Biden doesn’t seem to care at all about following the law.
I know so many of you have reached out to us asking about how my office plans to respond. I am working tirelessly to defend your rights and stand for your freedom. Indeed, I fully expect to be in court challenging this federal overreach shortly.

clean_body: | | | | President Biden announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date. Dear Peter, Yesterday, President Biden announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date. He is seeking to mandate large employers to vaccinate their employees. This is wild. We all know that the federal government has no such authority to issue this mandate. You know it, I know it, and even President Biden knows it. Yet here Biden goes again, refusing to adhere to the rule of law and our Constitution. Biden doesn’t seem to care at all about following the law. I know so many of you have reached out to us asking about how my office plans to respond. I am working tirelessly to defend your rights and stand for your freedom. Indeed, I fully expect to be in court challenging this federal overreach shortly. | | | | | | | | Remember, it was Benjamin Franklin who once said, "Those who give up freedom for safety deserve neither." Mountaineers and Americans are always free, Mr. President. This is about freedom and respecting our Constitution. We are coming for you in Court. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915.
